subject: This is the beginning

body:
Thanks for all your support

| Thank you, Friend. You helped us win this crucial election to save America from the grips of the radical Left.

With your help, we are now on track to restore Trump's America First legacy. But the real fight starts now. **[I need your help to ensure we get things done and hold Biden accountable for the damage he's done.](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=43ef860192c740b9b9d2d2ebc43290fd&_e=bI2zPtApc5WH6J85Wk0uS5kDiYJWGhCKkJ5pyxbNJJ4YSZW5EFfR11D8Asj8GI9Xewo6j2Pt-gF8UM-ahrd0M4s6ke6DR-s51w1iH1JV3_flSnTit3QbypwpGKYKKrNpE9gZOAzCmQtwSHvTa6_aMvsZ8NlKxiH_zvJMBBpMJgp5xdQxzXlNRhsxUlT0KyFMupwH83WicLblpDVBzRaZ0foyvKe6hXs_YCsOYcfwKl2zFZrrZStJhn0KP9feJdpe9VnGrER5rQjoCNcjxhnrWdi0V7iP3tSb2Cb1MzdisBaVvJlyK6KSnZdGDcawWdkZ6npcUbMaiIChmLZty6ifjcPzeVs3esVga0FMIdSG6G5yHiw4N_QCd4YX8qAwAb4R3Xu-voDd0cNZWgcqO7cztujZWUbeC5H12cBUl1oA3VNEUwC4swWk2B5it3E_FROcX1XulARPkZzD3rYuwngjXZlFhbrR3JCMKfNyh-eRi0yog0zdCAdypKRvyWnhQaMmviU3CIokhUdv15-fE8FPaw%3D%3D)**

name: Jen Jordan
subject: It's been an honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc
body:
The fight to restore our rights continues, and I remain hopeful for a better tomorrow and a better Georgia.

---
Friend,

It's been my greatest honor to be Georgia’s Democratic nominee for Attorney General. Although this chapter has come to an end, the fight for a safer, more equitable Georgia continues.

My decision to run for Attorney General was never about me, but about serving and protecting the people of this state. It was about every woman who has suffered the loss of a child. It was about my 13-year-old daughter, and every little girl across Georgia who deserves to have the same rights as I have had my entire life. It was about keeping our communities safe, and ensuring our young people have the opportunity to grow old instead of falling victim to senseless acts of gun violence.

We may not have received the results we were hoping for last night, but the work is far from over. It is now more important than ever that we continue to support and elect leaders who will prioritize the health and safety of Georgia families. Leaders who will stand up for women and defend our right to make the most personal decisions about our own bodies. Leaders who will reject partisan political agendas and put people first.

I'm so proud of the race we ran, and our performance — being the top-vote getter among Georgia Democrats behind Senator Warnock — shows that the voices of the people we engaged and inspired aren't going anywhere. I'm also heartened by the strong performance around the country last night among candidates who put reproductive freedom front and center. **It's clear that the fight to restore our rights has momentum and history on its side.**

Over the past year and a half, I have met so many incredible people on the campaign trail who said I gave them hope. And as a girl from Dodge County who grew up poor with a single mother, I know firsthand the power of hope. I'm so grateful to my family, my team, and every single one of you who has supported me along this journey. May we never lose hope for a better tomorrow and a better Georgia.

Sincerely,

Jen Jordan | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386478/378349862/-737921463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGFkODAwMi04YzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5RDgNqS0Kib-FhTaveeXBof3mgUmOimZYEgBktvl-M=&emci=9ade9b0a-7c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=2dad8002-8c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=32707168) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386479/378349863/1663983557?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGFkODAwMi04YzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5RDgNqS0Kib-FhTaveeXBof3mgUmOimZYEgBktvl-M=&emci=9ade9b0a-7c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=2dad8002-8c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=32707168) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386480/378349864/1489251599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGFkODAwMi04YzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5RDgNqS0Kib-FhTaveeXBof3mgUmOimZYEgBktvl-M=&emci=9ade9b0a-7c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=2dad8002-8c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=32707168)

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: I wanted to share these with you (photos enclosed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: With our race headed to a runoff election, I thought I'd take a moment to reach out and tell you a little bit more about myself. My story speaks to exactly why I'm in this fight – and it's important I share that with you.

First, here's a picture of me as a kid with a few of my siblings! (I'm in the bottom-right corner.)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386422/378348199/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzViYjM1MS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_C6pwcfrMFvhkdGd0e_B0j5XG4b6Yp0B28_Mp72JCU=)
I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters – and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents taught us the meaning of hard work and always said we could do _anything_ we put our minds to. Thanks to their support, I became the first in my family to earn a college degree.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386423/378348200/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzViYjM1MS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_C6pwcfrMFvhkdGd0e_B0j5XG4b6Yp0B28_Mp72JCU=)
From there, I followed in the footsteps of my mom and dad – both preachers – and eventually worked my way up to become the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386424/378348201/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzViYjM1MS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_C6pwcfrMFvhkdGd0e_B0j5XG4b6Yp0B28_Mp72JCU=)
But I've always believed my impact doesn't stop at the church doors. That's just where it begins. That's why I ran for the U.S. Senate in the first place. Last year, with unprecedented grassroots support from folks like you, we made _history_. Now, I'm humbled to serve as Georgia's first Black senator and work hard to make sure every child can achieve their American dream – just like I did.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386425/378348202/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzViYjM1MS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_C6pwcfrMFvhkdGd0e_B0j5XG4b6Yp0B28_Mp72JCU=)
Here's the thing, friend: Keeping up this fight won't be easy.

**The only way I can continue being a voice for Georgians is with your help. ****That's why I'm personally asking:****[Will you chip in $5 or more today to help fuel our on-the-ground efforts to keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386426/378348203/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzViYjM1MS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_C6pwcfrMFvhkdGd0e_B0j5XG4b6Yp0B28_Mp72JCU=)**
Thank you for being part of our people-powered movement. As always, I'm so grateful for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386427/378348204/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzViYjM1MS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_C6pwcfrMFvhkdGd0e_B0j5XG4b6Yp0B28_Mp72JCU=)

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV Victory Fund
subject: Beating the Odds: Climate Voters Made the Difference
body:
? ? ? ? ? Dear Peter,

Few of us have forgotten where we were when a violent mob of armed insurrectionists, many of them proudly displaying symbols of white supremacist hate, attacked the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

One year later, LCV remembers that day and honors the heroism of Capitol police and others who protected our national seat of elected government from attackers who sought to overturn the presidential election results. We also recommit to one of the day's enduring lessons: that safeguarding our democracy and the right to vote is an urgent priority and must never be taken for granted.

Unfortunately, the anti-democracy attacks didn't stop on January 6 ? opponents of free and fair elections have since adjusted their tactics to focus on state-level policies. At least 19 states have passed laws that restrict the freedom to vote, undermine fair voting districts, and raise the likelihood of future attempts to sabotage fair elections.
?
These attacks on fair elections and voting rights are a national crisis, and they disproportionately seek to suppress and discard votes by people of color and young people who have been historically and systematically excluded from full participation in our democracy.

To ensure that U.S. democracy delivers on its promise to be a government of, by, and for the people ? and to make sure we never experience another January 6th ? our nation has a lot of work to do. This includes passing comprehensive voting rights legislation at the federal level to codify the right to free and fair elections.

As a 50-year old environmental organization with voting and elections at the center of our theory of change, LCV has long understood how essential a free, fair, and equitable democracy is to protecting people and the planet. In the last two decades, LCV and our sister organization, LCV Education Fund, have become leaders among our national peers in democracy and civic engagement, while our 30+ state affiliates have become valued partners in efforts to strengthen voting rights at the state and local levels.

Together, we've helped register 1.5 million voters, won ballot measures on redistricting and automatic voter registration, and worked with election officials to expand voting site access. Our Democracy for All https://links.messages.lcv. program already comprises one of the largest and most dynamic civic engagement efforts in the nation and the largest, most impactful program within the environmental movement.

Yet given the stakes, we need to do much more. That is why this past year, LCV dramatically expanded our democracy work and will continue to do so in 2022 and beyond.
?
For the first time, LCV has also elevated strengthening democracy to a standalone goal in our four-year strategic plan ? and a priority on par with addressing climate change. Our plan through 2024 https://links.messages.lcv. will advance pro-democracy reforms, defend against voter suppression, and counter misinformation. We are developing a coordinated 10-year plan with our 30+ state affiliates to pursue this work at all levels by advancing policies that can help close the racial participation gap between communities of color and white voters.

The stakes of this crisis couldn't be higher for our freedom, our future, and the health and safety of our communities. Thank you for being part of this work and for believing that our democracy, like our Earth, is worth protecting.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President, League of Conservation Voters

P.S. Later today, LCV and our partners are participating in candlelight vigils at sites across the country. People of different races, places, party affiliations, and backgrounds will be joining peacefully to say: In the United States, the voters decide the outcome of elections. To find an event near you and sign up to attend, click here. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~LP-bcP/VmNkWkVtUjNIZkVuTDhzUTFoUkI4Sjk2TDJHSWovaFh0SGg1bHhYdUcxejdrdWN6bzVudEhweU1sYkR6N0YzczVYZ25JaCtvd0pidE1RTENzOFBuYjQxMU45T2d3ZWNSSEthV1FncjNRZmM9S0/ These events are occurring later today, so we encourage you to click through now to find your event. ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8898700&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDIxMTE1NwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDIxMTE1NwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8898700&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDIxMTE1NwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDIxMTE1NwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ ? ? ? ? https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8898700&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDIxMTE1NwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDIxMTE1NwS2

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Thank you. We will continue to fight for our beloved state.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I’m grateful to everyone who helped get this campaign across the finish line.
#

Thank you for joining me on this journey.
I’m grateful to everyone who helped get this campaign across the finish line. The volunteers who knocked on doors, made phone calls, and drove people to the polls. I’m grateful to so many who I met along the way.
Thank you to my husband, Curt, whose partnership made all of this possible! Thank you to my sons, Matthew and Thomas, who inspire and teach me every day. I wouldn’t be standing here today without your support — and I love you all so much.
Last night, I called Senator-elect Budd and congratulated him. I offered him my support and encouraged him to stand in the tradition of our state to be an independent leader that puts North Carolina first. I hope he will.
I’m so proud of the race we ran. I’m proud that all along we stayed true to our mission — that this would be a race about the people, not politics. Even when others didn’t, we believed in North Carolina — and I do still.
This isn’t the outcome we wanted, but we have made history in North Carolina. I’m thinking of all those before me who blazed their own trails so that I could reach the end of this one.
I’m thinking of my late mother, Lou Beasley, who showed me the importance of public service, of working for justice for all and for standing for what’s right. She was a great example. She knew the importance of staying the course and valuing the right to vote. My mother was granted the right to vote 57 years ago with the passage of the Voting Rights Act. 57 years later, the work to make voting truly accessible continues.
I’m thinking of my Grandaddy Clarence and my grandmother Mimi, Rebecca from Alabama, who married very young and searched for a better life for their family. With 76 cents in his pocket Granddaddy Clarence hopped a train to Nashville, TN with dreams of a better future in his heart. He worked on the railroad his whole life believing that for all his sacrifice, his children and grandchildren would have it better. My Grandaddy Clarence and Mimi believed firmly in the American Dream. Despite the challenges they faced and the injustices they weathered, my grandparents worked hard to build a better future for their children and grandchildren.
I am my grandparents’ American Dream.
Regardless of the result — I remain resolved to fight for our beloved state. Because North Carolina is worth fighting for. Because our American Dreams are worth pursuing.
This election was never about the names on the ballot. It’s been about you, the people of this state, and your future.
After two decades as a judge, I ran for the U.S. Senate for a simple reason: I love this state. But I’ve seen how Washington has failed people here.
Over the last 19 months, I met North Carolinians in all 100 counties. You shared with me your struggles — from jobs that don’t pay the rent to medication that costs too much to loved ones who need health care but couldn’t afford it to small business owners who are the backbone of our economy and need leaders with a backbone to do what’s best for them. I’ve spoken with farmers who’re paying too much for fertilizer and for gas for farm equipment. I’ve heard from those who’ve been fearful of the threats to our democracy. And you shared with me your hopes — good schools for your children, regardless of your ZIP code, safe communities to live in, opportunities to prosper and thrive. I’ve seen time and again what I already knew — the people of our state are tough, resilient, and generous.
And I heard from so many of you who wanted Washington to set aside the special interests and corporate donors and instead focus on helping our families. Nurturing our communities.
While Washington focuses on pointing fingers, the people of North Carolina know we have to point forward.
Because I, like you, still believe in a future where our rights are protected and our freedoms fulfilled.
Where seniors can retire with dignity and prescription drugs don’t break the bank.
Where people can work one — not two, not three jobs — to support a family and you don’t have to go to college to get that job.
Where YOUR leaders work for YOU — not themselves, and not their corporate donors and special interest groups.
Where an American Dream is a possibility of tomorrow for all — not just a story of the past for some.
And while I am disappointed — I am not defeated. While I wish for a different outcome, I am not leaving the fight because the issues that I ran on are too important and an election doesn’t determine my voice or my continued commitment to fight with you.
Progress in this country has never been promised. It takes time. And always in the face of injustice and adversity, we have continued to fight. By taking up the fight, we have made progress.
It is because of this that I stand before you — the first African American woman to be nominated to the U.S. Senate from North Carolina. The first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice. This fight has made my story possible.
And with unprecedented attacks on our rights and our democracy hanging in the balance, we simply cannot afford to give up the fight.
Thank you for your hard work and commitment these last two years. I am filled with gratitude and hope for having been in this fight alongside you, and for all that is to come.
Thank you and may God bless North Carolina.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-nov22.g3HOlK&refcode=em221109-1-MA&t=1&akid=2269%2E357359%2EPMQV2k)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2269%2E357359%2EPMQV2k). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2269%2E357359%2EPMQV2k). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=2269_357359_PMQV2k&akid=2269%2E357359%2EPMQV2k) today to help us make history.

This fight has made my story possible. And with unprecedented attacks on our rights and our democracy hanging in the balance, we simply cannot afford to give up the fight. Thank you for your hard work and commitment these last two years. I am filled with gratitude and hope for having been in this fight alongside you, and for all that is to come. Thank you and may God bless North Carolina. \- Cheri Beasley Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Election Day may be over, friend, but this race isn't.
AZ-06 is an incredibly competitive district — in past years, it's been decided by just a couple hundred votes. Now, Kirsten is in a near tie with her opponent.
We CANNOT allow Republicans to use voter suppression tactics to determine who wins this race. Every last vote should be counted, carefully and safely.
We're preparing for a big recount fight, but we won't be able to do it without you.
Our campaign needs the resources to be able to defend AZ-06 voters in a recount. With the outcome still uncertain, this could not be more important. Will you help us get this done by chipping in a little now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_VoteCounting]

name: Jennifer-Ruth Green
subject: Thank you from Jennifer-Ruth Green
body:
When we got in this race in July of 2021, no one believed in us. Indiana’s First Congressional District last elected a Republican
in 1928! Nearly 100 years! After 18 months campaigning, no one is doubting us now.

Jennifer-Ruth Green for Congress [http://email.email.jennifer-ruth.com/c/eJxtkE9rwzAMxT9Nc1uwFdtxDj700NLCGIyyFXYpiiK73pw_SzJKv_2SXnYZCJ7g6YmfRJfYuP1he7xPu6_TSb--DFh0x3TOUk-rx890-PDHb7iFs7qPN1u_vWfcYkyX-T6wI2wHjKHLogMBIKUUQmgAyCtJKGVdgbXKU-U3Sjxy-Sd3XfQ8Po0_8zWnvs2ujitkj8p4UUNJSFyUGkQpiYQvvIIsues8D9Om2G5gv9Q09yMGzkPfh8Q4xGndtBjtFKauGZfuP_R1gJuIixqoCysKjUoba4G4KqkCj_nQhWx0zXCLKcXJlAt4eICvqH-nr98xhSGhuESvm4Xby5o0spUZO2mMFUrqhb1xVtQCml-k0nP7]

Thank You

My Friends,

Last night is the beginning, not the end.

When we got in this race in July of 2021, no one believed in us. Indiana’s First Congressional District last elected a Republican
in 1928! Nearly 100 years! After 18 months campaigning, no one is doubting us now.

We came within 5 points. That is incredible in this district. And only possible because of all of you.

I called Congressman Mrvan last night to concede, I accept the verdict of the voters, and I trust this part of God’s plan.

I am grateful to have had this opportunity – above all because of the amazing people I’ve met in this process. It’s only
strengthened my belief in America, and the greatness of our country that is found in our people. We all know that Hoosiers, and
all Americans, deserve better, and we must keep fighting for them.

Nothing worth doing is ever easy, and changing a district that has voted one way for nearly a century doesn’t happen overnight.

In 1976, President Reagan lost the Republican nomination for President. On the plane back to California after the convention, he
told aides, “We dream. We fought. And the dream is still with us.”

And it started last night. We need to put a check on the failed policies of the Biden administration that have hurt our country so
badly.

In two years, we will have another chance to build on last night’s success and flip this district.

And maybe in the process, we’ve sent a message to Congressman Mrvan, and those like him, that he needs to represent us, not Nancy
Pelosi.

The days of Republicans NOT contesting this seat are OVER. The people of Northwest Indiana are good hardworking people who want to
go to work, provide for their families, and leave a better life for the children than the one they have. They deserve better.

Thank you again. From the bottom of my heart, I appreciate everything you have done for me, your prayers and your support.

God Bless you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Jennifer-Ruth Green

Republican for Congress

IN-01

|

| | Peter,

We’ve still got a lot of work ahead of us here in Georgia.

Rev. Warnock is officially advancing to a runoff.

body:
Post Election Recap with Rep Erik Mortensen

| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_red_wave_video&n=1)
---
# What Red Wave?!
## Post-Election Recap with Rep Erik Mortensen
**Wednesday, November 9th, 2022** Friend, Yesterday's election results sting...actually...the election results are extremely PAINFUL. To see voters reward Tim Walz and Democrats for what they've done to our freedoms is unconscionable. Sure, it was nice to see Con Artists like Julie Sandstede and Rob Ecklund go down in defeat, but the Democrats in total kept the MN House and took over control of the MN Senate. This was supposed to be a RED WAVE year!!! We're now going to be under complete DFL control in this state! And we know what the Democrats are going to do with that power. We dive into their statements on coming for our guns and spending our surplus money on today's show. **Also, the balance of power in the MN Senate came down to Senate District 41 where RINO Tony Jurgens, who lost the primary to Tom Dippel, ended up endorsing the Democrat candidate and threw the election. We play video of that betrayal in this show:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfMmUHV4QURd0RrCxV7RvVro_CkiqWWP774PB3x11w7NK_qRGh4ydtR9_Nhl74sWDew&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_red_wave_video&n=2)
# [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfMmUHV4QURd0RrCxV7RvVro_CkiqWWP774PB3x11w7NK_qRGh4ydtR9_Nhl74sWDew&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_red_wave_video&n=3)
I want to thank Rep Erik Mortensen for standing up for us and empowering the people to fight for their freedoms. He truly was unique up at the Capitol.
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_red_wave_video&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_red_wave_video&n=4)

| | This can't wait, friend: We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election. We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on Day One. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election. We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on Day One. body:
Hey everyone – if you weren’t aware, ballot curing is a very important step to ensure every vote is counted. Sometimes, voters can make errors in casting mail-in ballots. Mostly, it’s a ballot missing a signature or the signature doesn’t exactly match. | | | [](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=a173a50efe1b497b9657720e7230d86f&_e=zQZlqZb7flwHXElwyro1SGfz26UGJ1_T7VqSCHHXtH6Yo9kdFtaKaJw5a7SysZ-RNuRz00SZTeW5HKLmgVR4cCMetskajlcu9mZ-Jlpo2z05LBsKP83SGe4-K-nxioLAsWynyFeKKLHUkBaOY-kgDEfS52QD5VA0Uks1UbzEtnLJikIhsLCPjqAXER02VizQB_dPGjLI71_WN46hPnalkLfvJ9d314jYzy2FsXW57-crprzrO4Ea5MZB0xQcdQEBUDz58ZZhBvAz5tpOBmXcH4shdp9FUknqsxeKxLkDV_U7gPk014DMMaSxOyZPilVhAtx80rtx3ZkRpW3YvjKKrY-_MdkOe-QTYS5h0PbyOOosMJOO0JeBQauQQtWv4ivXdd7k28HLquIHkLSym9xiqqirf_lsqlbdiXcu5FkPw8I%3D)Hey everyone – if you weren’t aware, ballot curing is a very important step to ensure every vote is counted.Sometimes, voters can make errors in casting mail-in ballots. Mostly, it’s a ballot missing a signature or the signature doesn’t exactly match.Ballot curing is a procedure that notifies voters and allows them time to correct these issues.The procedure is simple; name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Preliminary Election Recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
We are standing strong and eagerly awaiting the count of election day ballots

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387958/378377441/1561815853?refcode=em_msg_2022.11.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTdiZjA2OC05ZjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WeiJfN04aM9_BgesXk-anlEQIfz5b1oKwQ7JCRxJbgc=&emci=69184ce2-9f5f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=797bf068-9f60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=12666102)
In many ways, the story of my family is the story of this district — my parents immigrated here to afford us a better life. And because of their hard work, I was able to go to college, become a doctor, and live my version of the American Dream. But for too many people in Colorado, that dream has slipped out of reach. Our District deserves a leader who will fight to restore access to the American Dream for working families — a leader who will not side with wealthy donors and special interests.

**Our community showed up and our voices were heard.** Together, we will fight to lower costs, make prescription drugs more affordable, make childcare and family leave more accessible, and fight for every person in America to, once again, have reproductive rights restored to them.

From my work as a pediatrician caring for our community, to fighting for working families in the state legislature, I have spent my life serving Colorado. It’s the honor of my lifetime to receive this vote of confidence to serve working families from Greeley to Commerce City in Washington. I look forward to doing the hard work to fight for working families across every part of the 8th Congressional District.

Thank you,

Yadira Caraveo

clean_body: | In many ways, the story of my family is the story of this district — my parents immigrated here to afford us a better life. And because of their hard work, I was able to go to college, become a doctor, and live my version of the American Dream. But for too many people in Colorado, that dream has slipped out of reach. Our District deserves a leader who will fight to restore access to the American Dream for working families — a leader who will not side with wealthy donors and special interests. Our community showed up and our voices were heard. Together, we will fight to lower costs, make prescription drugs more affordable, make childcare and family leave more accessible, and fight for every person in America to, once again, have reproductive rights restored to them. From my work as a pediatrician caring for our community, to fighting for working families in the state legislature, I have spent my life serving Colorado. It’s the honor of my lifetime to receive this vote of confidence to serve working families from Greeley to Commerce City in Washington. I look forward to doing the hard work to fight for working families across every part of the 8th Congressional District. Thank you, Yadira Caraveo **=** | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: VICTORY!
body:
Neighbors of all backgrounds and party affiliations believed in my #CommonSense campaign and in our shared vision of a prosperous, safe, and free America.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nijlutt-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, I am honored to have been elected as the next member of Congress in NY04. Neighbors of all backgrounds and party affiliations believed in my common sense campaign and in our shared vision of a prosperous, safe, and free America. As your next member of Congress, I will work tirelessly to serve the residents of New York's 4th Congressional District, and bring Long Island's hometown values to Washington, D.C. _**Thank you to all my fellow Long Islanders who have entrusted me with the sacred task of representing them in our nation 's capital -- I will not let you down.**_ Let's get to work,Anthony | [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nijlutt-iubikjttk-y/) | [ Share ](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-nijlutt-iubikjttk-j/) | [ Tweet ](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-nijlutt-iubikjttk-t/) | [ Forward ](https://despositoforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-iubikjttk-1C334D89-nijlutt-l-i)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Thank You
body:
It has truly been an honor... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Thank You](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-j/)
Redistricting had resulted in our congressional district becoming the toughest Republican-held seat in the nation outside California (a 9 point Biden district.) I'd hoped we could overcome that. We didn't. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [6 Days](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-d/)
Less than a week now from election day, and campaigns are in high gear. The stakes couldn't be any higher (unless of course it was a presidential election year.) You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [2 Weeks](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-u/)
The midterm election is now just two weeks away. The Democrats are in big trouble, and they know it. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Clear Choice](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tjjuklid-kujkulhluu-n/)
This year's critical election is only three weeks away now (and of course some people are already voting by absentee ballot or mail.) In this week's blog, I review some of the stark differences between my opponent and myself. Thank you for your support last year that allowed this people-powered movement to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate.
Thank you for your support as I work to better the lives of Georgians and Americans by fighting for our shared values and progress in the Senate.

But with this race headed to a runoff election, I'm counting on your continued support more than ever to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Thank you, Colorado.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-r/) Dear Peter, Tonight did not go the way we had hoped and prayed for, but I know this movement is real. This Mom on a Mission is proud to have given a voice to the army of mad moms, dads, and grandparents of Colorado who are scared about what the future of our beautiful state holds for our kids and grandkids.

Governor Polis, I wish you well, and my prayers will be with you. This election is over, but our problems are not. Crime in Colorado is real. Record inflation is real. The state of our education system is real. Please do not ignore the cries for help from so many in our state. I implore you to be a governor for all Coloradans and to seek consensus with those of us on the other side of the aisle, even when that may not be easy.

In scripture, we are told: "Weeping may endure for the night, but joy comes in the morning." - Psalm 30:5

I am a fighter. I'm not sure what my next chapter will be, but I promise I will never stop fighting for the American Dream I have been so blessed to live, and for Colorado families - so many of whom are struggling right now. You have a voice. Make sure those in power understand that the many decisions that they believe should occur in Denver should really be made at the kitchen table; Colorado parents and families matter.

Thank you to my supporters, volunteers, staff, my running mate Danny Moore, and my family for taking this journey with me. May God continue to bless you all and may God bless our home, Colorado.Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-y/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-j/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-t/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-i/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-d/) | Heidi for Governor
PO Box 754
Fort Lupton, CO 80621 Paid for by Heidi for Governor. Registered agent: Sam Schafer. [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qiluuiy-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-h) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qiluuiy-ttjjilthht-k/)

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

Let me be blunt with you.

But the truth is we are seeing...
* Gas prices at record highs
* Inflation at levels not seen for 40 years

And most Americans are struggling to make ends meet.

Meanwhile, government spending and home prices have **never been higher**. **Because both of them are at all-time highs.

Clearly this bubble cannot continue!

And to top this off...

We have a far-left Democrat in the White House who has **targeted retirees multiple times with INCREASED TAXES!**

The question is... do you really believe Biden won’t be able to _indirectly_ get your retirement savings?

By _continuing _to print dollars and eventually driving America into hyperinflation?

If this happens, it would be **disastrous for everyone with a stock and dollar-based retirement account!**

But the good news is... _You are not powerless!_

There is one strategy that can protect your retirement savings from...
* Stock crashes

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0080%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=f2VMB0y0Tgi0CVZ%2bWpj%2fLg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49016%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jVAExkCfreQb6JGExw35vA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49017%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XO%2f1u%2fNkkyY6vCyQTwCXeg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49018%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6sOzYcNPBJGwcCZcNi5LKA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Candace Owens
subject: I’ve received death threats… here’s why
body:
All because I am a Black woman with conservative values and because I believe that Black communities can overcome the victimhood
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgd1f0p7amk0funmp1udhfrqgs9uiaarib2edgoo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

Hello Friend,

I've dealt with racism before. . . I've even received death threats.

All because I am a Black woman with conservative values and because I believe that Black communities can overcome the victimhood mentality.

I've watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence for almost my entire life. Growing up, I remember being told I was "helpless."

This message -- which the media forces Black Americans to listen to -- is heartbreaking. _And it needs to stop_.

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum to promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthen the nuclear family, and foster a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

Our message to America's Black and minority communities is, _**" You don't have to be a victim."**_

[_**Will you please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission by helping me reach our goal of raising $50,000 from new online donors this month? You can **__**click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3ecfllb3aku75f39dtki1rboel8ssdn0qa9iuto_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

Black communities are taught to believe that we're victims, that nothing will ever change, that police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG! Giving up and becoming a victim is never the solution.

It's why BLEXIT is NOT just a "think tank," but a thoughtful and quick-acting "DO-tank." _**That 's all thanks to our BLEXIT State Chapters. **_

Our Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

Since 2019, BLEXIT has grown to reach 42 states with over 14,000 volunteers.

Friend, I am humbly asking you to support BLEXIT and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $50,000 this week to support our mission.

[_**Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjkv11kvo5ibv8uejt6vucqeneb7htob2bipa2no_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values.

BLEXIT Chapters promote and encourage others to seek alternative educational opportunities in their local communities. Educational opportunities for America's low-income and minority children and empower them to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty.

[_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_
](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs8p4rta9tr2rjfaq1cfblhp2c3na60vuj414h0g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
* Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers, and this ugly message is setting Black Americans back.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice.

BLEXIT Chapter members lead educational programs to help communities avoid incarceration and foster better relationships between police officers and urban communities.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7d615jd6e3p270ised7k6lp0fut0e0uk0ckn868_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

* Entrepreneurship: Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not just talking a big game. . . Our Chapter members are actually connecting with community individuals to make a real impact in urban communities.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf39ngoed0037rb94tqpmo8b8k6duu80p2kjq0to_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

* Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. Our urban communities must learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens.

It's why BLEXIT holds summer and after-school programs to teach children about these important lessons.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu7b0jk2p8b426nvt5ud6k94gg1geplqe34vdvp8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

* Presenting Our Message: The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. These are urban communities that others ignore, communities that rely on the mainstream media to write their narrative.

These aren't boring events, and we're not just preaching to the choir. They have music, art, and real conversations. Most importantly, they are fun!

These exciting events are brought to life because of our State Chapters. Their hard work and creativity help our message reach new people and inspires communities to be victors, not victims.

[_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztm8hd2ln0t0nnqrlb5okdf1o5hma5dsp6ldjofo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

This is personal to me -- I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood, but now I found my exit.

BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence forced upon us.**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by investing in our organization and helping us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this week. **Please click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zridbrv740nhlglh6tk6pdn2a9sag5lpaqmhdnp8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5dtbkmcekdeaips6g112uimhqn90n9ob1jf7jt0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg8a5jb0h2j36s4i5v2su20bd49qmn17nffjsj50_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9d407j78a779e4leq59mktehaifh12n9l2kd3rg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdb4b0sinfobfsdm93catjidknc8du2gtv6v3vs8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqu1bgthi8kelgc1r0mupq15vnoli14b3re4h15o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z195ehua4scdt9alcl5uljqgc6mtu36dlnpk0mm0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrc6sa9ang9rmdp3f7sf5pmcng068ikpluh942mg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdtll61qujn4m6cco89ouuoh3d8hqla832ltm6g8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ge8or5cth2bs)

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zca7qrdq46i7jeqtnquhoune4rk3m5lctr2t0fug_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3c3g61p33cljm49fg)

BLEXIT Chapters promote and encourage others to seek alternative educational opportunities in their local communities. Educational opportunities for America's low-income and minority children and empower them to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers, and this ugly message is setting Black Americans back. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Chapter members lead educational programs to help communities avoid incarceration and foster better relationships between police officers and urban communities. Entrepreneurship: Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not just talking a big game. . . Our Chapter members are actually connecting with community individuals to make a real impact in urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. Our urban communities must learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. It's why BLEXIT holds summer and after-school programs to teach children about these important lessons. Presenting Our Message: The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. These are urban communities that others ignore, communities that rely on the mainstream media to write their narrative. These aren't boring events, and we're not just preaching to the choir. They have music, art, and real conversations. Most importantly, they are fun! These exciting events are brought to life because of our State Chapters. Their hard work and creativity help our message reach new people and inspires communities to be victors, not victims. This is personal to me -- I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood, but now I found my exit. BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence forced upon us.If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by investing in our organization and helping us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this week. Please click below to send your gift.** The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens Co-Founder & President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

_**[Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson's new book Created Equal HERE >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834201:J4qW36GLN:m:1:3253819041:CAC09BDCD10A15079ADCC26BE515EECB:r "Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson’s new book Created Equal HERE >>>")**_

Thank you,

Elisa

body:

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z89bdljj9nnf0dp63hgt9b9h8ek32m6lhsa0keh0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geaoj1clh2bs)**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for standing for life
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r)
---
[** DONATE
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r)
---
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834238:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834239:JHKS36GNY:m:1:3317145305:5081051847C93E61DEC3DF8B615FD1EF:r)

The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-51794865855-echo7-820405C7A25810A5D4FC90B4E1D52198@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeabmdnu3bk8pa1ji5nd8amg3mclacnfheag70po_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic “escort” verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I’ll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdk9mdnb7lrf14c23ti13qh13g5iguqin4vhqiho_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs) Now, I’ll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act – a law that dates back to Bill Clinton’s pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark’s arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled “NOT GUILTY!” to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That’s why I’m asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That’s why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** “ _We can get to you. We can get to your family._ ”That’s their message. That’s the “street justice” they’re looking to inflict.And it’s that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won’t be easy. And it won’t be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo9emm7kov9fq3os1e1u7m123n3r0jsapm0ofqto_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs) The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general’s office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more – say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more – it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don’t have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from “Lady Justice” then the weaponization and the attacks won’t stop, _they’ll multiply._ So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjr5jjgu0g0kjoooggtd2va0iacj9u5g1dc11kpg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs), before it’s too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znegu45p6vmoq91fnt0qvcq967huajr85mut59l8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs)
---
P.S. There’s one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that’s why he was targeted. He doesn’t just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That’s why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). [**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z12ssc1es36hmhvjq7uk78l9a5i986d9ua7bpv98_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5fdk65h578ldtbgm8bcd231d2gl1j2k43phpiag_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjtsat0tb8thff6k57ebg86d1cfsiemd7eq9cta8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmllocg41a64tud2bepi02cblu3kavh7kisfa9qg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1geeo34cph2bs)
---

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61833048:6ugjJ6GNt:m:1:3350876382:E10BDF841066EB4B3001225AE63EDE89:r)**

Friend – Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call, we just got out of an emergency war-room meeting at the Cortez Masto campaign! Here’s the latest:
**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell and his allies overwhelmed the airwaves with more than $55 million in attack ads against Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (D–NV).
**THEN:** Politico called our race the closest in the country!
**NOW:** the final results are too close to call, votes are still being counted, and 2020 election denier Adam Laxalt has already said he would challenge the results of this election too!
**We MUST act swiftly and with extreme urgency to ensure every single vote is counted and to end this election-denying MAGA extremist once and for all. That’s why we've set a goal of $500,000 to help count every vote, but we need your support to get there.**
**[So please, before it's too late, will you split a donation between Catherine and Jacky Rosen to ensure every vote is counted in this must-win race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54390806/378388295/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2219-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWRhZDdjNC1mYjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbYVTkptPO9GnQL-Ak0Nl_UAipv3MiLalJ-Yevl1ez0=)**

That’s why we've set a goal of $500,000 to help count every vote, but we need your support to get there. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Catherine Cortez Masto and Jacky Rosen: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being by our side until the very end. subject: This race isn’t done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61833121:6_vUJ6G6N:m:1:3360412034:1BDA09D663E8B4B2ABB683F6B0C290B1:r)**

[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61833124:6_vUJ6G6N:m:1:3360412034:1BDA09D663E8B4B2ABB683F6B0C290B1:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61833121:6_vUJ6G6N:m:1:3360412034:1BDA09D663E8B4B2ABB683F6B0C290B1:r)**

Herschel Walker

| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**

I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you.

This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund.

Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives in a desperate attempt to keep Georgia blue.

**_[Can we count on you to make an emergency contribution to the runoff action fund and help us win the final race of 2022?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61834314:6eNya6GN6:m:1:3345639852:072B641598DC7A5EF933672E47B80CC1:r "Can we count on you

Nikki Haley
