name: Laurie Teper
subject: Thank you! / Sign Removal
body:
Team Geels,
Thank you volunteers for all the hard work you put in! We didn't win but we fought a good fight and made a difference in some people's minds for the better! It was a huge learning experience for me and out of my comfort zone, but it stretched me and I am grateful to have met so many wonderful people!!

If you put signs out, please pick them up. If you can drop them off at my house, 2833 Percussion Dr in Hillsborough, I would appreciate it. If not, I'll get them from you. If you didn't put any out but see them, please stop and get them. We have until November 19 to remove them. Supposedly there is a fine if they are left out.

We don't know what the future holds, but we know _who holds the future._

“And as for you, brothers and sisters, never tire of doing what is good.”
‭‭2 Thessalonians‬ ‭3‬:‭13‬ ‭NIV‬‬

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Director
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. name: Michael Peroutka
subject: Statement from Michael Peroutka
body:
|
---
**Dear Patriots and Friends,** **I would like to express my deep appreciation to those who worked so steadfastly on our campaign for Attorney General of Maryland.** **Your spirit of self-sacrifice and your commitment to moral, constitutional government testify to your fervent desire to “secure the Blessings of Liberty” for this and for future generations.** **During yesterday’s voting, many odd and suspicious incidents were reported by poll watchers, and more reports are being gathered today. Perhaps, like many others, you found it presumptuous that Wes Moore and Anthony Brown claimed victory before any results were posted on the official website. The local media obligingly concurred even though the first tallies were not yet reported. ** **I plan to investigate these strange occurrences and I do not plan to concede the race. ** **In the meanwhile, I promise you that our efforts to restore the American Constitutional Republic will not abate. We will continue to use every resource that The Almighty places into our service to “...proclaim liberty to all the earth, and to all the inhabitants thereof...” (2 Corinthians 3:17).** **More than a few Godly, constitutionally committed candidates were elected and we will follow and support their efforts to live out their oath of office.** **Meantime, please know that you have my respect and gratitude.** **Keep standing, brothers and sisters.** **And then...stand.** **With great affection and regard,** **Michael**
---

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Statement from Michael Peroutka
body:
Here you go:

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michael Peroutka <macky@patriots4peroutka.com>
Date: Nov 10, 2022 at 9:27:15 AM
Subject: Statement from Michael Peroutka
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Statement from Michael Peroutka
|
---
**Dear Patriots and Friends,** **I would like to express my deep appreciation to those who worked so steadfastly on our campaign for Attorney General of Maryland.** **Your spirit of self-sacrifice and your commitment to moral, constitutional government testify to your fervent desire to “secure the Blessings of Liberty” for this and for future generations.** **During yesterday’s voting, many odd and suspicious incidents were reported by poll watchers, and more reports are being gathered today. Perhaps, like many others, you found it presumptuous that Wes Moore and Anthony Brown claimed victory before any results were posted on the official website. The local media obligingly concurred even though the first tallies were not yet reported. ** **I plan to investigate these strange occurrences and I do not plan to concede the race. ** **In the meanwhile, I promise you that our efforts to restore the American Constitutional Republic will not abate. We will continue to use every resource that The Almighty places into our service to “...proclaim liberty to all the earth, and to all the inhabitants thereof...” (2 Corinthians 3:17).** **More than a few Godly, constitutionally committed candidates were elected and we will follow and support their efforts to live out their oath of office.** **Meantime, please know that you have my respect and gratitude.** **Keep standing, brothers and sisters.** **And then...stand.** **With great affection and regard,** **Michael**
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: I’ve received death threats… here’s why
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTHfWOOgJhDe76WFuYPK_ezT1caIlsYCsEWUpcnxTXlyOzkzojP5cFIeFhIKJnlXZG9LQc3WMBLdcolbFBW41_eDyFV9JDZcxUd4ceymeM-9EJZjFbIRRBIkdOBoqXTSSDAo16QXjLpZL2nVM2q-lELY%3D)

Hello Friend,

I’ve dealt with racism before. . . I’ve even received death threats.

All because I am a Black woman with conservative values and because I believe that Black communities can overcome the victimhood mentality.

I’ve watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence for almost my entire life. Growing up, I remember being told I was “helpless.”

This message — which the media forces Black Americans to listen to — is heartbreaking. _And it needs to stop_.

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum to promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthen the nuclear family, and foster a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

Our message to America’s Black and minority communities is, _**“You don’t have to be a victim.”**_

[_**Will you please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission by helping me reach our goal of raising $50,000 from new online donors this month? You can**_ _**click here to donate >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTKZI1LeFqlqmuKHBZaqdRohQi13g0Ktdl06AEaOR3wPdCiUwUr4goLTDQtyom_JwLGk7S2pGTodgsa-5tQgbC9Lw_OcRzUqhFlOOyImhfsxOZ5I9n80CcavgIwZRcST9Kdt1mMPLnCZXUZUU7jdpzfg%3D)

Black communities are taught to believe that we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, that police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG! Giving up and becoming a victim is never the solution.

It’s why BLEXIT is NOT just a “think tank,” but a thoughtful and quick-acting “DO-tank.” _**That’s all thanks to our BLEXIT State Chapters. **_

Our Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

Since 2019, BLEXIT has grown to reach 42 states with over 14,000 volunteers.

Friend, I am humbly asking you to support BLEXIT and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $50,000 this week to support our mission.

[_**Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTKdATAHH5-ntfUEEhTdO1Uaqknb6SVI3rJxznfiNqZ0912cj-U3V0OWExYOe6TRHpvpELgzryW16QBkb4_YMArKL6-tK5LSFvPwTRzqstYtf4D-ZuhhT0Zrd5uBzCrjFgqNFqn26mXnXI0KINVld-SM%3D)

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values.

BLEXIT Chapters promote and encourage others to seek alternative educational opportunities in their local communities. Educational opportunities for America’s low-income and minority children and empower them to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty.

[_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_
](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTOJYM3zwQflw03s8jbZmUhTVMzHnxSW4KfGHpbsp5TYLowdedSRcOifAD9ng5gLuxoqzQdx58QZ3UQ22tZx0KHDFr6BkzOHEREp7_zIA1Uh0QQM9f671j57C8NpuyXSyMuyUHhyJ62dyrhwITkXqyqQ%3D)
* Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers, and this ugly message is setting Black Americans back.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice.

BLEXIT Chapter members lead educational programs to help communities avoid incarceration and foster better relationships between police officers and urban communities.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTBUZ7UHWAMPQnm3YOV2SB2Vc-IO_VjPafMKYouQQdBhuvjl0qiyyLtxaZoiB8V8WYLagOgXms51cVTuDehZCnK3GjyUIBccc7VSAxa8YaKc1OamiEWoZFxd1FKEm9T0ci5gNzQYzHwp5w2-vj0BlETA%3D)

* Entrepreneurship: Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not just talking a big game. . . Our Chapter members are actually connecting with community individuals to make a real impact in urban communities.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTJnEuwNul7AfzSSXrn-BUhUqIKJwPAbu6G2EmSWsw59-wERE_sKv1SlZ5NMYfbsQEWXq8zuzw96RZ935-DKe5qCz8D_R7mx24XmG_cCOGZW2g_nQLGlnD2JXKCDlGz9q7hV-lNU6EIWleR9fWmSEdaQ%3D)

* Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. Our urban communities must learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens.

It’s why BLEXIT holds summer and after-school programs to teach children about these important lessons.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59dd78221f364f4aa5e5c5427b2b7faa&_e=q--w-cJTydsSvjqr4P7oOcnDQ1F4RenyCpyIAjVOdOEZCzd4dQU3tA5hpNg7MhJ3UMAgcC26x2X_kOj4NSQD2NH3g8ovz-SjqStDIBQ6T7Opzy-MG6_b4kkBdPHQlQDLCNDznYBAZkCNuJBf0j2RTHctZ_3VCE-89Utk2JONE6aji2luZuNBIwxTy48PgmZt0-sLPjvvIXT6snSdxEwYwVVrtEg2MpjHw84iQ0Dz0TAKzuApPZTq0JL5qD9yvFeNL1XXfOVsUhdtsoqnnvvr2LzHl9Qdip-dV8wXTLWjG3M%3D)

* Presenting Our Message: The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. These are urban communities that others ignore, communities that rely on the mainstream media to write their narrative.

These aren’t boring events, and we’re not just preaching to the choir. They have music, art, and real conversations. Most importantly, they are fun!

These exciting events are brought to life because of our State Chapters. Their hard work and creativity help our message reach new people and inspires communities to be victors, not victims.

clean_body: Hello Friend, I’ve dealt with racism before. . . I’ve even received death threats. All because I am a Black woman with conservative values and because I believe that Black communities can overcome the victimhood mentality. I’ve watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence for almost my entire life. Growing up, I remember being told I was “helpless.” This message — which the media forces Black Americans to listen to — is heartbreaking. And it needs to stop. I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum to promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthen the nuclear family, and foster a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Our message to America’s Black and minority communities is, “You don’t have to be a victim.” Black communities are taught to believe that we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, that police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG! Giving up and becoming a victim is never the solution. It’s why BLEXIT is NOT just a “think tank,” but a thoughtful and quick-acting “DO-tank.” That’s all thanks to our BLEXIT State Chapters. Our Chapters spread the universal principles of the movement at the local, grassroots level through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. Since 2019, BLEXIT has grown to reach 42 states with over 14,000 volunteers. Friend, I am humbly asking you to support BLEXIT and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $50,000 this week to support our mission. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT Chapters promote and encourage others to seek alternative educational opportunities in their local communities. Educational opportunities for America’s low-income and minority children and empower them to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers, and this ugly message is setting Black Americans back. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Chapter members lead educational programs to help communities avoid incarceration and foster better relationships between police officers and urban communities. Entrepreneurship: Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not just talking a big game. . . Our Chapter members are actually connecting with community individuals to make a real impact in urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. Our urban communities must learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. It’s why BLEXIT holds summer and after-school programs to teach children about these important lessons. Presenting Our Message: The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. These are urban communities that others ignore, communities that rely on the mainstream media to write their narrative. These aren’t boring events, and we’re not just preaching to the choir. They have music, art, and real conversations. Most importantly, they are fun! These exciting events are brought to life because of our State Chapters. Their hard work and creativity help our message reach new people and inspires communities to be victors, not victims. This is personal to me — I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood, but now I found my exit. BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence forced upon us.If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by investing in our organization and helping us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this week. Please click below to send your gift.** The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens Co-Founder & President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akhjdkl-yuhdluddtl-r/) Election Day has come to a close, and I wanted to reach out and say **thank you so much** for supporting my campaign.**Winning is just the first step, now it's time to lead. **Our country is facing a lot of challenges, but with my new Republican colleagues, I am confident we can find the necessary solutions to return our nation to prosperity.I look forward to continuing to serve you and getting back to work to bring down inflation, gas prices, and crime rates. subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75288358813e4727b2d09490c8d7c4f5&_e=uNsOR2J53Di66oJON0_Sj99RIbEfojHQ1h5znELse44mBN2wLt7SoSUDbmyQEFREfDqWzrzYJAtqidXu2cqKUMxbwAH2t60ZkEs-L4PfcHeOQvumRTJ9RBLCTZPoPNydbfQxzGhAwS-FQ20JMaw_Qa4wzmgMFtKoC_j1SmOmB72-NJlkHvXcWRvNYNS4KicIQTvJmYk9X0Rl7hU8ymcdRcSzBROuCaamveaj5VGrDjf-mdUS0r9QO2tFLI4Rfx2i6mu4TthaFKr4taH_6QAPuuSdwUZWYwZ8FB6zsCDR5AA%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!

That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. clean_body: Too close to call – we need to count every last vote. Friend, Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Martin Heinrich and Catherine Cortez Masto: | | = = | = = | = = My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election. With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted. But our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:= Thank you so much. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

subject: This race isn’t over

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c81410%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=da7QZG1yUKCHsCQBHaYJ7A&sysid=1)**

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838695:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838696:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838697:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838698:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838695:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838695:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838695:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838695:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838699:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838700:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838701:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838702:JUVbZ6GNs:m:1:3331421248:19B32773FB7BFC371B26FF827676709C:r)

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you_.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.
**We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign coffers.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54405190/378457263/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2218-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjU2ZmMxOS0xOTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0DXDdCdx4ssvzsBJ-MRzO-1juH4f7sVg4rYk4y-WiyI=)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything it's got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise to fight back against the GOP's megadonors, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Jacky Rosen to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54405198/378457271/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2218-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjU2ZmMxOS0xOTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0DXDdCdx4ssvzsBJ-MRzO-1juH4f7sVg4rYk4y-WiyI=)**
Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=OP%2Fzyijt%2BBqbOjLmKXQEYtS9veR5pCpzwGUkLVSAp75XQKENv5WE33ykpm6rd63J1hG2h%2B4hu36HJJjcdHgWWn20908CPjsZk7SHMmjB8aYksYDZr9nNJ2oFYABA7HClLs1%2F9QNOEHK4BJ6Cr%2BSo6dfwPdJa5DEiDTZCO%2FE%2FkRFCusslymiE043zAPinGCWsSJi0EyfkTDgJbd5BMAsMSOlewg2y9e3jJR6oztEeQsv3oB0luyuJq1fKSpHDQGhshwFIGVIWNILy1WMtnU9abT3367oO3E%2Btuo9M6jNxDPmccHEXt5F8D%2BWLndx9XfaQhCI3LFsur5XkM1nlEO8AaVQLcxxiHvZd%2B9I8rOznm1Zkq%2BZ2GrWX9cAGN9tKmhtFibqKQEdRnKFNPYeAr%2Bu17CYdw3%2BkRBOiW65C5sy6A18%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

subject: We’re not done yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6156dqh9tqhetgrmgr0f8jtk32fknq0uiveec3o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ie9or4cjh2bs)**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn8e9d135230oo18g7jehvjpmmj54msjc5k7vdig_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ie9or4cjh2bs)
[** RUSH $5 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9cedhkgb9e8avafilve41t13rp2q9docs15ugv8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ie9or4cjh2bs)
[** RUSH $10 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvlbb9a9f3a8b1l4bhjung59ldmrljckdqp73c4o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1ie9or4cjh2bs)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert could still lose to Democratic candidate, Adam Frisch, so we’re keeping (a totally reasonable) hope alive!
body:
Still hoping for Colorado
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T080c2a35-042b-4a15-9edd-23050720f30b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[With Your Help, Lauren Boebert's Going Down! Rush any amount to support the Colorado vote counting.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T392855ba-6747-4f62-9fa7-83289a4df1f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **You may remember that by looking at the state she was running in (Colorado, pro-voting rights), district (+5-6 Republican lean, not the +15-25 of the other members of the Thorazine Caucus in the House) and her talented opponent in Adam Frisch and her general insanity, this was one of our longshot picks at Blue Amp Action for a surprise win. (We also picked some duds, we sure ain't claiming perfection).** **_WE. ARE. THIS. CLOSE. _**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Count Every Vote**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b440f97-2372-4177-aa15-073a3620f9e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_They're still counting ballots, with Frisch up by less than 100 votes. BUT, the areas left to count are heavily pro-Frisch, he will almost definitely pull it out by 1,500-2,500 votes. BUT! If it's less than .5% there's an automatic recount, and if it's more, Boebert can pay for one. And as a chaos, Boebert would demand a recount if she were down 57%, it'd just be fleecing her cultists some more. _** **[So Blue Amp Action is asking you to please join us in ensuring Frisch has the resources he needs for lawyers, staffers, etc in the coming recount. Boebert's a blight on The House. Replacing her with a member who'll be a leader on the Democratic side isn't just addition by subtraction, but exponentially better for policy and our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1baae7d3-6bb0-4d92-9a60-202a02cfb3f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks for staying in the fight, my friends,** **Cliff**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, You may remember that by looking at the state she was running in (Colorado, pro-voting rights), district (+5-6 Republican lean, not the +15-25 of the other members of the Thorazine Caucus in the House) and her talented opponent in Adam Frisch and her general insanity, this was one of our longshot picks at Blue Amp Action for a surprise win. (We also picked some duds, we sure ain't claiming perfection). WE. ARE. THIS. CLOSE. | | | | | | | | They're still counting ballots, with Frisch up by less than 100 votes. BUT, the areas left to count are heavily pro-Frisch, he will almost definitely pull it out by 1,500-2,500 votes. BUT! If it's less than .5% there's an automatic recount, and if it's more, Boebert can pay for one. And as a chaos, Boebert would demand a recount if she were down 57%, it'd just be fleecing her cultists some more. Thanks for staying in the fight, my friends, Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset. If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. Peter,
Herschel Walker and far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock are going to a RUNOFF.
_**This race is going to decide the future of our country, Peter, and we cannot afford to have any dedicated patriots like you sit on the sidelines.**_
_**ALL gifts are 1000%-MATCHED for ONE HOUR ONLY. **_
Please, the future of our country is on the line, and we desperately need your support.
**************[CLAIM 1000%-MATCH >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838133:6Tnlt6GN6:m:1:3345639852:EA438569625702F05AC0B5C5B43483D2:r)**************

Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2fd2474bae14de5a266f93b3a396267&_e=p39CPN93mTRiqxiPoL1z5WNwYx2jBMNQup_EJYNBpKE0T8xOzu6wwdvt4GmGDsr8IkOA__ScQew03hHqaHg_TEimKo22FjnDO7N8thWmtyeUGkYxjX6HvNIWfYufsRQWNN9wSW1zrORp5AewzyqLgBTnWcekm5OsqlI8vyxSG5VIILduT3T9ist-DQauVWe0ZOBdFmjbYISXC7cXJGPlsFJ00RdOQZMGeOumeADAHN-aQ5EkqPvELyE4EqellE_65ISYKeUfyno-DwY5uxZz5mCva1khGwXy7VZm7OtmfS8djhB9jYJbK7qbbdiUYVcb)

I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2fd2474bae14de5a266f93b3a396267&_e=p39CPN93mTRiqxiPoL1z5WNwYx2jBMNQup_EJYNBpKE0T8xOzu6wwdvt4GmGDsr8IkOA__ScQew03hHqaHg_TEimKo22FjnDO7N8thWmtyeUGkYxjX6HvNIWfYufsRQWNN9wSW1zrORp5AewzyqLgN279CWfrpxT-eN-K1iTtMFvTI1fELC6qaTfe7Z0ShRQ-BdhaQ3x1wCr9BcTl_Q-7PsSPEZz9OflZewz1hv7S0uN6va8prtYBXd-RGsz4qDoFKZ5qr_RVk9Gb6sfJEmrRke48ze1Te9d_ufSDw8Xw_3IGXx8Fw1jphzDadlY9MMI)
---
[Get your book now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2fd2474bae14de5a266f93b3a396267&_e=p39CPN93mTRiqxiPoL1z5WNwYx2jBMNQup_EJYNBpKE0T8xOzu6wwdvt4GmGDsr8IkOA__ScQew03hHqaHg_TEimKo22FjnDO7N8thWmtyeUGkYxjX6HvNIWfYufsRQWNN9wSW1zrORp5AewzyqLgPklouqc4K5DejVQw6WM8FrmD8LXIaeqLYSI7cXWQubRFVZN9QpgjMZG5_jxy2PLpn3FDGVU3Il-018DqzG1ir1OjgM966qd3vgzaBK-ZlLo0JDzJi7w5OE3Kyz698fuAAtQPxDGDtiNPvp3pcFElHl6yLSLUb1dJ1-mBSVfyUl7)

Friend, I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2fd2474bae14de5a266f93b3a396267&_e=p39CPN93mTRiqxiPoL1z5WNwYx2jBMNQup_EJYNBpKE0T8xOzu6wwdvt4GmGDsr8IkOA__ScQew03hHqaHg_TEimKo22FjnDO7N8thWmtyeUGkYxjX6HvNIWfYufsRQWNN9wSW1zrORp5AewzyqLgPUd3jc6VJEnzOrgnNYHGdGZq2xjPDkXd89j46H_csOibL0s00cYT0cPSumKM57mONjN9tExTOcVMn3F0RNnglvhoTOCa6Xgigqfxqjt5eg89lzVvGROgRkX7G-5a1mh3SwUgTUgiQxbCvzYsk0TUk5niwtTvDPMTqTnvWLRTF4p)
---
[Get your book now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2fd2474bae14de5a266f93b3a396267&_e=p39CPN93mTRiqxiPoL1z5WNwYx2jBMNQup_EJYNBpKE0T8xOzu6wwdvt4GmGDsr8IkOA__ScQew03hHqaHg_TEimKo22FjnDO7N8thWmtyeUGkYxjX6HvNIWfYufsRQWNN9wSW1zrORp5AewzyqLgDekEndkCpypIowHGez7Co1Ib1zOxBodXq86LiVy8QAOY3uDE0QyJcY5PszmMGx-9G1iw4ZoWq2mYrFh6-iVcuXEKJM36f4i0VT_usxnEky2Sjfi0JPavHuv522cGXRQHYuxy4PAYlCv4GpIkovxKt7yuOmpYA_NSXyfTE6rrvsj)
---
If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838834:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838835:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838836:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838837:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838834:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838834:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838834:6DTgt6GNI:m:1:3369487795:D796149DA6BB213987B0CB97F74CC7C3:r)

Herschel Walker

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61833569:Jes4t6GNt:m:1:3372944669:80156FCE553D3BBF5A09B143F2291CE4:r)**

subject: Overtime in Georgia 🚨

body:
|
---
| | |
**[THERE'S NOT A SECOND TO SPARE BETWEEN NOW AND DECEMBER 6](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837174:60toX6GbN:m:1:3350876382:BCAACAAF1942E74AB4B17455C37B31F6:r "THERE’S NOT A SECOND TO SPARE BETWEEN NOW AND DECEMBER 6")**

body:
| | | | theresacoatesellis posted: " Thank you Manassas City residents for casting your vote on Election Day for my re-election to Manassas City Council! I was top vote-getter for the entire City! My family joined me today for support and helped win more votes! There’s so much more t" [Theresa Coates Ellis for Council](https://theresacoatesellis.com)
---|---
# [Top vote-getter! Theresa wins re-election to Manassas City Council.](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/11/10/top-vote-getter-theresa-wins-re-election-to-manassas-city-council/)
| | theresacoatesellis Nov 10
---|---
Thank you Manassas City residents for casting your vote on Election Day for my re-election to Manassas City Council! I was top vote-getter for the entire City! My family joined me today for support and helped win more votes!
There’s so much more to do for you as your Councilwoman! I am honored to have the opportunity to serve you for 4 more years! And as I promised, fight hard for you and now across the isles every meeting.
Now let’s get to work — on these high tax bills, excellence in education, our 150th birthday as a City, creating good jobs, supporting small business, and keeping our neighborhoods safe — to start.
I am so impressed with the candidates and families who committed to run this cycle and thank them for stepping up and making Manassas a better place.
Unofficial results are in! Congrats to all the top winning candidates including Sara Brescia for Manassas City School Board! I look forward to working with them for the benefit of the City.
# #ThriveTogether

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: I will always be grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Trudy. Now that votes have been counted and the dust has settled, I want to take a moment to personally thank you.
Even though we came up short Tuesday, that doesn't make the work that we did any less meaningful. One supporter, one donation, one dollar at a time, we built a movement of people who believe in compassion, honest leadership, and a better future for the people of Missouri.
Being your nominee has been the greatest honor of my life. **Thank you for standing with me, for supporting this campaign, and for all that you've done to help choose decency over extremism.**
I know that this loss is hard. And I know that thinking about what the future might hold is scary. **But underneath all the fear, disappointment, and anger, I have so much hope, Peter.**
Watching this team build a top-tier U.S. campaign from the ground up has shown me the power of passionate, open-hearted people like you. **Trust me on this: Even though we hear a lot about the greed, hatred, and division hurting our country, there is _so much more_ kindness, empathy, and integrity.** I've seen it in the communities I've traveled to on this campaign, the voters I've met, and every single member of this grassroots team.
I will always be grateful for how you stood beside this campaign and believed in our movement. **Together, we showed the cynics, the partisans, and pundits that kindness is something worth fighting for. **
I have only one more thing to ask of you: Please, please never give up that fight for a kinder, brighter future. Together, I know that we will win. From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
With humility, incredible gratitude, and love,

Trudy
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: It’s a great day to be an Illinois Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Thank you.
#
Peter, it’s a great day to be an Illinois Democrat.
We’re still waiting for results to determine control of Congress, but Democrats performed better than expected — and in Illinois, we have a lot to celebrate.
Voters turned out and re-elected my friend and partner in the Senate, Tammy Duckworth.
We now get to welcome new Democrats to Washington like Nikki Budzinski, Delia Ramirez, and Eric Sorensen, and welcome back our returning Democratic champions like Reps. Sean Casten, Bill Foster, and Lauren Underwood.
Our full slate of statewide Democrats, from Governor JB Pritzker to Attorney General Kwame Raoul, will return to Springfield and keep fighting to make Illinois a better place for our families.
Last but not least, Illinois became the first state to enshrine workers’ rights in our state constitution.
We still have some work ahead of us, but I wanted to take a moment to show my gratitude. Every dollar you’ve donated, phone call you’ve made to voters, hour volunteered, or vote cast has made a difference — and I am proud of the progress we’re making together. Thank you.
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvorforl9tpigqraoe22dl186jssv4cq6mtga8j0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shg64pj2cth2bs)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: It all comes down to Herschel
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4fceb52e07&e=fdefed58de)
Peter,It is all going to come down to Herschel Walker. If we want to take back the Senate we desperately need to win the Georgia race that has gone to a runoff.My brother Herschel has 26 days to save our nation. If we take the Senate then Biden has no more agenda. Literally no chance. It’s over.As you know, though, the media has gone full-court press against Herschel. I set up Right Hook PAC in September so that I can support candidates up and down the ballot who are brave, bold and fearless.We are allowed to donate up to $5,000 in support of any campaign that we support. I need your help. I’m going to put in $1,200 of my own money - and I‘m going to try and raise $5,000 via my PAC to also give to his campaign.If you’ve already max donated to Herschels’s campaign - you can still donate to Right Hook PAC and we can donate that money to Herschel’s campaign.**So, click the link below and let’s support what is truly our last best hope of taking back the Senate in 2022. We can’t rest easy on this one. If we LOSE this race, Biden holds the Senate and we are SCREWED!**
| [DONATE: SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4eb9eb9ff1&e=fdefed58de)
---
In the name of Liberty,Lavern SpicerFounder, Right Hook PAC

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to overtime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2g3ks71jqftaa7okt1gdd5llu2tsj3qsgnl09d0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1kc4p3ct726pjjbc75clrrbcr466om6cr5m1qj9o9ncjgn9pjhedjm9cj662oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32dpl63jrcoj666qbbc37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6o74c1h6apb0c8iv0)

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia 's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3jg1mcst0o0r8kgobgiqi8obbb3e6vkq5pfcggo_rp22sh2s8i66or0shg64pb5c1h2bs)**

Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zae5rptct39p3v0pi6ovldnq9vonm6auquerc658_rp22sh2s8i66or0shg64pb5c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

subject: We did it!

body:
I am endlessly grateful for your support and will never stop advocating for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54410370/378476654/-1389333690?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTVkYzZmMi0yNzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcEvQRzHLmERJCPP_-eB9fPfAC9EcO3NJhAmwU0boPs=)
---
| Peter –

**The results are in: I have officially been re-elected to continue representing Pennsylvania’s Seventh District in Congress.**

I want to start by saying **thank you** to this incredible team. Every person who chipped in, knocked on a door, made a phone call, or turned out to vote made a real difference in this critical race.

I know the grit, determination, and strength of this district. I have carried it with me into the halls of Congress. I will work with anyone, regardless of party, to improve the lives of working people in our community. Together we can, and will, build a future worthy of the promise of our commonwealth and our country.

It has been the honor of a lifetime to serve as your Representative, and it is even more of an honor to earn your trust to continue that service. **I am endlessly grateful for your support and will never stop advocating for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country.**

Sincerely,
Susan Wild

clean_body: I am endlessly grateful for your support and will never stop advocating for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country. | = | Peter – The results are in: I have officially been re-elected to continue representing Pennsylvania’s Seventh District in Congress. I want to start by saying thank you to this incredible team. Every person who chipped in, knocked on a door, made a phone call, or turned out to vote made a real difference in this critical race. I know the grit, determination, and strength of this district. I have carried it with me into the halls of Congress. I will work with anyone, regardless of party, to improve the lives of working people in our community. Together we can, and will, build a future worthy of the promise of our commonwealth and our country. It has been the honor of a lifetime to serve as your Representative, and it is even more of an honor to earn your trust to continue that service. I am endlessly grateful for your support and will never stop advocating for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country. Sincerely, Susan Wild | = | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | Peter,

Rev. Warnock is going to a runoff, and we don't have much time to reach Democrats across the state to make sure they turn out to vote again.

We’re running low on resources after laying it all on the line on Tuesday, and we need YOUR help to replenish our supplies after we worked so hard for the last several months.

**_[We have less than ONE MONTH to keep Georgia blue, and we’re going to need a surge in resources to make it through the runoff. Can we count on you to rush a donation RIGHT NOW to ensure we have the critical resources we need to re-elect Rev. Warnock?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54391057/378389555/710125701?refcode=20221110.1_PSD_11BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2JlNWY4Yy1mZjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjNZxutAXgVrwlQ2IqOYwRo86zJp54N8z-EtBE9OgzY=)_**

Our work’s not over yet. We need to continue to fuel our voter outreach program to ensure that every single strong Democrat in Georgia knows that our fight isn’t over until December 6th.

– GA Dems

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

name: The Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Proud of our candidates.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Breaking down last night’s results.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54411172/378478946/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjNiMGRlMS0yOTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nZ-NN2SM1OnBD0OYTHvSQAaBRrpbyyM_8FkPzcoq0BA=) | Hey team,

The 2022 midterms are about wrapped up. While we had some disappointing losses, we secured some crucial wins for Ohioans.

Democrats faced an onslaught of corporate cash, illegal, GOP-gerrymandered maps, and widespread lies and misinformation by Republicans in Ohio _and_ nationwide. **But despite those obstacles, there were silver linings in the results.**

We saw some crucial Democratic wins: Emilia Sykes and Marcy Kaptur won in two of Republicans' top-targeted House seats. And Greg Landsman defeated Rep. Steve Chabot to flip OH-01 blue. These leaders won because they spoke to the needs of everyday Ohioans and delivered for their communities.

We’ll use that success and momentum to build, organize, and continue fighting for Ohioans in the coming weeks, months, and years.

We want to thank the thousands of people who stepped up over the last year and volunteered, donated, and voted. We are immensely grateful and proud of our candidates who fought tooth and nail to deliver for working families across our state.

We owe it all to this incredible team of grassroots supporters. We wouldn’t have made it this far without your unwavering support.

Sincerely,

The Ohio Democratic Party

| 697 East Broad Street
Suite 101
Columbus, Ohio 43215
---

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child can achieve their American dream.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters – and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith.
My parents showed me the meaning of hard work – and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. Thanks to their support, I became the first in my family to earn a college degree. Now, thanks to this grassroots team, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child can achieve their American dream.
**But I'll be honest: With experts saying this runoff election could decide Senate control ****– and time running out before our midnight fundraising deadline –****the only way I can keep this seat blue and win our critical fight for justice is with your urgent help.** **[So I’m personally asking, friend: Will you donate $5 or more right now to help me defend my seat, keep the Senate blue, and secure a better, brighter future for Georgia and our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54391547/378391853/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4863-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTMwOWJhYS0wMDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZtiBmrDf9T07R5zhll9nucoBKvVnQNgL5AyO51m9MyE=)**

The midterms may be over, but our work in Virginia is just beginning.

|

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to see Stacey Abrams win in Georgia, if you want to see Val Demings win in Florida, if you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8RavRafYZ_xyerpXgYuTDZ4GQF6TTlrZPFIMjw4_U6dUJf8Qurw7dC6sk6sLIU64e4XNlSkgyujmmv1Vh2JBWo32QwfCiKNRF2Yq7b6PV-uFP1fAJgKeLMav2oZJiQvfPwxCXGX6OappMs8w6HX9wF2YOto21ZjT8Tn2Kxhphgvqi9LB1Q5iTdVs-QUod_g3fst-rpKa57_ks2CFYwywsgkW1kRc-1azjVHvI4DKWDD-JqKPpUrDdw2FLgDo_4nJXt1YJ_FiuwwA86-6fGEBjVPWEdChkGwr0aoRH7gQmSV6/3r1/cbhhRErlTbKmy03R7kAk5A/h0/ZNejcVFIX9yZgKDeuvc3xe16Z2QwUHXXLX_fYA8vGy0) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRLW7WewtaMAgieIybrdNIXyV28eeNTqLxpCjAYozHxSLp8m9zblzLa9ITwIBoHZZQOCSNbKe46sigRpJHNzLq-LOcsOUzxMjRdJxEWlpVkS677Ou1wSQKQOjFqM81KzQbJoJXI_kC05AVbWQFA-Biew1ca7CH-FQWwIUBfTuj5sQHyu56ns35nTnD_dcM8A_6QTDoEAQePEfW6fe47kSK0f48WMUJF311t06nIBu-npelyF6-G_Rv900Eer6u8SxhFZ-uoRZ6SGWXJAVmvzH_CY_mFZ6BNuFCw2VTUVmKwiA7DKJVKp7ykwo0oAIZBOWP6iFg5RUDosesDiocdWR0wdYwaTAp8ZomXXoeD16LH-I/3r1/cbhhRErlTbKmy03R7kAk5A/h1/oFVGIcB0TKRvQuk-8TRRtD6QG_vfr2gHTNZL7ijR09U) Peter, I just want to say _thank you_.

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly:**[Will you split $10 between me and The Collective PAC right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRLW7WewtaMAgieIybrdNIXyV28eeNTqLxpCjAYozHxSLp8m9zblzLa9ITwIBoHZZQOCSNbKe46sigRpJHNzLq-PR95Vu1DBaJgrAfJFXGYf95vu9ay6X-95GH0orWuISBtWX4c7xAjQmQi6uqjKz80T70IDUyuxohaudXQEHmS-NJJJ5gM1wgDYR1Vsa4IK2sOLQAthuP3aW_2WVmbESi6VBeNs2teVHQCO7LAxuCMvZRat_dYs1L3es57hErrEGYMQaVpdcaL-r3-uogF4tF9GRIMu5Sy6T73FxT45BXSCfwj111LNU6r4RCtOPh9-2Ng-E6FC8nM7QJqPfS16MeqW2JCQav27RI96pm_KhepjM/3r1/cbhhRErlTbKmy03R7kAk5A/h2/R3u8hwQQV--xH_SioC52o_drH3HMs9HhOTz4M5FQCN8)**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $10 or more right now between me and The Collective PAC to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRLW7WewtaMAgieIybrdNIXyV28eeNTqLxpCjAYozHxSLp8m9zblzLa9ITwIBoHZZQOCSNbKe46sigRpJHNzLq-MMiCHFm9jjd4TYLISJMiTiNH5Pd-mAK840ZHw928sjDmKUSyvC3qIVjZZV01_zu6O_nXecdHoSr45fZyeuqVouZTe6916lh_43MpzbchfkaoJkFjxH1x22guqIMS2_4mobpXfhMhetXaS1fZqr1fLgIJz6FH2P3afJ9JHxMH0tjxrW9Uqnieqxo2fYPPn9exsZZCe7qvSCJx6GOYCGjmec-0CHlYje1M19hJBcmr5ZWdzTwvZPxGtJdBCK5Gxqu0VmKoKLy-SkS30dO5R7pbpk/3r1/cbhhRErlTbKmy03R7kAk5A/h3/r1JXBgDn-gxynRE5MTG0NfM0g34ahxUe-xOshdN9nXA)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Raphael Warnock and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to see Stacey Abrams win in Georgia, if you want to see Val Demings win in Florida, if you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I just want to say thank you. Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. That's why I'm asking directly: When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red. That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Raphael Warnock and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for your support. — Rev. Raphael Warnock | Thank you for your continued support of The Collective PAC, Peter. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re building Black political power across the country at all levels of government. Were you forwarded this email? Want to sign up for our email list? | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: WE DID IT 💙💛
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
In 2018, I ran for Congress for the first time and made a promise that I would leave no one behind. And today, I reflect with pride and gratitude that I can continue to work towards that promise in a third term in Congress. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54412525/378483324/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzJiMmIxMi0yZTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvxTQBWIHke5z2eS1GDXJtEJEI-8ozbyVABiOg5FgqQ=&emci=01190fac-0661-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=7c2b2b12-2e61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=15529135) | _Thank you._ In 2018, I ran for Congress for the first time and made a promise that I would leave no one behind. **And today, I reflect with pride and gratitude that I can continue to work towards that promise in a third term in Congress.** __**Thank you.**__ I’m honored to accept the responsibility of representing you for another term in Congress. I’m grateful for the trust that so many of you have put in me, and I’m eager to continue serving as your representative in Washington. This is not about me. It’s about YOU. It’s about our volunteers and supporters who mobilized voters across the district amid a wild, oftentimes surreal election cycle. It’s about everyone who believed in my positive message and cast a vote to make their voice heard. Because of YOU, I remain optimistic about the future ahead. Together, we will protect a woman’s right to choose, protect hard-earned benefits and affordable health care, protect our planet, protect our democracy, protect our children, protect our basic rights to safety and security, and continue our quest to form a more perfect union. I’m so excited to be heading back to Congress for another term to work on these issues and more. _We have so much more work to do!_ Ever grateful, – Jahana
---

subject: Georgia on my Mind

body:
Herschel Walker is in a runoff with Raphael Warnock scheduled for December 6th

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840003:6lpx_6GNP:m:1:3317145305:78748E40D7C8DD100ABC1022E1B68D6C:r "Headline") Peter: Tuesday wasn't a good night for Black Republicans. Jennifer Ruth Green and Wesley Hunt both lost closely contested battles. The Democrats' treatment of Green and Hunt was ruthless and vicious... just like that did to Larry Elder earlier this year...but not all hope is lost. Herschel Walker is in a runoff with Raphael Warnock scheduled for December 6th. But his chances of success are dimming. **Are you going to let the Democrats stamp out every Black Republican in 2022?** **[Or are you going to help us by pushing Herschel over the top next month? If so, we need you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help bring victory to the last Black Republican standing in 2022!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840003:6lpx_6GNP:m:1:3317145305:78748E40D7C8DD100ABC1022E1B68D6C:r "Or are you going to help us by pushing
Herschel over the top next month? If so, we need you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help bring victory to the last Black Republican standing
in 2022!")** These Black Republicans poked the Democrat bear. And because of that, they faced smears and libels from the Lamestream Media and other Leftist allies. The Democrats are increasingly losing Latino voters. They've shown that they're not going to go without a fight when it comes to the Black vote. **[Don't let the Left stamp out every Black Republican. Help us ensure victory for Herschel next month with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840003:6lpx_6GNP:m:1:3317145305:78748E40D7C8DD100ABC1022E1B68D6C:r "Don’t let the Left stamp out every Black Republican. Help us ensure victory for Herschel next month with your $50, $100, or $250
donation today!")** Black Americans WANT freedom from the Democrats. We've seen that time and again with Winsome Sears and Byron Donalds. Now comes the true test. We know Black voters are tired of Biden's destructive policies. But unless we raise the needed funds to mobilize our runoff program in Georgia, the Democrats will succeed in stopping Herschel from victory as well. Will you help us turn out the Black vote in Georgia for Herschel next month? **[If so, dig deep and donate today! You can't delay any longer!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840003:6lpx_6GNP:m:1:3317145305:78748E40D7C8DD100ABC1022E1B68D6C:r "If so, dig deep and donate
today! You can’t delay any longer!")** For a New Journey, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840003:6lpx_6GNP:m:1:3317145305:78748E40D7C8DD100ABC1022E1B68D6C:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, aka Bo Snerdley

---

— Joe
