name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
This can't wait, friend: We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.
If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Serve America so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election.
We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
Will you split $20 between me and Serve America right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for coming through when it matters most.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Bob Carey
subject: Veteran endorsed: Ron DeSantis
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837472:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)

Peter,

Here's a cold, hard fact: Ron DeSantis needs to run for president in 2024.

You may be asking, why?

Americans need someone who can rebuild and restore our military and will honor the pledges our nation has made to the thousands of veterans that have defended our country.

And Ron DeSantis is the man for the job.
* He's a decorated veteran.
* He runs one of the largest National Guard forces in the country.
* He's tried to make up for the ineptitude of the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) by building additional veteran assistance programs in his state of Florida.

Peter, I served alongside many brave men and women who protect our country.

So when I heard that Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement, is working to recruit Governor DeSantis for President, I knew I had to support them.

Now I'm asking you to support them too, Peter.

If you're tired of how Democrats treat our veterans and service members, can you join me by supporting Ready for Ron and help us raise $45,000 by the end of November?

[_**Click here to help Ready for Ron recruit Ron DeSantis for President in 2024 by donating $25, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837472:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)

**Since Democrats have been in control of the government, they have uniformly****denied veterans access to the timely and quality health care they need and deserve.**

DeSantis is the person who can turn this around for our military and veterans.

Unlike many politicians who've never served, Ron is a Navy veteran who supported Navy SEAL Teams in Iraq.

Peter, he was awarded the Bronze Star Medal for meritorious service in Iraq.

* As Governor of Florida, he is Commander-in-Chief of the 12,000 members of the Florida National Guard and called thousands of them into active duty to respond to Hurricane Ian.

* Ron has also started new veteran home-ownership programs with discounted fixed-rate loans and 0% down payment and closing cost loans.

* He also signed better preferential hiring of veterans seeking Florida government jobs into law. He was one of the first to realize the teaching potential of veterans to meet the teacher employment crisis in Florida schools.

[_**Help Ready for Ron draft DeSantis for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837472:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)

Peter, DeSantis knows how to rebuild and restore our military because he's been part of it. _**He knows how to take care of our veterans because he is one. **_

I believe he can restore the trust that a government promising _**" to care for him who has borne the battle"**_ will actually do so.

He can rebuild a military force that minimizes the casualties the United States may suffer because the force is too small.

Ron is a man who will fight for your rights, your veterans, and your country.

**This veteran, and many more to follow, is proud to be part of "Veterans Ready for Ron."**

Make your voice heard, and help me reach my goal of raising $45,000 by the end of November for Ready. **Click any button below to donate. **

[_**Donate $25**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837473:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate $35**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837474:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate $50**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837475:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate $100**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837476:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate $250**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837477:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate $500**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837478:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837479:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837472:JTCLF6GN6:m:1:3373497171:151F27C0D12DE23526955F68FB8BC1D0:r)

Thank you,

Bob "Shoebob" Carey
Captain, US Navy (Ret)
Veterans Ready for Ron Director

body:

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49162%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QDYomy9Jxm%2bJrA2ir1HO3Q&sysid=1)**

Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

name: Greater Georgia
subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | | |
---
|
---
| Friends,
Now that we're on the other side of the November 8th general election, we wanted to say a heartfelt THANK YOU for your incredible support during this campaign cycle.
In 2021, we set out to grow Georgia's conservative movement by registering new voters, engaging diverse communities, and protecting the integrity of our elections.
Since then, our organization has made well over 2 million voter contacts, held over 100 registration drives and community events, and reached thousands more voters at the doors, phones, by mail, TV, and radio.
Thanks to your engagement, contributions, encouragement, and your MANY volunteer hours at registration drives, community roundtables, call nights, post card writing parties, and more - Georgia saw the highest turnout midterm election in our state's history on Tuesday night. Not only did we preserve our majorities in the state legislature - conservatives also WON every single state office on the ballot.
From an early analysis, we know that much of the conservative comeback was anchored by incredible new support among diverse communities, women, and newly registered voters across Georgia - meaning that our year-round efforts on the ground played a critical role in our election night victories.
Over the next few days, as we dive deeper into the numbers, we'll be sending you our full evaluation of where our movement succeeded, and where we need to improve heading into 2024 and beyond. For now, there is much to celebrate - but also, much more work to do ahead of the Tuesday, December 6th runoff election.
Over the next four weeks, Greater Georgia will continue to work on the ground to protect election integrity, educate voters, and get out the vote. The best way you can help is by signing up to [volunteer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P3jiDynwV8k4BYX4V3RWA_JGpViUvRw6qbeO9r7vBToRSxOGvznrkRL9ZoO_kudkBdZ_InG90UR0eahYO3C_EiKowWHXsuTUhbiRoiZNot-Wu4soLXsj6htEXWgBMGSvhLOS-0qXtvRJjpZeXi9dI2aIXNB_xAXBQHI3_FbCQsQ=&c=kpL706vQwdYILJmvxG9ecxW9k4o9kyqig-7-7X1g4econk5s1kpr7Q==&ch=JdGbpYo00rIyfFuSvODcIKiZt44EccAh5ytNr39LqIxZvn9yqQ476g==), chipping in with a [donation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P3jiDynwV8k4BYX4V3RWA_JGpViUvRw6qbeO9r7vBToRSxOGvznrkbw5ZhUU7Vrm9CGjuwW2JKJuWp2za7fCvLzjI5gw0DvTBE64rnibWRI3hBs4PYbeNm0I_tajSIByS7i6Ijnt854prOIPiE_u_WhYJzJZJJ9TZLuBDXDblk97VqPzSJDwSINh42JQjJFJ4pRD8QiIsQY=&c=kpL706vQwdYILJmvxG9ecxW9k4o9kyqig-7-7X1g4econk5s1kpr7Q==&ch=JdGbpYo00rIyfFuSvODcIKiZt44EccAh5ytNr39LqIxZvn9yqQ476g==), and following us for election updates on [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P3jiDynwV8k4BYX4V3RWA_JGpViUvRw6qbeO9r7vBToRSxOGvznrkbtG-Ean58Fx5G-WIPhNJFEWvfPB9jzU9nxdiAlJMukzcG8ZISFcv9sZxsxrCm2ywXwmmNRGxrb84s_NaG8htkCNr8w2gskyV7nb4a1J1a4F&c=kpL706vQwdYILJmvxG9ecxW9k4o9kyqig-7-7X1g4econk5s1kpr7Q==&ch=JdGbpYo00rIyfFuSvODcIKiZt44EccAh5ytNr39LqIxZvn9yqQ476g==) and [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P3jiDynwV8k4BYX4V3RWA_JGpViUvRw6qbeO9r7vBToRSxOGvznrkbtG-Ean58FxvmA73EvNAwNIQIOMPrR7x0N32jaslJqqYDWckvglhsapHt6-a6WAv7W7wI2mZkIwjJbrsSAugCXjUscQsziJiItswVwyeDU4mvX1CPUwc7A=&c=kpL706vQwdYILJmvxG9ecxW9k4o9kyqig-7-7X1g4econk5s1kpr7Q==&ch=JdGbpYo00rIyfFuSvODcIKiZt44EccAh5ytNr39LqIxZvn9yqQ476g==).
We look forward to another four weeks of partnering together - and to delivering the conservative comeback once and for all in the state of Georgia!
Our best, Kelly and the Team at Greater Georgia

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, Now that we're on the other side of the November 8th general election, we wanted to say a heartfelt THANK YOU for your incredible support during this campaign cycle. In 2021, we set out to grow Georgia's conservative movement by registering new voters, engaging diverse communities, and protecting the integrity of our elections. Since then, our organization has made well over 2 million voter contacts, held over 100 registration drives and community events, and reached thousands more voters at the doors, phones, by mail, TV, and radio. Thanks to your engagement, contributions, encouragement, and your MANY volunteer hours at registration drives, community roundtables, call nights, post card writing parties, and more - Georgia saw the highest turnout midterm election in our state's history on Tuesday night. Not only did we preserve our majorities in the state legislature - conservatives also WON every single state office on the ballot. From an early analysis, we know that much of the conservative comeback was anchored by incredible new support among diverse communities, women, and newly registered voters across Georgia - meaning that our year-round efforts on the ground played a critical role in our election night victories. Over the next few days, as we dive deeper into the numbers, we'll be sending you our full evaluation of where our movement succeeded, and where we need to improve heading into 2024 and beyond. For now, there is much to celebrate - but also, much more work to do ahead of the Tuesday, December 6th runoff election. Over the next four weeks, Greater Georgia will continue to work on the ground to protect election integrity, educate voters, and get out the vote. The best way you can help is by signing up to ==, chipping in with a ==, and following us for election updates on == and ==. We look forward to another four weeks of partnering together - and to delivering the conservative comeback once and for all in the state of Georgia! Our best, Kelly and the Team at Greater Georgia | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988, Atlanta, GA 30355 | | == Sent by mailto:info@greatergeorgia.com powered by == ==

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s official: TWO more Justice Democrats in Congress!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we did it!

We helped elect TWO more phenomenal Justice Democrats who will join the
ranks of our movement in Congress: Summer Lee and Greg Casar. Summer will
be the first Black Congresswoman from Pennsylvania. Greg is a former labor
organizer and son of immigrants.

It’s always been support from folks like you that keeps JD running so that
we can recruit, train, endorse, and support progressive champions like
Greg and Summer. For that, we are incredibly thankful.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120416?refcode=em20221110-26001&t=1001&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J ]We’re ready to hit the ground running and we need your support as our
newest Justice Democrats head to Congress. Can you donate
$5 to help us
keep up this incredible momentum?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120416?refcode=em20221110-26001&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J ]Contribute

Voters in PA-12 and TX-35 sent Summer and Greg to the House with a mandate
— to fight for working people and champion the bold, lifesaving policies
we need. And they will.

We all deserve to be represented by leaders like Summer and Greg, but all
too often entrenched incumbents and big money wins out. That’s why our
model is so different (and so important).

In 4 years, we’ve helped elect AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman, AND
re-elect the whole Squad! Now we can add Greg and Summer to that list —
and we’ve done it all without a cent of corporate PAC money. Instead, we
have you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120416?refcode=em20221110-26001&t=1021&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J ]Every victory, every Justice Democrat elected, is thanks to your
support. So can you chip in today to help sustain our work in this
critical moment?

Thank you for all you do to support us,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221110-26001-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26001_1203867_W7Wk7J&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26001%2E1203867%2EW7Wk7J

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838866:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838866:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838867:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838868:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838869:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838866:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838866:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838866:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838866:JfHiF6GNN:m:1:3371220873:6B1FBF23DEC78DF36E54ED57F2C9E0BB:r)

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: we've come one step closer to making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: [Will you give $5 right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54402767/378437088/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5157-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjNmMjc2Yi0xMTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyfTEVJO9G8saUENrgwOhupFMMmC5PCX6VpndZMfpbU=)
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything it's got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the resources we need to kickstart this runoff election, so I'm personally asking:[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54402768/378437089/-58337752?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5157-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjNmMjc2Yi0xMTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyfTEVJO9G8saUENrgwOhupFMMmC5PCX6VpndZMfpbU=)**
Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz is bringing his special brand of dry-heave-inducing dishonor to Georgia today, to campaign for the dangerously-violent and serially-dishonest Herschel Walker. Will stand with Sen. Raphael Warnock in this next stage of the fight?
body:
Senate control is up to us
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81e4ae43-e9d4-4f39-baa9-63f8791c8edd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Peter, **[Whether we hold the Senate or not is up to us.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8aaa42f-ecbe-4c5d-a2cd-c260e5bb579a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Senator Rapael Warnock beat insane person Herschel Walker by just under 1%, but because of the legacy of Jim Crow laws in the South--meant to do EVERYTHING possible to ensure those who represent the politics of MLK’s legacy lose--it's not enough. By not breaking 50%, Warnock's required to do it again in a runoff December 6th.
> **__That is why Ted Cruz is bringing his special brand of dry-heave-inducing dishonor to Georgia today, to campaign for the dangerously-violent and serially-dishonest Herschel Walker.__**
**_We don't yet know if Senator Mark Kelly will hold on in Arizona, though things look good. Things look promising for Senator Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada too, as they count ballots, but it's less certain than Kelly. _** **_In other words, this race could decide whether America keeps moving forward, or the cruel and venal Mitch McConnell regains control of the Senate, blocking every item on President Joe Biden's agenda._** _Walker held a gun to his wife's head and threatened her blow her brains out. Warnock's an inspiration, preaching from the podium once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr. There's no mystery as to who is the better person. _ **__While Democrats had a good day Tuesday, we still saw Republicans eke out a win for the awful Ron Johnson, and steal a win with $50 million in Peter Thiel & Mitch McConnell SuperPAC money for the loathsome J.D. Vance. Let's not let them complete the trifecta with Walker.__** **[Can you join with Blue Amp Action in saying no to Herschel Walker, Ted Cruz, Ron Johnson, J.D. Vance, Peter Thiel, Donald Trump and a McConnell Majority, by donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep Senator Warnock in the Senate?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46716e59-bc9a-4525-9aff-0dd8be57ac8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you for hanging in here with us, as the fight of our lives continues._** All my best, Cliff Schecter
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Sen. Warnock & Save The Senate Majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde460205-3ca5-4f5f-be62-fc3ecbc4fcd9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8gkn8lcuj42krgrinfs89kq6no6lci92vlp4uc0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zogmn5ulrlglm15cq2r2atebfgh993u8f68er70g_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9813u9lf874ho9398m752ns87k99t7ni9c1n08o_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsl645gh4ov4kt8t8nvoeit30ii1p8uvbl980llg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlcd6ehp9cu951643scgg4i0mhbhep01tnv54ggg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3eudpu2veaj025f11ksgopc563uh77c9du1adn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkja558vota70csdbghs76s1bae76if95mru7mng_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi62p72c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Friend, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: Thank you for all your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
| | | [](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-145-277-471-b97c44f954-s38f0112de)
---
| | Dear Friend, _THANK YOU! _ Thank you for being part of a resounding victory – 65%! We couldn’t have done it without you— and we wouldn’t have wanted to try. To all of our volunteers, supporters, and friends who gave their time, talents and treasures: thank you for investing in our movement and believing in what we can accomplish together for our community. Elections and the political season are hard on everyone. Let’s remember to treat others as we would like to be treated as we move into this next chapter. Now, the work begins to fix our economy, tackle inflation, reduce gas prices and supply shortages, secure our border, and hold the Biden Administration accountable. I am truly humbled by the faith you continue to place in Katie and I. It is the honor of my life to have the privilege of representing my hometown community in Congress. Your friendship and support is the icing on the cake. My commitment to you is the same as ever— I promise to work hard for you and always give you my 100%.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Bill Posey
---
| |

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Election Day may be over, but Mark still needs our help to keep this campaign running.
#

Friends —
We still don’t have the final results of this race, but here’s what we do know:
1. This race is extremely close and control of the Senate could come down to Arizona.
2. Votes are still being counted and we can’t let up.
3. Mark still needs our support to win this race!

Election Day may be over, but Mark still needs our help as votes are counted. National Republicans are targeting Arizona with election conspiracies as we speak, and we need to be able to fight back. We don’t know how long this process will take, which is why we need to be prepared for anything.
**That’s why we are launching the[Make it Count Fund](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov-22.H-pmBT&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=1&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC), an effort to make sure this team has the resources to finish this race strong.**
You can see how critically important the next few days are, which is why we have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We need your support as votes continue to be counted in this race that could determine who controls the Senate.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov-22.H-pmBT&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=2&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-nov-22.Mz0EpM&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=21&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-nov-22.ZaIW8F&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=22&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-nov-22.taHm_3&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=23&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-nov-22.8759dG&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=24&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-nov-22.svpOl_&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=25&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)**
---

| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-nov-22.cZ0eWB&refcode=em221110-1-7&t=26&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC)**
---
****
We are hopeful that when the votes are counted, we will be successful. But until then, we need to keep working until this election is called.
Your support will help ensure we have the resources to keep this campaign running for as long as that takes.
We’ll keep you updated with the latest as we have new information. Thank you for continuing to support this mission, we couldn’t do this without you!
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=4754%2E6688874%2E2byktC).

But until then, we need to keep working until this election is called. Your support will help ensure we have the resources to keep this campaign running for as long as that takes. We’ll keep you updated with the latest as we have new information. Thank you for continuing to support this mission, we couldn’t do this without you! Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Kathy Salvi
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Salvi for US Senate
body:
Incredibly grateful | | |
---
---
Peter, I want to start by saying thank you for your support in my run for the Senate. Since the moment I decided to enter this race, I have been surrounded by love and support from Illinoisans who believed in a stronger future. A future of safety, strong education, faith in our government, support for law enforcement, and financial responsibility. It was an honor meeting all of you, Peter. I met moms worried about their children’s education, families concerned about future generations, farmers who keep our state fed, grandparents worried about their retirement, and so many other amazing people and groups. The support I have received over these last few months has been extraordinary – more than I ever could have imagined. I want to take a moment to reflect on all we accomplished during this campaign with the generous support from donors and volunteers. I will forever look back on the memories from this race and think of how strong Illinoisans are. Now, I will continue on with my career as a business owner, and most importantly, a mother and grandmother. I have some stories my grandchildren will love to hear! Thank you again for this opportunity, Peter. Kathy Salvi
---

clean_body: Incredibly grateful | | | Peter, I want to start by saying thank you for your support in my run for the Senate. Since the moment I decided to enter this race, I have been surrounded by love and support from Illinoisans who believed in a stronger future. A future of safety, strong education, faith in our government, support for law enforcement, and financial responsibility. It was an honor meeting all of you, Peter. I met moms worried about their children’s education, families concerned about future generations, farmers who keep our state fed, grandparents worried about their retirement, and so many other amazing people and groups. The support I have received over these last few months has been extraordinary – more than I ever could have imagined. I want to take a moment to reflect on all we accomplished during this campaign with the generous support from donors and volunteers. I will forever look back on the memories from this race and think of how strong Illinoisans are. Now, I will continue on with my career as a business owner, and most importantly, a mother and grandmother. I have some stories my grandchildren will love to hear! Thank you again for this opportunity, Peter. Kathy Salvi | | Paid for by Kathy Salvi for US Senate | | | ---|---|---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bc35cabf5044bf4835bd66dd1b2cd57&_e=bOr98S7bgelRkXV61JZMPAteXXF6axm_43v6UEErIaUA8flJCYoSxcw_Dsx9IM9TXq6XMjqIGDx3K_JttuLyHDJp71i13VShed3Hyx1xmhtDS1WgsaL9K1n-4Ud68Y_M_9bkKBlfg1m4FTgzLx83vVvqDQkm-F-Pc4DDjB7g0xvSdz2zXaU6UbGhnfbKpre_04XTJypBovu3ZdY2pCDm1-qa_OcvKEkC-zmQyy5NMyacBJCUCzhasArEqvrRoM4QS6B46u-UiiiOMhyLRLTbPZRUV2QZ2nCzDkDai9M9xV8xfmEs4FGoKCqk_oRiwBdt-oxrHa01ikdE0PJRlyT8VshpnTOnRfJOKaEF33ER3ZtDOxPg1xFhgXCp_Ve9myrdV2uG4QiDMbBMQy6ExC0o9Q%3D%3D) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail. Over what? Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space. _And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement). And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bc35cabf5044bf4835bd66dd1b2cd57&_e=bOr98S7bgelRkXV61JZMPAteXXF6axm_43v6UEErIaUA8flJCYoSxcw_Dsx9IM9TXq6XMjqIGDx3K_JttuLyHDJp71i13VShed3Hyx1xmhtDS1WgsaL9K1n-4Ud68Y_M_9bkKBlfg1m4FTgzLx83vVvqDQkm-F-Pc4DDjB7g0xvSdz2zXaU6UbGhnfbKpre_04XTJypBovu3ZdY2pCDm1-qa_OcvKEkC-zmQyy5NMyacBJCUCzhasArEqvrRoM4QM-rJRN6dtshfZ64AeS22YNnICvpqZJ5903I3H2SGTWAZ5igwxiGAW8Fi7Hqecc6ntkMzyNx4KRPpI-h9HDgFQUZ99JoLVJUmznYd5Hj_BTajwoOiL06znPYt1cfqCTW9vJwF0r76jxAQlnXo2VOLoA%3D%3D) Now, I'll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency. If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment. Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges. But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight. **That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY** **LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community. And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie). Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home. That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected. Why? **Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ " That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict. And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark. It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bc35cabf5044bf4835bd66dd1b2cd57&_e=bOr98S7bgelRkXV61JZMPAteXXF6axm_43v6UEErIaUA8flJCYoSxcw_Dsx9IM9TXq6XMjqIGDx3K_JttuLyHDJp71i13VShed3Hyx1xmhtDS1WgsaL9K1n-4Ud68Y_M_9bkKBlfg1m4FTgzLx83vVvqDQkm-F-Pc4DDjB7g0xvSdz2zXaU6UbGhnfbKpre_04XTJypBovu3ZdY2pCDm1-qa_OcvKEkC-zmQyy5NMyacBJCUCzhasArEqvrRoM4QbMCGx6X6Nls6fz9QkC5pS8T10KgyRxIJ0n85ckVFuMix8yYYyNwrkyQ-hnIIkoHyPJlWE3I_Z3FOORhf6T2_7Jyf57The8fV0-fRVJmoI271wWy9oSw3CVbFXSByxUOyWuR26s1F5qLYYoVBVNpfkg%3D%3D) The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**. So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._ So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bc35cabf5044bf4835bd66dd1b2cd57&_e=bOr98S7bgelRkXV61JZMPAteXXF6axm_43v6UEErIaUA8flJCYoSxcw_Dsx9IM9TXq6XMjqIGDx3K_JttuLyHDJp71i13VShed3Hyx1xmhtDS1WgsaL9K1n-4Ud68Y_M_9bkKBlfg1m4FTgzLx83vVvqDQkm-F-Pc4DDjB7g0xvSdz2zXaU6UbGhnfbKpre_04XTJypBovu3ZdY2pCDm1-qa_OcvKEkC-zmQyy5NMyacBJCUCzhasArEqvrRoM4QjE5x5ayr3ehVJuTloufQWbeelBcItq5q7wWS0QJ3Rk_qUFwjgafEU_PFtwBmUkBWwdzqgW7urNBQVhUpOyj-43NAfRFoVhIhGmd8chKmyD6RJvSclKKDS1w53VkB_vpq4ls8iiRMq1Y7fG5HWKmydg%3D%3D), before it's too late. For Life,
---
---
Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bc35cabf5044bf4835bd66dd1b2cd57&_e=bOr98S7bgelRkXV61JZMPAteXXF6axm_43v6UEErIaUA8flJCYoSxcw_Dsx9IM9TXq6XMjqIGDx3K_JttuLyHDJp71i13VShed3Hyx1xmhtDS1WgsaL9K1n-4Ud68Y_M_9bkKBlfg1m4FTgzLx83vVvqDQkm-F-Pc4DDjB7g0xvSdz2zXaU6UbGhnfbKpre_04XTJypBovu3ZdY2pCDm1-qa_OcvKEkC-zmQyy5NMyacBJCUCzhasArEqvrRoM4QwpZx-mFVL6zjpMYQAYJW5YUmY60RH49KLEQjGOa-NQuvV8PSIiniwVikiM8O7xhQOhhbNado7JCOgp-yGMURoQT7f8hrmn-EFSyxer2TT18nwv2QCIEY4RWWEbAAlMgVnP-bu7rEnWgs7nmZXNGbDg%3D%3D)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). Democrats worked SO HARD to elect Raphael Warnock to the Senate, Peter.

**_He’s in a MAGA-RED Georgia._** He barely won in 2020 -- and Republicans are pouring in millions to take him down.

[**So when we asked for an emergency cash infusion of $3, we KNEW grassroots Democrats would step up and help re-elect Democrats like Sen. Warnock!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54403840/378451770/-253359397?amount=3&refcode=UD_20221110_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZmU5MmU3LTE0NjEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTFlZTFkYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KqhnLZprOQsw9EigL49LDL5DM0Cachs-vQWvDoJUU-w=)

body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7566kud87974h8mn0b58bqmqhto33aq8vlbcp1g_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkcdrj8d3j68o61c3n6erj0shjm4q76c3lmhjr2cr3c6q32olge6q7eplgs6pj0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36e2qb6p1ge8omcs9gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zngag8u2k2eder5ik4prkd0btd6fjebbh2a3flho_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z82n9ucacdvfd52lecbsl5696d0cib56dke8akfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt634p90nuj9tlestl0rnd57p15mhqpc8m3le038_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvakvmsqbeun4r2el85sdo9eeuesuvbvljb6sqm8_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zptculloq441qv168bqg3d5j0ujtei3s47ugcnl0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9k3d5kimfdd2hnpbiunjeb3p044io5n1qprlr0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shi6apb4sdh2bs)**

Thank you,

clean_body: It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Peter, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. | Peter,
An America-First fighter in Colorado needs your help completing an incredible comeback so she can head back to Congress and help me enact the MAGA AGENDA.
Lauren Boebert - one of the strongest and most vocal leaders in Congress - is locked in an incredibly tight race in CO-03. With 98% of the vote in, she has stormed back to take the lead... But only by a few hundred votes!
We can't give Woketopians and mainstream media talking heads the satisfaction of watching one of the most influential voices of our movement lose her seat. They always go after the fighters... And that's exactly why these vultures are circling around Lauren's deadlocked race and rallying behind her Democrat opponent!
I'm calling for all of us to help Lauren fight back. [Send any support you can directly to her campaign using this link. ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o6tBYO7jp6mjAGk77rs6-tFC2LTEGvyhpg2kx6cWid59z2A15Vz6M1nyRT8RS4Caf-lbnRUruV5Pd27ZNg952Ayszgtl3NtVYqdgyb7gvcI095m8y4sm4JhtGOzSj-y8CUH3AP-fKXRgyBc-YTne0iZjEnr2U9jkD8zZcGx9tzUaW6F1aykwfZoWjEgco9UKUjdnANfMWVMTWEXtkbzbw_Ugz18PnkU_gAZvgU8r16g=&c=dL4WyGMFMyNxBpzolXGZBR1UBQhDmfFAVclBc6NNb2_T9GEnctzExw==&ch=3Lvxi9efH7yaGshO1j83esdrn-wuTZBHs5NdDarpL81BFPD_07ZQJg==)
Help me get some backup with BACKBONE in the upcoming 118th Congress! Stand up and fight for Lauren Boebert now!!!

| Peter, when Lauren started trailing in this race, the Woketopians started taking an early victory lap...
They cheered the defeat of this MAGA fighter, and [even started saying disgusting things about her](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o6tBYO7jp6mjAGk77rs6-tFC2LTEGvyhpg2kx6cWid59z2A15Vz6M1nyRT8RS4CaeJa6DZNGOvqLkVBjXsdBpvtCP8UyP_qv8TgboaHOI-L9wltbwpiUSii8bJnH0u_AK1l8Yb_E127qhgpI67jVuWLFlB2IBsixW_vLggIEmgqRxoIpU50HKw5uVJ7fJdj-FSxg2yy5G8DeRefNwUfuqBuVdfC8B_oHrFpTOoWheUoDz4kNGSSMae7nDEnq-CgZWW3RunKRSQ2fJfGNqN85cZFkUijxGO_y0nAz4K8Rx-s=&c=dL4WyGMFMyNxBpzolXGZBR1UBQhDmfFAVclBc6NNb2_T9GEnctzExw==&ch=3Lvxi9efH7yaGshO1j83esdrn-wuTZBHs5NdDarpL81BFPD_07ZQJg==) like the bitter, terrible people that they are!
But then, Lauren started to surge... She has now TAKEN THE LEAD and is so close to shutting up all of these political elites who hate us and everything we stand for!
I know she'll need help fighting back, so I'm sending out this urgent correspondence to all MAGA Republicans.
[Will you help a proven patriot finish strong in her race, silence her liberal critics, and head back to Congress with me? ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o6tBYO7jp6mjAGk77rs6-tFC2LTEGvyhpg2kx6cWid59z2A15Vz6M1nyRT8RS4Caf-lbnRUruV5Pd27ZNg952Ayszgtl3NtVYqdgyb7gvcI095m8y4sm4JhtGOzSj-y8CUH3AP-fKXRgyBc-YTne0iZjEnr2U9jkD8zZcGx9tzUaW6F1aykwfZoWjEgco9UKUjdnANfMWVMTWEXtkbzbw_Ugz18PnkU_gAZvgU8r16g=&c=dL4WyGMFMyNxBpzolXGZBR1UBQhDmfFAVclBc6NNb2_T9GEnctzExw==&ch=3Lvxi9efH7yaGshO1j83esdrn-wuTZBHs5NdDarpL81BFPD_07ZQJg==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, An America-First fighter in Colorado needs your help completing an incredible comeback so she can head back to Congress and help me enact the MAGA AGENDA. Lauren Boebert - one of the strongest and most vocal leaders in Congress - is locked in an incredibly tight race in CO-03. With 98% of the vote in, she has stormed back to take the lead... But only by a few hundred votes! We can't give Woketopians and mainstream media talking heads the satisfaction of watching one of the most influential voices of our movement lose her seat. They always go after the fighters... And that's exactly why these vultures are circling around Lauren's deadlocked race and rallying behind her Democrat opponent! I'm calling for all of us to help Lauren fight back. == Help me get some backup with BACKBONE in the upcoming 118th Congress! Stand up and fight for Lauren Boebert now!!! | | == | == | | == | Peter, when Lauren started trailing in this race, the Woketopians started taking an early victory lap... They cheered the defeat of this MAGA fighter, and == like the bitter, terrible people that they are! But then, Lauren started to surge... She has now TAKEN THE LEAD and is so close to shutting up all of these political elites who hate us and everything we stand for! I know she'll need help fighting back, so I'm sending out this urgent correspondence to all MAGA Republicans. == | | == | Thanks for sending direct support to Lauren's fight! | | Matt Gaetz | | | | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: None of this would be possible without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ud9na9SCehbTjHJJdVRnoKwFbMkDC8iU8mi5ziOJV8I=/M3t15Syjmn1aKFUbeWuZkZJEkhATCK8CA8PbKEsNQzQ=)
---
| Peter,

I'd like to begin by extending my deepest and most sincere gratitude for your support of my campaign.

Tuesday's victory was a perfect distillation of a team effort. Everyone - from our volunteers to our campaign staff to supporters at home - should hold their head high knowing they played an essential role in winning this race.

We dominated the ground game, told our campaign's story well, and showed the nation that voters want dedicated, thoughtful, and productive leaders in Congress.

Since my career began, it's been driven by my belief that there is no greater vocation than service to one's country. From the CIA to Congress, I've put that principle into practice and, because of you, I am thrilled I can continue serving this community for another term.

I am proud of my work in Congress, and there's so much more I aspire to accomplish for us there, and I can't thank you enough for truly powering our campaign to victory.

Your support means everything.

Let's get to work,
Abigail
---

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: Too close to call – we need to count every last vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
Peter,
Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. **But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:[Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Senator Murray’s, so we have the resources to count every vote and defeat our election-denying opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432752/378504489/-72708949?refcode=pm_em_221110_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODc1Y2E1Zi00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Qz0rDQj61IclCmYjWEZEATLt52NhlthbaXfLRtgCo=)**
My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election.
With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted.
But, Peter our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. **Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:[Can you split $5 between my campaign and Senator Murray’s right now to get us started so we have the resources to count every last vote in our must-win race? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432753/378504490/-72708949?refcode=pm_em_221110_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODc1Y2E1Zi00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Qz0rDQj61IclCmYjWEZEATLt52NhlthbaXfLRtgCo=)**
Thank you so much.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432754/378504491/-72708949?refcode=pm_em_221110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODc1Y2E1Zi00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Qz0rDQj61IclCmYjWEZEATLt52NhlthbaXfLRtgCo=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=C1tWYLBb8mTDvf1JvZG7kO20k2%2FVW9DNr0I7zXW%2Fl4ICyu9YSfh%2B9OXtffVFb%2B21D0wqDlTrz387IyWnC5%2FQI8AH9kxlnR6sKsLeBCQVhFxv2kJOnrBfEFN9k5cBpoOLqpN6amCs%2B8KNEGv%2F7K5Gep6u1JmRWYduYMPLvHm13%2Fp6LxynmIs5220oMwcL9k1C65cuCQ2ISIf%2By16tXmdo06szfGY9uL21lQcMm6wjRa0HPjC1aw7q4q7RQs6z%2FESYD0AEMIG16GHI1AZEBCA3GVOBH1CwperSqhQ9qY4XYFXpsieEPzyO9wDVVwmvbwjeBbwR3y1spt3CH2gXT04bN3H4vBszBtK2cO%2FB%2BMaY2g6WeUZsdcWosFJevbgWBdMGR7Ft8bGLhoomYJScHB8eEdh8WLvmVmrGoVjStPFSVmUITs2JfbADSdodXJOAalzn). Join us today in fighting for progressive values: [donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432755/378504492/-1835341818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODc1Y2E1Zi00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Qz0rDQj61IclCmYjWEZEATLt52NhlthbaXfLRtgCo=).

Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:= Thank you so much. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead

body:
We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432836/378504828/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTdjNGJlZC00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IRs1qwmSdUFam997CykkRFL0jWAuhBq7rB9D--bFM84=&emci=e44dd7da-2161-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=9e7c4bed-4061-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=8943725) Peter, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: [**Will you split $5 between me and Bob Casey right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432837/378504829/148343508?refcode=em22_221110_runoff_fndt_gq_act___rw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221110_runoff_fndt_gq_act___rw_ettx&utm_medium=email&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTdjNGJlZC00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IRs1qwmSdUFam997CykkRFL0jWAuhBq7rB9D--bFM84=)

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Bob Casey to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54432838/378504830/148343508?refcode=em22_221110_runoff_fndt_gq_act___rw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221110_runoff_fndt_gq_act___rw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTdjNGJlZC00MDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IRs1qwmSdUFam997CykkRFL0jWAuhBq7rB9D--bFM84=)**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. That's why I'm asking directly: = When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red. That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:= Thank you for your support. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | Help Raphael Warnock and Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Split a donation to their campaigns today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

body:
This is going to be BIG!| | | My friend, For the last eight years, we've delivered real results for the state of Maryland thanks to common sense solutions, smart policies, and a bipartisan approach, which I hope will serve as a model to the rest of the country — especially Washington, D.C. We have a lot to celebrate between my eight years as governor and a few years of strong national advocacy with _**An American United**_. That’s why on November 30th, _An America United_ will be hosting the _**2022 Governor's Celebration**_ — a huge event for us to highlight our great accomplishments. Having you there or your support from afar would mean the world to me and the entire team at _An America United_. There will be live music, drinks, and plenty of fun for everyone! We’ve been telling you for weeks that the races in Georgia were going to be close, and now Rev. Warnock has officially advanced to a runoff.

We still have a chance to keep this seat blue, but it’s going to take a bunch of hard work and resources.

Unlike the post-2020 runoffs, we have just under ONE MONTH to reach every single Democrat in Georgia and make sure they turn out to vote again.

name: Ready for Ron
subject: NY POST: DeSantis is the Future!

name: Ann Roe
subject: Our fight doesn't stop here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54404911/378456524/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU2ZmMxOS0xOTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=szOiT8ailkLQn5uUQ6lhNiH9JKoD-X-dDSwUAR9u72g=&emci=5db3cb18-5960-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=4456fc19-1961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=15639879)

Hi friend,

The count is finalizing and it's looking like it's not going to be in our favor.

I know that this is not the news we were hoping for, but I want you to know that we put up a heck of a fight. In this moment, it was important for me to reach out and let all you know how incredibly grateful I am for your steadfast support throughout this campaign.

To everyone who has shared their personal stories with me, welcomed me into their business, or donated a piece of their paycheck or their time to help us fight for change, **thank you**.

I'm so proud of this team and everything we've accomplished together this last year and a half. Here are some of the highlights from this campaign:
* We knocked on 26,071 doors.
* We made 11,438 phone calls and sent out 6,266 texts.
* We had 118 volunteers join our campaign.
* We held almost 100 events.
* We sent out 250 emails.

**We ran one of the strongest Democratic campaigns this district has seen in a _while_ , and we got closer to flipping this district than many expected us to**. We outperformed the predictions, and the polls – voters want to be given a real choice and that's what our campaign proved. We made a race that hadn't been competitive in decades, _competitive_.

And that didn't come out of nowhere: We visited every town in our district and advocated fiercely on the fight on reproductive rights, affordable healthcare for all, and support for our unions. That does not end here. We put up a good fight, and I will continue to fight for the people of WI-01. And while I may have lost, there is still much to celebrate, including helping Governor Evers over the finish line.

**This is _not_ the end of our work. If this loss has shown me anything, it's that putting in the work for our communities, workers, families, and children is always worth the effort, and I'm more determined than ever to keep up that work.**

I urge you all to not let this moment be the end of your fight and political engagement. Instead, let it be the beginning. I know this isn't the outcome we were hoping for and the pain of this loss might sting for a little while, but **never, ever doubt your power to create change**.

Thank you for everything, truly.

– Ann Roe

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.annroeforcongress.com/p/7JXH9diOF0WUYFs8Vn_0HQ2?unsubscribedata=A413vxqoSr1EvuuQm1Xd%2FOT5dPpj%2Fehu6eUOh9qcuAJOlDP3w9jm8F8DTSZ%2BzWmZBMYA5GMHQ5W3XlI0r2hRFTR5z%2FeTBlLy2yk5vz7%2FE3KSvqvgsPdXG5GwlwMgFjnsyX9JGUAJ0TKpONbyd7RJeowK2Ct3YX1q8X2lKSQoAO9Rn0r6KgguGZ%2FRPJAbW36acvpc%2FtSSwcbkOYahrSxAZjnArs1S8tO%2BLLTgkclHTQRq9Q2zkJhDvnDB2xTiXSXtVRjLnGyuNc9mDtnVKGvPci2WoTEJS3DuImJmy6UZs%2FkViLON8i2KsXltMJ41Uh5JDz6540Qc5MCYE76dOx5kjHNdSffm4UuLlubetdR08wnhzEHxJ2VVKnZQvK2Nm9x2SwxE1RJVRdREMURscl6mNEnCUWbuUiSSCzF6ODQiuPuVOuhIVfTHhT3T9sUYHak2). PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
PO Box 1075
Janesville, WI 53547

Peter, Every single one of our nation's defenders deserves to be celebrated today. **Unfortunately, too many of our veterans will not be able to celebrate. Like the 3 of our own Warriors who are rotting in prison. ** Sergeant Calvin Gibbs, Staff Sergeant Robert Bales, and Specialist Neftaly Platero are all currently serving out **LIFE SENTENCES** for crimes they didn't commit. And in honor of Veterans Day, we are asking for your help in getting these heroes the justice they deserve. **[Will you make a contribution to our WARRIOR FUND today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839909:6HE2q6GrN:m:1:3331421248:08A11B7386097F6DC9510E53242D2C95:r)**

Peter, we cannot forget our the atrocities committed by our own government, against the men and women who serve! In an effort to wrongly convict these Heroes, the government has...
* Thrown out evidence,
* Disregarded witness testimony,
* Flown in enemy combatants to testify,
* Threatened them with the death sentence,
* And so much more!

**This Veterans Day weekend, we're reminded of the respect that these men are owed for their service.****Yet still, they are treated like second-class criminals. ** _United American Patriots is working to change that. _ Our team at UAP works day and night to get these Warriors free and back into the arms of their loved ones, but we need your help. We step in whenever our Nation's Warriors are wrongfully accused and convicted of "War Crimes," and U.S. military prosecutors have failed them. United American Patriots works with families to alleviate the financial burden and to "Defend our Defenders" through our WARRIOR FUND. We pay for fees and associated expenses to ensure our Nation's Warriors have the best attorneys, investigators, and experts on their side to preserve their rights and defend against wrongful accusations and convictions. **_The reason why is simple: because our Defenders deserve nothing less. _** [**Could you chip in $35 this Veteran's Day to help our country's Heroes get the respect they deserve?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839913:6HE2q6GrN:m:1:3331421248:08A11B7386097F6DC9510E53242D2C95:r)

Thank you in advance for your support this Veterans Day weekend. Nick CoffmanUnited American Patriots

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I will always show up for my community and look forward to getting to work serving West Michiganders.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54433487/378507489/-1904168371?refcode=BLU-HSC-20221110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmQ5ZTc3Ni00MzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HK6cLknC23bL16OSeqzwbBnef8ezQfA5ryJYdDw8FyI=)
---
| Folks – we did it!

**It’s a new day in West Michigan. I have officially been elected to represent West Michigan in Congress.**

Make no mistake: this is a historic victory. We flipped a crucial House seat from red to blue, elected West Michigan’s first-ever Democratic Congresswoman, and sent a strong message that will not tolerate anti-democratic, anti-American extremism here.

I am a proud fourth-generation West Michigander. I know we’re a community that values service over self, building up over tearing down, and unity over division. We’re a community that cares for its poor, supports its vulnerable, and welcomes the stranger. A community where differences are not feared, but valued.

My promise to you is that I will never forget where I come from or who I work for. I will always show up for my community and look forward to getting to work serving West Michiganders.

Forever thankful,
Hillary

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839172:Js--q6G9N:m:1:3359512271:9DE41245D1E207AB2FA33100BA7EAB36:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839172:Js--q6G9N:m:1:3359512271:9DE41245D1E207AB2FA33100BA7EAB36:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839173:Js--q6G9N:m:1:3359512271:9DE41245D1E207AB2FA33100BA7EAB36:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839174:Js--q6G9N:m:1:3359512271:9DE41245D1E207AB2FA33100BA7EAB36:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839175:Js--q6G9N:m:1:3359512271:9DE41245D1E207AB2FA33100BA7EAB36:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839172:Js--q6G9N:m:1:3359512271:9DE41245D1E207AB2FA33100BA7EAB36:r)**

Thanks,

clean_body: It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Peter, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. body:

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838891:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838892:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838893:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838894:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838891:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838891:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838891:Jcjfq6GtN:m:1:3346849603:CE28EDD3364D0FB2DA05213F494959C7:r)

Herschel Walker
