clean_body: I'd have to agree with you, Megyn. Under our administration, we PROTECTED and DEFENDED the sovereign borders of the United States of America. We had PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH. Our country was safe all because you had a president who always put AMERICA FIRST! Our great Nation became the #1 oil and gas producer in the entire world, and we saved the average American family THOUSANDS of dollars at the gas pump. Our children were learning to LOVE AMERICA in the classroom, NOT woke, Left-wing, and racist Critical Race Theory. Now, we are seeing what happens when you let Radical Left lunatics run the White House--and you can 't say I didn't warn you. As a result, more people are joining our common-sense, patriotic movement every day, demanding more jobs, strong borders, fair trade, law and order, and GREATNESS for our beloved Country. Because our Nation has seen first-hand exactly what a Democrat-run Washington is like. I'll never stop working toSAVE AMERICA , but I can't do it alone. I need my BEST supporters to stand with me and help DEFEND our Country. Friend, I 've always been able to count on you, so I want to know what you think. Other nations should not mistake JOE BIDEN'S weakness for AMERICA'S weakness. American power, American might, and American leadership will soon be back--and stronger than ever. We will fight for more jobs for American families, fair trade for American workers, and more American factories forging more products stamped with that beautiful phrase, MADE IN THE USA. We will shut down Joe Biden's inflation disaster, bring this socialist spending spree to an immediate halt , and move to quickly defend our traditions and our historic AMERICAN VALUES. Friend, our movement to SAVE AMERICA is far from over --in fact, it is only just beginning. I need to know you're with me because I can't do this alone. My movement is NOTHING without the support of FREEDOM-LOVING PATRIOTS from all across the Nation. This is your chance to tell me EXACTLY what you think. I will be looking for your response. name: Becca Balint
subject: Optimism over apathy — always.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Optimism still has a place in our politics, and we proved it on Tuesday. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54433671/378508473/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGZkZDdmNS00NDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwzN3_EGLG_cQSyqeuWgI8Zxk8WjZgxVI2DYJFi6z34=&emci=d6d16b8d-1f61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=90fdd7f5-4461-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=43402272) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54433672/378508474/-1303335738?refcode=E19403-20221110-PostElectionThoughts-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGZkZDdmNS00NDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwzN3_EGLG_cQSyqeuWgI8Zxk8WjZgxVI2DYJFi6z34=) Peter, The results of this Tuesday’s elections reaffirmed my core belief that we must choose optimism over apathy — _always_. Here in Vermont, voters approved ballot initiatives to end all forms of slavery and enshrine the right to reproductive liberty in our state’s constitution. You also elected the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to represent Vermont in Washington — an honor I’m still wrapping my head around. But Vermont wasn’t the only state with firsts: Our neighbors in Massachusetts elected Democrat Maura Healey to be their next governor, making her the first woman to hold that position in Massachusetts history – and the first openly lesbian woman to win a gubernatorial election in United States history. And down in Florida, Maxwell Frost became the first member of Gen Z to win a congressional seat at the age of 25. Pessimists would have had us stay home on Tuesday, wanting us to believe that a “ _red wave_ ” was imminent. But instead, Americans chose hope, optimism, and action by turning out across all 50 states to protect their rights, defend our democracy, and stop the spread of extremism. And as a result, Democrats defied expectations — putting us within striking distance of holding the House and the Senate. **Our democracy isn’t fueled by polls or pundits: It’s fueled by people-power. And it will only continue to run if we show up, engage, and participate in the political process.** So stay hopeful. Keep the faith. Optimism still has a place in our politics — and we proved it on Tuesday. Yours, Becca Balint

The red wave turned out to be little more than a pink drizzle. Votes are still being counted – but we feel very good about where things stand. It looks like when the votes are finished being tallied in Arizona and Nevada, that Mark Kelly and Catherine Cortez Masto will prevail. Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia is headed to a December runoff against Herschel Walker. If all three races go our way, Democrats will have 51 Seats. We are disappointed in some tough losses, including Wisconsin and North Carolina – but we are absolutely thrilled that John Fetterman will be the next Senator from Pennsylvania. Our PAC played a small role in raising money for these critical races, and we are thankful for your help. Thanks to you, Democrats may have Saved the Senate. subject: I'm humbly asking for your support, Derek.

body:
We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. | |
---
Derek, I just want to say thank you. Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. **We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. **Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC right now to power Democrats like me to victory now and in the future?**

clean_body: We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. | | Derek, I just want to say thank you. Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC right now to power Democrats like me to victory now and in the future? When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything they’ve got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to turn Georgia red. That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. | | Hi folks, it’s Susie. I know it’s been a long 48 hours for all of us but I want to take this time to thank you for your support throughout this entire campaign, and give you an update on my House race here in Nevada’s Third District. First thing’s first: **This race has yet to be called.** I’ve always said that this race was going to be one of the closest and most competitive in the country, and that’s what the results so far are showing. With that said, my team and I are feeling good about where we’re headed as each day passes and new returns come in. This is democracy in action and I am immensely grateful for the election workers who, just like in previous elections, have been a cornerstone of accurate election tallying. But this brings me to my second point: **My campaign used every last dollar in our funds to run this race down to the wire.** Now, as we wait for results to continue to be reported, we have to press on. So we’re setting an emergency fundraising goal of $30,000 to ensure that every vote is counted. clean_body: Every vote must be counted | = | | Hi folks, it’s Susie. I know it’s been a long 48 hours for all of us but I want to take this time to thank you for your support throughout this entire campaign, and give you an update on my House race here in Nevada’s Third District. First thing’s first: This race has yet to be called. I’ve always said that this race was going to be one of the closest and most competitive in the country, and that’s what the results so far are showing. With that said, my team and I are feeling good about where we’re headed as each day passes and new returns come in. This is democracy in action and I am immensely grateful for the election workers who, just like in previous elections, have been a cornerstone of accurate election tallying. But this brings me to my second point: My campaign used every last dollar in our funds to run this race down to the wire. Now, as we wait for results to continue to be reported, we have to press on. So we’re setting an emergency fundraising goal of $30,000 to ensure that every vote is counted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your continued support. Thanks to his leadership, we’ve seen the _most significant_ new gun safety law in nearly three decades, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson has been _confirmed_ to the Supreme Court, and America is seeing the strongest job creation in **YEARS.**

But while Democrats continue to work to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are obstructing President Biden’s agenda at every turn.**

We need to PROVE that Democrats are standing together during this pivotal moment, so we've launched an OFFICIAL Live Poll to confirm the president's new ratings. **Our poll closes at 11:59 P.M. and we have NO record of your approval -- so please tell us now:**

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838913:6RRJ46GNX:m:1:3317145305:8DADC4DA3A365402DDDE67066CBAA988:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838914:6RRJ46GNX:m:1:3317145305:8DADC4DA3A365402DDDE67066CBAA988:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838915:6RRJ46GNX:m:1:3317145305:8DADC4DA3A365402DDDE67066CBAA988:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838916:6RRJ46GNX:m:1:3317145305:8DADC4DA3A365402DDDE67066CBAA988:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838913:6RRJ46GNX:m:1:3317145305:8DADC4DA3A365402DDDE67066CBAA988:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838913:6RRJ46GNX:m:1:3317145305:8DADC4DA3A365402DDDE67066CBAA988:r)**

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801
body:
It’s been an honor

|
---
This campaign started with an idea – that our strength as a nation comes from standing together. Together is in our DNA. Our constitution begins with the words “We the people”. We are one nation and our strength has always come from standing together.

We launched this campaign in response to those who would threaten our unity with division, who would threaten the peaceful transfer of power with violent insurrection, who would threaten the truth of our common identity as Americans with lies in support of tribal preference. I took an oath to support and defend our Constitution, a lifelong commitment to protect and cherish our democracy. And it is because of my deep rooted faith in our democracy that I celebrate what we just participated in - a free and fair election. While I am heartbroken that we came up short, the people of NY-21 have spoken and I respect their voice in this election. In order for us to fortify our democracy, we must show the strength of our willingness to accept the results of our elections, even when we don’t like them. And as I wish Congresswoman Stefanik congratulations in her victory, it comes with an important and stark reminder; this office does not belong to any politician, it belongs to us.

I am incredibly proud of what we were able to build together. 65,000 miles on my truck, hundreds of community events, town halls in every county - and who knows how many burgers – we showed up and delivered what so many have been thirsting for: a chance to be heard, a chance to belong, a chance to come together. None of that would have been possible without the tireless effort and dedication of so many of you. Thank you to our hundreds of volunteers who dedicated so much of their time and energy into this campaign. Democracy is not a spectator sport and you are the backbone of the democratic process. Most importantly, thank you to voters who placed your faith and trust in me. I am incredibly humbled that you placed your hope in me and in this campaign. It has been a responsibility and an honor that I have taken seriously from the beginning. Hope is never misplaced. Hope is the seed of progress. Hope is the seed of change. It may not bloom on a timeline of our choosing – but the investment of hope is never wasted. I will forever be indebted to all of you for the hope you placed in me and our campaign.

Thank you,

Matt Matt Castelli
| | Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.castelliforcongress.com/p/J5pKoZraDkypT34AT5Q8_w2?unsubscribedata=%2By3dDYOzO28E1rhC2ximnlzvtSDz2OCHB4zdo99RvPAhqT7hBj1Ie7z%2BpSCLomWYF2h7LCgPgyi0HkZ%2Bna67H%2B8q0CqrmPPH%2BP1fYqdfZ57AtiXbu%2BEpSTz29EMqywDVQddQ5BZYa3IR01DVZyMDfwXr9ETotbVGe%2BPM6J4fGIyZZ9Ij4a4ZEeiwzIX%2BW3xKpeYt6RccbFlCoIOmZkT%2BQr3zH8GVx7HPv7kQyE%2BUptBl7%2BsrgWl184D061258A17aby6usjtD%2BfLledYj2n%2BbUd8idi0yAQohtYWjyStxxxY8vc97J67hBgN%2BzHONKND9hEAhyJ4nFVRRDZPqPwMWmljy46AcTAjwIRPL%2BxHmNuuVV2i%2BwEDIBlrCDviSCA%2BGU1rx0fUNJ9%2FgevRbTfQXMBD%2F0R3qfl7QRdLGgU9QIAosXZbk3kih5MM8xYIS88f).

Every donation, every phone call, every doorknock — it all made a difference in razor-thin races. >
I’m very happy that Raphael Warnock is still in the running, and I’m inspired by so many wins we’ve already seen.
Here in Massachusetts, we flipped the governor’s seat and elected my friend Maura Healey — a woman who fights to protect working families and has gone toe to toe with for-profit colleges and Big Oil. And we passed a ballot measure to fund public education and transportation by raising taxes just a few cents on each dollar of income over a million dollars — investing in opportunity for all.
In Michigan, this team helped pass a ballot measure enshrining reproductive freedom into the state constitution. And you helped elect outstanding Democrats across the country. Here are just a few that I emailed you about recently:
* John Fetterman flipped a Republican-held Senate seat in Pennsylvania, giving us a path towards expanding our majority.
* Maggie Hassan won her Senate re-election campaign in New Hampshire.
* Tony Evers earned a second term as Wisconsin’s governor.
* Josh Shapiro won Pennsylvania’s gubernatorial race.
* Nikki Budzinski and Summer Lee delivered victories in hotly contested House elections.

And even though their general elections weren’t the most suspenseful, it was terrific to see progressive champions like Maxwell Alejandro Frost, Becca Balint, Delia Ramirez, Greg Casar, and Jasmine Crockett win after we supported them in their House primaries earlier this year.
Now, we also saw some tough losses. I wish Mandela Barnes were on his way to the Senate. I wish Stacey Abrams were on her way to the governor’s mansion. I wish Michelle Vallejo were on her way to the House. I’m deeply grateful for how they fought their hearts out, built grassroots campaigns, and inspired supporters who will be ready to jump into the next fight, and the fight after that.
There are more races still up in the air — from Jamie McLeod-Skinner and Andrea Salinas in Oregon to Catherine Cortez-Masto in Nevada.
But we’ve got a lot to be proud of. Experts kept saying that we were in for a “red wave” no matter what. They kept insisting that Democrats had no chance. But we didn’t whimper. We didn’t whine. We fought back. And we won big races across the country.
**Here’s the way I see it: No matter what the pundits predict, we always have the power to shape our democracy. I’m grateful down to my toes for everyone who rolled up their sleeves and didn’t back down. When we persist together, we win together.**
[_**And we’ve got another chance to win together by re-electing Raphael Warnock in his runoff on December 6. His campaign is running through the finish line with no break — let’s help them turn out every possible vote. Split a donation between Raphael Warnock and Warren Democrats today if you can.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54434418/378511501/721223710?refcode=EMZ10D_TAN_E_20221110_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODdkNzI1OS00OTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACvh_J3tzfrlq_LKzHX9JyBTNRip7GEsOeRaYradZhU=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

body:
VoteVets was one of the leading outside spending groups in the last election, and we’re going to have a role to play in Georgia as well.
#
Derek -
VoteVets was one of the leading outside spending groups in the last election, and we’re going to have a role to play in Georgia as well.
Not only will we work to turn out Democratic and independent veterans for Warnock in the runoff, we’ll have a statewide role as well.
Remember, when we ran our first ad hammering Herschel Walker for profiting off a business that pushed veterans into wrong treatment programs and scammed the government, we moved the polls several points.
And we know it was us, because we were the only big independent expenditure on the air at that point.
There’s only a few weeks here, so not a lot of time. And that’s why we have to ask again today:
[**Can you please rush a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We will put it right to work ensuring Senator Warnock wins re-election in the Georgia runoff.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221110-1-15&t=1&akid=7136%2E3013755%2ElLe2FI)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
Peter,

I joined this race to give back to the country that has given my family and me
so much.

The U.S. gave me a home, a flag to stand under, and an opportunity. I’ve been
committed to returning the favor ever since.

I am incredibly proud of our campaign and the movement we’ve started in VA10.
Thank you to all the voters, volunteers, neighbors, and friends who entrusted
me with your support.

In Liberty,

CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)

Former Navy Special Operations

Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10)

name: Caroline Colarusso for Congress
subject: We Need Confidence in Our Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caroline Colarusso for Congress
body:
| | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JO-9Q--hj_niGvDFmg-jNDKHoJixQIuWB0LxKjYeXo7lRI32IDchvnUa_WTi3CPw3ukPoheK96fcx6KmARKmN5uqMb34y3MGG_dETagQtXwPhLGZZWVvBcaI3T7kE0uQPRah43BNZQof_Kcgl88LDA==&c=xoDsWqzPdu55BpwCdpzgiRByDuNzA5KLELbZjO7-XQCOYT4TDFzajg==&ch=JoEttAVqdvd04szbimCRZm3gnB9QWC5BQYj8Z2kY11AcwLChBM3m_g==)
---
| We Must Stay in the Fight We Must Have Confidence in Our Elections (Video Above)
---
| Dear Friend and Supporter,
After working so intensely with you over the last several months, we were all disappointed as we watched the election results for our state and for our country. Many expected a big red wave that didn't really happen. As a result people are left scratching their heads.
When we consider Democrats as a whole, including my opponent, Katherine Clark, refused to debate their challengers, failed to campaign, and in many instances, never even asked for votes, yet they cruised to re-election. Right now in our country we have record inflation, record gas prices, record crime, impending war, overdoses, open borders and a collapse of civil society with murder are on the rise everywhere. Economic conditions were set for Republican victories - people vote their wallets in midterms. Yet the results seem not to resonate with voters.
Many will rationalize this situation simply because Republicans took back the House and the Biden agenda will be stopped. That in and of itself, is very significant, but we cannot rest on our laurels. We must stay strong, and we must stay in the fight, especially here in Massachusetts.
I want you to know that I do not intend to give up or walk away from this fight to save our great country - one district, one state at a time. Winners never quit and quitters never win. I will stay in the fight. I hope you do too.
I believe our number one priority right now is to strive to establish trust and confidence in our election system. Much of the massive overhauling or our election process passed stealthily under the guise of COVID-19, and this reality has left many people questioning the authenticity of the process.
Just in the 5th District of Massachusetts alone, we identified 30,000 people who have notified the United States Postal Service that they have permanently moved, yet they remain on the voter rolls to this day. These people received ballot applications by mail sent to their homes from the Secretary of State. Complaints that highlight these discrepancies were filed with several city and town clerks from voters in the 5th District under a provision in Massachusetts law which allows voters to challenge to voter rolls. Sadly in most cases these complaints were casually dismissed by city/town officials. In other words no effort was made to determine if these voters had in fact moved like they said they did. If so they would be ineligible to vote. It seems as if no one cared enough to do their job.
It is the responsibility of every local elected official to ensure that there is a mechanism in place to instill confidence, authenticate and maintain clean voter rolls, and be transparent and forthright with the public. In my opinion and based on this recent experience, none of this exists right now in Massachusetts. We must hold them accountable.
Over the next weeks and months, I will spend time learning how other states and counties who are doing this well actually achieve their success. I plan on keeping you informed and up to date on my findings. I believe that fair elections are the foundation of our great Republic. We must have confidence in the process in order to keep voters engaged and encouraged.
Thank You, Caroline Colarusso Paid for by Caroline Colarusso for Congress
---
| |
---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso for Congress | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

name: NextGen PAC
subject: What we achieved together in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; http://nextgenpac
body:
| | Friend, **We did it!** Thanks to you and the fired-up youth across Pennsylvania, we were able to save our democracy and make history along the way. Voters across Pennsylvania marched to the polls and cast their ballots for candidates that will help move us forward with progressive agendas. Thanks to voters like you and the determined youth across Pennsylvania, we were able to elect these NextGen PAC-endorsed candidates into office:
* John Fetterman - U.S. Senate
* Josh Shapiro - Governor
* Austin Davis - Lt. Governor
* Susan Wild - U.S. House, PA-07
* Matt Cartwright - U.S. House, PA-08
* Summer Lee - U.S. House, PA-12
* Chris Deluzio - U.S. House, PA-17

With hard work and perseverance, we were able to turn out the youth vote and beat expectations! We’ve always known that there is strength in our numbers, and we just proved that (again) this Election Day. Together, we flipped a U.S. Senate seat, held key Democrat-controlled House seats, elected the first Black Lt. Governor in PA history, flipped the state House blue for the first time in more than a decade, and showed up in record numbers that we haven’t seen since 2018. While we get to celebrate this amazing victory together, this was simply a step in the right direction. Our work does not stop here. In the next few days, we’re going to make sure every vote is counted to ensure that every single voice has been heard. And today, we’re taking a moment to acknowledge the tireless work of our youth volunteers, organizers, and activists across the country. Tomorrow, we’re getting right back to it — we’re just getting started. Onward, NextGen PAC
---
| **NextGen America**

This can't wait, friend: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
[**If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Kirsten Gillibrand so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54435024/378514330/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3760-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTAxZTNjYi00YzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e57H2Sau902YpiPSiZ6YjIYmmTIMknzRarAEemsA6OE=)

subject: The Red Wave Goodbye to Republicans

body:
https://www.lashrecseaird.com [https://www.lashrecseaird.com]
Friends,
By now you’ve heard the so-called “Red Wave” was actually a wave goodbye to MAGA extremism. All the pundits and right wing politicians predicted a red tsunami.
All of them were wrong.
Americans showed up and handed President Biden the best sitting Presidential mid-term performance in nearly 40 years. And abortion access led as the top issue Americans cared about. In fact, just look at this remarkable chart showing how liberal and conservative Americans alike support women and reproductive health access.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
Here in Virginia we are not out of the woods yet. We have a right wing Governor and an anti-choice Democrat ready to join forces to oppress women's rights to basic healthcare and health safety.
We will stop them.
Together, we will accomplish in Virginia what Americans accomplished nationally, and that is wave goodbye to MAGA extremists who try to deny women our human rights.
Congrats to all of you on this midterm victory. Now let’s get to work in Virginia!
Sincerely,
Lashrecse

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zimm=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Till Next Time...
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| **Message from Christian Zimm -**

I first want to congratulate Congresswoman Nikema Williams on her re-election.
After living in Atlanta for the past ten years, I’ve experienced first-hand the rapid decline of the city that I love. I knew that now was the time to get more involved and advocate for change in my community in a **bold way**. After discussing with my family, I knew that running for the United States House of Representatives for Georgia’s 5th Congressional District would have the most impact on getting Metro Atlanta back on the right track.
We knew from the beginning of this campaign that this race would be difficult,_ _ but I firmly believe that if something is important enough to you, **you should still try** even if success is unlikely.
I want to thank the over 51,000 people who entrusted me with their vote, as representing your voice in this campaign has been the honor of my life. Even though we were not victorious, our campaign did make history.
I hope my candidacy inspires more young people to take on the daunting challenges of not just politics, but also life. **Be bold and take chances, you are capable of more than you think. **
As for me, I will return to practicing law and advocating for Buckhead residents the right to vote on cityhood.
Till next time...
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | Message from Christian Zimm - I first want to congratulate Congresswoman Nikema Williams on her re-election. After living in Atlanta for the past ten years, I’ve experienced first-hand the rapid decline of the city that I love. I knew that now was the time to get more involved and advocate for change in my community in a bold way. After discussing with my family, I knew that running for the United States House of Representatives for Georgia’s 5th Congressional District would have the most impact on getting Metro Atlanta back on the right track. We knew from the beginning of this campaign that this race would be difficult, but I firmly believe that if something is important enough to you, you should still try even if success is unlikely. I want to thank the over 51,000 people who entrusted me with their vote, as representing your voice in this campaign has been the honor of my life. Even though we were not victorious, our campaign did make history. I hope my candidacy inspires more young people to take on the daunting challenges of not just politics, but also life. Be bold and take chances, you are capable of more than you think. As for me, I will return to practicing law and advocating for Buckhead residents the right to vote on cityhood. Till next time... | | | | Follow Christian's campaign on social media | | | | | | | | | | | | | Authorized by Christian Zimm for Congress, Inc. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Christian Zimm for U.S. Congress, All rights reserved. clean_body: It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. | Team,

Arizonans turned out in large numbers this election and county recorders across the state are still counting votes in a lot of races. To be clear – that’s what happens in a healthy democracy!

We’re being patient, waiting for all Arizonans who voted to be heard. But far-right forces are already amplifying disinformation and casting doubt on this completely fair and transparent process. **One AZ GOP candidate actually already tried to declare victory, and GOP lawyers are already hinting at legal actions.**

We appreciate everything you did for us this election. But we are still doing the work every day and need your help to keep things going.

**[If you can donate anything additional so we can keep working hard to contact voters who may have had an issue with their ballots and make sure every vote is counted, we’d appreciate it.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDtOeNwmpjImtA3FJgkDSPCph74maLX4kcK6OFkUIiby7FPJ8h3kr6IRFJoiRawKUTihJgMxDB3gHDnT4f26WsgEZ49Fl9lSswqnl5v1NU9JXHPKkcog0h9BNIhrPJC24agLTx1wETSVD5Z3Dj7jktIiy7i7t60YavfTfVStU7Ui9LBfOHeehhQ5EbrXng-1B7acryPxWbugwcGMFKHL4idHzQlTUWg9WMMxqz-v-3PuatoLKjTj_XcUqlLwYcIOaG_5qHnv7QL4I1DqlPaiiJ6KqglrBG1MwUh-Bj_0lhkEkpJZx8Rk5k19LwDa6TEK0Kx5DoVN20BBPKPstoT3-rIw/3r1/r5XSR0UQRUyAyDbPuctyiA/h1/0cujHVaRM7f0BHgpjCbUVTnlEOpF5VVac9te2iDxdMA)**

clean_body: | | | We need all hands on deck | | | Team, Arizonans turned out in large numbers this election and county recorders across the state are still counting votes in a lot of races. To be clear – that’s what happens in a healthy democracy! We’re being patient, waiting for all Arizonans who voted to be heard. But far-right forces are already amplifying disinformation and casting doubt on this completely fair and transparent process. One AZ GOP candidate actually already tried to declare victory, and GOP lawyers are already hinting at legal actions. We appreciate everything you did for us this election. But we are still doing the work every day and need your help to keep things going. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**
My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.
Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask: **
**[Please, friend, will you chip in $5 or more right now to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign so we can keep Georgia blue and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54410047/378475235/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5052-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE4MGQ1ZS0yNjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-SByxO3FgQmOPqPidGqfNK_1S7SC79plBQXb_DnzaU=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54410048/378475236/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5052-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE4MGQ1ZS0yNjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-SByxO3FgQmOPqPidGqfNK_1S7SC79plBQXb_DnzaU=)
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win – now more than ever.**
**[So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more to become one of the 25,000 Founding Donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54410049/378475237/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5052-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE4MGQ1ZS0yNjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-SByxO3FgQmOPqPidGqfNK_1S7SC79plBQXb_DnzaU=)**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend,
I'm reaching out because my race is not over.
Votes are still being counted, and my opponent and I are locked in a dead heat. With margins this thin, it's very likely that we will find ourselves in a recount.
Between abortion rights and the future of Social Security & Medicare, this seat is too important to leave up to chance. But I'll be honest: without your support now, my campaign might not have the resources to take on this battle properly.
This district could go either way. Will you help ensure that every vote is properly counted by rushing a donation now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_111022_Recount]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_111022_Recount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_111022_Recount]
I appreciate you!
— Kirsten

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

clean_body: It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: This race isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. clean_body: It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Peter, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: Young Democrats of America
subject: Arizona, Nevada, and Georgia need your help right now!
body:
Come bring this one home! | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zneICC3WbffXvmgWY96ebhKDUTEjMtCGf07ruurLnweOvOlarTZg7sDOrc4haOv8gGiy7YvNhhsrgkBR2rLFXgT3mmlM65tP3JATZpyjqgesN4OJiFgyiDhrcEHPj1XHLeQeBdEwwjCxZDbR3fDJI5KmJixVDJef21N_JiyHscA09fUmm4_LBqIbFn0gVlQZAWBlomQh2bnWckKoYnKbj5UGtjcCD_6NvXwQ8hhCuTvqf3IQX2utCgvwUEDrOXWRWvdb0Q3YyX866OlJ2HKOIVKb8lJ_wL4IT_ADlY6g8hF7F-ts-RB87CAHyOyGoQ4FY/3r1/VXz3iIWmSlCYcSR1DSq-LA/h0/VxON7sEbPZnDL9kVCY9EoBmxiv57fQykA-e68Q5X-yM)

Hey Derek! We are just as excited as you are for how the elections turned out on Tuesday, **but there are Democrats in Arizona and Nevada that still need your help.** Arizona and Nevada are two key states where we need to hold onto Senate seats to hold onto and also key states where whoever holds the Governor's mansion can assure that electoral votes are counted fairly in the 2024 presidential election. So we are asking you to help our friends in Arizona and Nevada to make sure that these ballots get counted now!

clean_body: Come bring this one home! | | Hey Derek! We are just as excited as you are for how the elections turned out on Tuesday, but there are Democrats in Arizona and Nevada that still need your help. Arizona and Nevada are two key states where we need to hold onto Senate seats to hold onto and also key states where whoever holds the Governor's mansion can assure that electoral votes are counted fairly in the 2024 presidential election. So we are asking you to help our friends in Arizona and Nevada to make sure that these ballots get counted now! If you can't volunteer as this time, donate to us so we can help Young Democrats who want to volunteer in Georgia. We're making plans to send people out to Georgia and we want to help them get there. Can you help us out by giving anything you can right now? Even just $25 right now would greatly appreciate it. So much is still on the line in this election and we still have to win these states. It's not over until it's over. Let's bring this one home! | | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840421:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840421:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840422:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840423:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840424:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840421:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840421:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840421:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840421:6v1nO6GUN:m:1:3369487795:FC006531BDFF974F66F05B85F3DA7D13:r)

name: Gwen S. Moore (personal)
subject: Thank you Wisconsin!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
This is it!| | |
---
My Sisters and Brothers, I am so grateful for your continued support and am honored to be your voice in Washington. While it was a great night for Wisconsin incumbents, we always knew the U.S. Senate race would be incredibly close. Mandela Barnes defied the pundits and delivered one of the closest margins from a challenge in recent history. There is no question that his campaign helped solidify Democratic gains throughout the state. Mandela moved Wisconsin forward. We’ve made progress, and we’ve got more progress to make in the next two years. I know we can do it together. Thank you again for your support.
---
Together, #WeRepresent! Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: This is it!| | | My Sisters and Brothers, I am so grateful for your continued support and am honored to be your voice in Washington. While it was a great night for Wisconsin incumbents, we always knew the U.S. Senate race would be incredibly close. Mandela Barnes defied the pundits and delivered one of the closest margins from a challenge in recent history. There is no question that his campaign helped solidify Democratic gains throughout the state. Mandela moved Wisconsin forward. We’ve made progress, and we’ve got more progress to make in the next two years. I know we can do it together. Thank you again for your support. Together, #WeRepresent! Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. Peter Willis,

The results of the Georgia runoff on
December 6th could determine who controls the Senate, and Republicans have
made it clear they will spend whatever they need to beat Senator Warnock
and install Trump’s handpicked choice, Herschel Walker.

The only way to defeat their coming surge of spending on propaganda is
through organizing, which is why Our Revolution is going all-in on turning
out the vote in Georgia.

Our targeted voter outreach work in 2020 boosted turnout by 11% to help
Senator Warnock win his first Georgia runoff. On Tuesday, we proved our
power once again by delivering PA for John Fetterman.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8004?t=1012&akid=3718%2E5885482%2EGBS2Zo ]We can win this election — and win the Senate — if we invest in
organizing. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us cut through

name: Mark Warner
subject: We stopped the “red wave” – but the fight isn’t over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Votes are still being counted

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54436971/378539783/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg3YTM4NC01YjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px8VZPEYWAOg6mlajf87NSCmtThYjAGdsqxlxDTPlKw=&emci=8af5847f-4961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=d487a384-5b61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=4568237)

| | I want to take a moment to say thank you, Derek. Because of your support, we were able to stop the so-called “red wave” we’d all been hearing about. Things are still close in races all across the country, but we have reason for hope and more work to do. We took a tough loss in Virginia, but we need to take a moment and celebrate our wins. In Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, you sent Abigail Spanberger back to Congress, and in the 10th District you reelected Jennifer Wexton. Thanks to you, we kept these critical districts blue – so Reps. Spanberger and Wexton can keep on fighting for Virginia in the House. We also secured huge wins in the Senate, helping John Fetterman flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat and holding on to Maggie Hassan’s seat in New Hampshire. I sent you a lot of emails over the past year asking you to step up and help win these crucial races, and the response was tremendous. These victories would not have been possible without your constant support and contributions. But votes are still being counted in states that will determine Senate control. In Arizona and Nevada, _**[Mark Kelly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54436972/378539784/-1858219671?refcode=mw_em_221110_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg3YTM4NC01YjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px8VZPEYWAOg6mlajf87NSCmtThYjAGdsqxlxDTPlKw=)**_ and _[**Catherine Cortez Masto**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54436973/378539785/-1659689791?refcode=mw_em_221110_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg3YTM4NC01YjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px8VZPEYWAOg6mlajf87NSCmtThYjAGdsqxlxDTPlKw=)_ are fighting to make sure every vote is counted. And in Georgia, _**[Raphael Warnock’s must-win Senate race](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54436974/378539786/745007686?refcode=mw_em_221110_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg3YTM4NC01YjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px8VZPEYWAOg6mlajf87NSCmtThYjAGdsqxlxDTPlKw=)**_ is going to a runoff next month. These are just a preview of the battles coming our way and I’ll be in touch with ways you can help in these races that will determine control of the Senate. So I want to thank you again for everything you have done this election cycle, for Democrats in these key races, and for our country. I’ve always been able to count on you to elect Democratic champions around the country so we can keep fighting for progress. Thank you for your support, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54436975/378539787/1910516189?refcode=mw_em_221110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg3YTM4NC01YjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px8VZPEYWAOg6mlajf87NSCmtThYjAGdsqxlxDTPlKw=)**

clean_body: Votes are still being counted | | | I want to take a moment to say thank you, Derek. Because of your support, we were able to stop the so-called “red wave” we’d all been hearing about. Things are still close in races all across the country, but we have reason for hope and more work to do. We took a tough loss in Virginia, but we need to take a moment and celebrate our wins. In Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, you sent Abigail Spanberger back to Congress, and in the 10th District you reelected Jennifer Wexton. Thanks to you, we kept these critical districts blue – so Reps. Spanberger and Wexton can keep on fighting for Virginia in the House. We also secured huge wins in the Senate, helping John Fetterman flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat and holding on to Maggie Hassan’s seat in New Hampshire. I sent you a lot of emails over the past year asking you to step up and help win these crucial races, and the response was tremendous. These victories would not have been possible without your constant support and contributions. But votes are still being counted in states that will determine Senate control. In Arizona and Nevada, = and = are fighting to make sure every vote is counted. And in Georgia, = is going to a runoff next month. These are just a preview of the battles coming our way and I’ll be in touch with ways you can help in these races that will determine control of the Senate. So I want to thank you again for everything you have done this election cycle, for Democrats in these key races, and for our country. I’ve always been able to count on you to elect Democratic champions around the country so we can keep fighting for progress. Thank you for your support, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

As we saw on Tuesday, Rev. Warnock’s race will be extremely close, which means that every Democrat we’re able to reach between now and December 6th will be critical in keeping this seat blue.

name: George S. Logan
subject: I want to thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN
body:
|

---

Fellow American,

With the election coming to an end, I am sad to say that we did not come out victorious.

I want to thank you for your tremendous support over the last 15 months. Your dedication to me and my campaign means the absolute world. We were able to build a national campaign from scratch, and I will always be grateful.

Although we weren’t able to flip this seat red, I will never stop serving the great people of this district.

I don’t know what the future has in store, but I know this isn’t a goodbye.

Never stop fighting for your voice, Fellow American!

All my best,

George S. Logan

| | PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN
FOR CONGRESS
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Liz Cheney got her revenge. Trump was embarrassed. McCarthy will either lose his dream of being Speaker … or get it and live in hell. And other updates …
body:
Did you see this news?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf44ea8ed-b6a1-46f7-adfc-0550101ae988/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, **Thank you for being a part of our community.** As folks who are politically active, I wanted to share some interesting facts about this election in this mini-newsletter: * First, I did a video at my Youtube channel, The Takedown, on how [Liz Cheney must be laughing and loving life right now](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04d7b718-4aaa-4ed4-8060-be7eda5df2df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). After Kevin McCarthy kicked her out of GOP House Leadership for voting for Trump's impeachment, Trump supported a primary opponent who was able to beat her in her House race in very conservative Wyoming. But, not only did Cheney play a key role in the January 6th Committee, which clearly hurt Republicans, but she endorsed a few key House members in some of the most targeted seats in the country--including Dem Reps Abigail Spanberger (VA) and Elissa Slotkin (MI). Republicans wanted those seats, maybe even needed them. And they lost them. This means McCarthy will end up not getting his majority, or will end up with a 2-5 seat majority, and his life will be hell the next two years. Can you imagine having to rely on Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, Paul Gosar, Andy Biggs and Clay Higgins for anything? Any day they don't sit rocking in a corner is a good day for them. Cheney got her revenge. Trump was embarrassed. McCarthy will lose his dream of being Speaker ... or get it and live in hell. [You can watch more about it here! Enjoy!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b58b76f-675c-4df7-8287-6c2d25161dd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **Lauren Boebert [still seems on the cusp of losing](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3718e30-29f7-4d47-82da-11d866683b47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** (happy, happy, joy, joy!), with remaining votes coming in from Pueblo County, where Adam Frisch has been strong. We will let you know as soon as we know more. Again, enjoy!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support The Count: Adam Frisch vs. Lauren Boebert**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86078eef-4ce8-439e-bd22-5d8f3f31be8e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| * Maryland elected its first Black Governor, the incredibly talented Wes Moore. We re-elected key Democratic Governors, including Tony Evers (WI) and Gretchen Whitmer (MI), who will protect ballots in the 2024 election. In Whitmer's case, along with her new majorities in both the state house and state senate! Michigan & Minnesota will now show what can be done when we holde the governorship & both chambers. If you remember how that went in Virginia in 2017--on climate, gun safety, voting, abortion rights & much more--get excited! This was no Red Wave, [it was a Blue Crush, folks](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd61b2c4-8d23-4126-bf3a-4a93de5a23f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! body:
With the help of this grassroots team we... | | |

| | We made history this week. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221110-3606-header&t=1&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)
I just want to say _thank you_.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this — we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far — which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: [Will you make a $3 right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221110-2.nnX0mQ&refcode=em20221110-3606-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221110-2.nnX0mQ&refcode=em20221110-3606-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:** [Will you make a $3 or more donation right now to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221110-2.nnX0mQ&refcode=em20221110-3606-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)
Thank you for your support.
— Rev. Raphael Warnock

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221110-2?refcode=em20221110-3606-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=23&refcode2=3606_2526796_heIwSI&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221110-3606-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=24&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3606%2E2526796%2EheIwSI)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: The Rev
subject: I've got 15 minutes between meetings, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54416944/378493112/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4869-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwNjZlZi0zMjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymysnp3KnwACnqDY4qIo_bqySzJ1sMa-0dk8ARl8L-0=)
---
I've got 15 minutes in between meetings, friend, so I thought I'd send a quick note to you about the state of our race.
All eyes are on Georgia, and experts are saying this runoff election could decide Senate control. While it's worrying, my focus has been, and always will be, getting things done for Georgians and bettering our nation.
But while I'm working in the Senate to lower costs for hardworking families, defend voting rights, and more, my opponent, Herschel Walker, is busying himself with fancy fundraisers and rallies alongside Donald Trump.
Now, the GOP is doubling down. They'll do and spend whatever it takes to flip my seat; GOP super PACs have already launched round after round of attack ads against me.

**I'm in this fight to serve the people – not politicians like Trump. No big checks from corporate PACs. No extremist rhetoric or conspiracies. But with the race this close, I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support to fight back and win.**

**[Will you please chip in $5 or more today to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54416945/378493113/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4869-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwNjZlZi0zMjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymysnp3KnwACnqDY4qIo_bqySzJ1sMa-0dk8ARl8L-0=)**
Thank you for everything you do. Your support truly means everything to me, and importantly, is how we'll win.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
Liliana and I would like to share our sincerest gratitude with each and every one of the so many people we met along the campaign trail | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/thelanderforcongress/after-action-report?e=f8a0a76a2b)

---
|
---
|
# TEAM THELANDER AFTER-ACTION REPORT
---
| | Liliana and I would like to share our sincerest gratitude with each and every one of the so many people we met along the campaign trail over the past 16 months. We are truly humbled by all the support you showed us!

The farmers, fishermen and foresters. The doctors, lawyers and teachers. The veterans, retirees and college students. First responders, police, active-duty servicemembers. Engineers, rocket scientists and stone masons. It feels like we’ve taken a crash-course in studying the backbone of Maine, and we’re happy to report that the spine of Maine is strong!

But it also needs to be protected from the relentless assault coming at it by many forces. The policies of our current leadership are creating unchecked inflation. Their purely ideological decisions are putting basic necessities like heating oil and building supplies out of reach for everyone.

A lack of common sense and honest risk assessment is putting Maine’s iconic lobster industry on the verge of total collapse. They are merely giving our lobstermen and women enough money to buy their own handcuffs for a crime they haven’t committed. This failure of leadership is inexcusable. Now is not the time to throw our hands up in defeat and walk away from the fight.

We need to rebuild the Republican brand in Maine, and the nation. If we are to live up to the vision of the GOP as the Party of The Big Tent, we’ll need to embrace and welcome all those who embrace the responsible freedoms outlined in our Declaration of Independence and protected by our Constitution.

In that spirit, we’re excited to continue the work of bringing people together, to meet them wherever they gather, and to listen to their concerns and ideas. This fight is not over! While we may have left it all on the field, we are still at the far end of the pitch. There is plenty of work to do. If you are able to do so yourself, run for local office. Find and support strong candidates. Earn a seat on your local school board to ensure that our children are getting an education that meets both your expectations and your values. Keep engaged, and encourage those around you to do the same.
We all sacrificed much for this campaign. Many took time off of work to volunteer – Collecting signatures, attending events, entering data and compiling lists, knocking on doors, staffing booths at fairs and the convention, being "the driver", putting up and waving signs and flags, joining endless Zoom meetings, making phone calls, writing letters and sharing posts, poll watching and counting ballots, and so much more! Many donated their hard-earned money. To each of you, our entire family says, “Thank you!”
We have also put a considerable amount of our own savings into this effort. [If you can find it in your hearts, and your personal budgets, to kick in one more time, we would be grateful](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=93a77e832a&e=f8a0a76a2b). We plan to continue in this important battle for our state and our nation, and would be able to move forward on much more solid footing with your continued support. Our campaign donation page is now a debt-cancellation page. [Thank you for considering making one more visit there](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=fc266b33f7&e=f8a0a76a2b).

For those of you collecting our many thousands of lawn signs, we will be collecting them this Saturday at the Maine Republican Party State Committee meeting in Augusta. The location is the [Calumet Club, 334 W. River Road](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=75ef4a0ddc&e=f8a0a76a2b). While the meeting itself is open only to committee members and their guests, we’ll be there with the campaign trailer between 10:00 am and Noon. You’ll notice that we elected not to place the year 2022 on the signs. If they’re in good shape, we’ll store them for potential future use. Or you can reach out to your GOP County Chair, or simply keep them safe in your own garage should we need them later.

Again, thank you all from the bottom of our hearts! We fought the good fight, but it was only the first.

The Only Easy Day Was Yesterday!

Sincerely,
-Liliana and Ed Thelander
---

But it also needs to be protected from the relentless assault coming at it by many forces. The policies of our current leadership are creating unchecked inflation. name: Team John James
subject: We’ve won MI-10!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
It's been a long and hard-fought race, and now...| | |
---
| | Peter, It's been a long and hard-fought race, but the results are in, and we've won!
---
---
Throughout this race people have shared their hardships and today they have spoken. They have chosen experienced leadership. Help is on the way. I am humbled and grateful for the support and the trust of the people of the 10th Congressional District and across the country. We will lower prices, protect our jobs and make our communities safer. I will not let you down! Let’s Fly,John James **P.S**. Did you catch John’s victory interview on _Fox New_ s? name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters . Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837600:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837600:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837601:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837602:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837603:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a runoff supporter?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837600:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837600:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837600:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837604:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837605:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837606:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837607:Jw3e06GNo:m:1:3373497171:361F1A50772FB64CC9438FC76527BD85:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840438:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840438:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840439:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840440:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840441:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840438:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840438:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840438:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840438:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840442:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840443:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840444:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61840445:JUmbR6GRN:m:1:3331703221:68F32BACDAE2D5E2DD74D6D0BA526D97:r)

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Raphael Warnock is going to a runoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
