name: Sam, Democrats.org
subject: Derek, I could not be more grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The common denominator for all of our investments is the early and frequent support of this grassroots team. | |
---
Derek, we don’t know which party will control the House or the Senate yet. We didn’t expect to have an answer Tuesday night, and it sounds like we won’t know for a little while longer. But I wanted to take a minute to send you an email. **It’s clear to me that grassroots donations from this team made a tremendous impact Tuesday night.** While we’re still waiting for all the results to come in, here’s what we already know: Tuesday was a good day for democracy and a good day for America. And it’s because of every single one of you. You all donated your hard-earned time and money this midterm election cycle, and I could not be more grateful. I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain exactly what you made possible:
* **Because of you, the DNC was able to invest heavily on the ground earlier than ever before.** In 2018, we invested just $30 million on the ground -- _this year we spent three times that._ We invested nearly $90 million into states, organizing programs, voter protection, and Democratic staff across the country. That’s incredible!
* **Because of you, we were able to make a historic investment in voter protection work.** Working with our sister committees and state parties, Democrats were able to have Voter Protection Directors in 25 states and more than 100 total voter protection staff on the ground nationwide ahead of Election Day 2022. A powerful program that no doubt protected and mobilized many voters.
* **Because of you, Derek, we also were able to share our message directly with voters as early as _last March._** We ensured voters knew what President Biden and Democrats had accomplished. We made investments on the ground in organizing and mobilizing supporters around key moments, from the ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , to the president’s signing of the _Inflation Reduction Act_. Ahead of Election Day, we made a historic eight-figure investment in advertising efforts online and media directed at voters who were key to our winning coalition this midterm election cycle. Let me be crystal clear, nearly the entirety of our paid media work to communicate Democratic accomplishments and draw contrasts with Republicans went into core Democratic communities and communities of color.

I could go on and on, but the common denominator for all of our investments is the early and frequent support of this grassroots team. As we await the final results, I hope you feel proud and hopeful. I know that I do. I also need you to know that our fight -- both this year and in the years ahead -- is far from over. While we’ve made incredible strides, I am counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will elect Democrats in years to come. We are strong, but lasting political power means we have to get right back to the work at hand. **[Will you make your first donation of the year to the DNC to help our party build on our progress in the coming months and years?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJE7PJ47fhofaR393EBUfmj5TVxbNt8eWlmayyUdP6hcuoNa_1BtjqU1KwkK4pYevzsRSmH7SIlGH0rh8QGuuHOdXqQlOwUSQBbQyRxSEkZTk3ihrcLOuAcinfVIY6vvvKGnSAkag8Ae3DB9tR6B0MEBrEYCSxWgHCMrqqDPVynhbc6SbSqmfAGVYPgiRUryK9fxfGmz135jEe8dRGTwygyJXv__xcxhJoh8qDg9jtNsboTs83KIq_hTXsJTAesgTJiH64idqwkULCeXhstuTx_y3v5btbSl325mlmpqVSA1iXSVE6IZavnQ9mxPd1RJcW7OPElcAH8ku9Ggl6dmclfBrNkxq5XHEMzJ0gUEwPyE8OcAi3X-u7YsD6cfazc8ne4MR6ZUTYTWYqCM7W5Bx2y6eaoPf74p15xieKP5MTh6HKJhN0TeRsxUJXKGP5qVVxA-CmBITvT8a2LMs1iEeH-tWMBENjIDZ3-o4mmTu5K57L5CHGlC7FeYJDBc0qOTr2Q9MQ-pCJ5wONaeLrHbmJ2rzWBBGSDm6kF72qyfae55Vu0E7eeKBNnkHEzPdUCx3yaHxFle-ZwUEnJlwKQZJUsZZXTksO1xBNLd1ukr8mro3cjC5EIz5uYIdPQigD1eol7efeIcaH1P-XWQc4Bdq3rIXNobzoHQ1VkkG8T_o-WOXpVhbzNWJFz2BKkd0PML7nOIA88u8cxuFc4kplidCwQw/3r1/TGpdDLWrSv6puLSOudW3xA/h0/EtyJ9ZuPeRDMp41IkSxy05f74joRE_V-59yX71eK9ME)** Thanks for everything you’ve done and will continue to do. In 2018, we invested just $30 million on the ground -- this year we spent three times that. We invested nearly $90 million into states, organizing programs, voter protection, and Democratic staff across the country. That’s incredible! Because of you, we were able to make a historic investment in voter protection work. Working with our sister committees and state parties, Democrats were able to have Voter Protection Directors in 25 states and more than 100 total voter protection staff on the ground nationwide ahead of Election Day 2022. A powerful program that no doubt protected and mobilized many voters. Because of you, Derek, we also were able to share our message directly with voters as early as last March. We ensured voters knew what President Biden and Democrats had accomplished. We made investments on the ground in organizing and mobilizing supporters around key moments, from the ruling overturning Roe v. Wade , to the president’s signing of the Inflation Reduction Act. Ahead of Election Day, we made a historic eight-figure investment in advertising efforts online and media directed at voters who were key to our winning coalition this midterm election cycle. Let me be crystal clear, nearly the entirety of our paid media work to communicate Democratic accomplishments and draw contrasts with Republicans went into core Democratic communities and communities of color. I could go on and on, but the common denominator for all of our investments is the early and frequent support of this grassroots team. As we await the final results, I hope you feel proud and hopeful. I know that I do. I also need you to know that our fight -- both this year and in the years ahead -- is far from over. While we’ve made incredible strides, I am counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will elect Democrats in years to come. We are strong, but lasting political power means we have to get right back to the work at hand. Thanks for everything you’ve done and will continue to do. It means a lot to me and to everyone at DNC HQ. More soon! Sam Sam Cornale Chief Executive Officer Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838953:6KFiR6GN7:m:1:3372944669:AC08EE9DE908986EA6B218B3C5C44F2B:r) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838953:6KFiR6GN7:m:1:3372944669:AC08EE9DE908986EA6B218B3C5C44F2B:r)**

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837334:JjQ3R6GtN:m:1:3374012347:E1D2DF0BE476C0D3B2D7959E4D689185:r)**

Read the entire memo . | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and DASS PAC so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22-warnock?refcode=EM_FR_111022_B2_WARNOCK_30AC&amount=5]
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election.
We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through:
Will you split $5 between me and DASS PAC right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22-warnock?refcode=EM_FR_111022_B2_WARNOCK_30AC&amount=5]

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race isn’t done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837737:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837737:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837738:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837739:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837740:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837737:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837737:JsN5R6GNG:m:1:3371220873:AE1AF233DF264A5CC51C26F33173F8DA:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Is this what you want?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838969:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838969:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838970:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838971:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838972:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838969:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838969:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838969:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61838969:JqJ5R6GIN:m:1:3373497171:5B9CAF38872A37E01C0A22B93F3B016D:r)

name: Mike & Myla, INDems
subject: Thank you from the Indiana Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Dear Hoosier Democrats, On behalf of our Democratic Party, we wanted to say thank you for your hard work and support this election cycle. Whether you volunteered, invested in our party, attended an event, or ran for office, we are grateful for you and your involvement. Despite running against an onslaught of outside money against us, we held the line and protected a number of targeted incumbents on Election Day, including Congressman Frank Mrvan who had a big win in northwest Indiana. We are all incredibly proud of all of our candidates who stepped up to run this year. Mayor Tom McDermott, Destiny Wells, ZeNai Brooks, and Jessica McClellan formed a historic statewide ticket and brought new energy and new ideas to our party. Many new Democrats put their names on ballots this year – from the precinct level to countywide to Congressional districts. Their growing engagement in our party is making us stronger. We have more work to do to rebuild our party so we can be more competitive and win more races. Next year’s municipal races are good opportunities for us to elect and reelect more Democratic community leaders across the state – and we continue to build on our approach of going everywhere and talking with everyone. When we became chair and vice-chair of the party last year, we set out to put in place a strategic plan to win by embarking on a new media approach, investing more in year-round organizing and party infrastructure, improving candidate recruitment, and building an INGOP War Room to call out extremism. This work continues and we will do a deep dive into this election so we can see what worked and where we need to grow. Everyone has a seat at that table. Indiana will be a stronger state and a better place to live and work when there is more balance at every level of Hoosier government: Federal, state, and local. We believe we will get there – it’s just a matter of time. Thank you again for your support. Mike Schmuhl, Chair
Myla Eldridge, Vice-Chair

name: James Carville
subject: Too close to call – here's what happens now:

| I've seen this too many times to recall – when battleground races come down to just a handful of votes, when it's too close to call. **That's what's happening in Nevada RIGHT NOW, and with Senate control on the line, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (D) needs our help right now.**

So, I'll keep this brief for ya: Winning now depends on Catherine's ability to get every last vote counted. Every. Single. One. **But that takes MAJOR resources after spending every last dime in one of the most expensive races in the country – so I've helped Catherine set up a $500,000 emergency response goal.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=778bb7fd590147288c598c21e392b1eb&_e=ajUdc6YTVkvwQFDzV2ob6Zi9lx4ggJbHmhRLHHPL4Y2vfhlOosB5rbLGBdN2eggtlR2wlLgfFxWeguESAzmj9nK48mOEEgv4zVB-ym7Moqo-5F6u8GSU3rPMH3VvRHoPkJADb1Gx71ev1ETnYlHOwopXDYm12LD1z9sfM40FZhm-XVe0osSms2WECLclYqFLaott-c6hNkbF78Vu2arXXs6xwP7nHb9p65IJHGrgnGALsb_7xayupS3NCEszuC5lNXomoK3Hgt-a5z1Emlykz2En9IZsjTAmwI5rdj5QFlqQ6Cz0uiXHJAJmIguP7prGmAxWa3qbwoABZpkU-5JSpRU1rJYs7CEHYLlpnMxKtkDKXvkgC2gAPbDp2bOL-ikvpDyLRdroxnH6_QJ6UiU54ta6mxzuz7slsPfw94YPWkBVsQ4--QvpxTbGsuUEP_Mw)

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

subject: An urgent update from Nevada

Friends,
Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested.**But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:** **[Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand, so we have the resources to count every vote and defeat our election-denying opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54438036/378552505/1368145142?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3759-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjJhNDc3MC02OTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HII4g2WnLNai9c3z1Knut2agGaioXWRo-oH594IF-1U=)**
My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election. With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted. But friends, our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. **Now, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:** **[Can you split $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand right now so we have the resources to count every last vote in our must-win race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54438037/378552506/1368145142?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3759-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjJhNDc3MC02OTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HII4g2WnLNai9c3z1Knut2agGaioXWRo-oH594IF-1U=)**

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could – just like last election cycle – have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brenda Siegel
subject: From the bottom of my heart
body:
| |
---
Friend, Susan B. Anthony gave her whole life to the work of voting rights for women. Her whole life. And then she died on the eve of its inevitability. The work is about making progress. Fighting for us to have safer, and stronger, communities. **** We ALL need to become brave enough to lose. All of us. **** [ICYMI: Watch Brenda’s full speech here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRNh_GwompgKlB8nbkfCVN35WfFPO3DOJVEV073KfeGCkuUv5MKANe0uO6ZYGsPhO2JhXamrGZCjaVv3vRjHJKkOGFbBOPZj4esfTrXwYJ95uOl0hUWtUsgSpO0xUoXg6bff-SKApnKVfrpNhhQothQ_T7oZaaQiLN5QHsFGSeUAkF51s0OUZsD3z5zZqdJZ5Ee9ksN1JULGMaifYII9cKBjTyp973jRUztid5EYukzAgGSsav2QLfCDB0SNzDtaqvA/3r1/Qe7A6ufwQi-XTKFQOzjaEA/h0/q9DG1HjxOBARgHRZPmyuvUo7n13HRZiscRuvdIAHors) We did what no other person was brave enough to do and we did it with all of you by our side. Thank you. I want to give a special thank you to my staff who took the same risk I did and did it bravely and for the right reasons. To fight for Vermonters. We may not have seen the outcome that we wanted to see, but, this campaign was in no way a loss. We accomplished so much together.
---
|
---
If we were not there beating the drum when VERAP and ERAP was cut off without notice, if I had feared at all speaking truth to power when this administration was ready to cause harm, we would not “found” $20 million. We would not have a new commissioner of DCF. And we would not see a scramble to do “something.” And we are not done yet. We broadcast that childcare money wasn’t getting out the door and now it is. And we are not done yet. We used a megaphone about the needs of our downtowns. And I am not done yet. We corrected the message on the clean heat standard and pushed for in state renewable energy. And I am not done yet. We shared bravely and explicitly about the overdose crisis and the need to move forward. We will get overdose prevention sites this year, because we were not afraid and because I am not done yet. I will need all of you by my side. We have to do this work together, alongside one another. This is the work that we have to do. To every person who told me that I was there only hope. Thank you, but that simply is not true. We are each others only hope and together we will move mountains. This is a tough moment for me and my team, but I am still standing and I know that together we will keep marching forward. This work is not done and neither am I. I am only just getting started. Thank you to all in Vermont and across the country who supported this campaign.
---
From my whole heart, thank you, Brenda Siegel [PS. We have just a small amount of money to raise to make sure we close out this campaign and can move forward to doing the peoples work. clean_body: | | Friend, Susan B. Anthony gave her whole life to the work of voting rights for women. Her whole life. And then she died on the eve of its inevitability. The work is about making progress. Fighting for us to have safer, and stronger, communities. ** We ALL need to become brave enough to lose. All of us. ** We did what no other person was brave enough to do and we did it with all of you by our side. Thank you. I want to give a special thank you to my staff who took the same risk I did and did it bravely and for the right reasons. To fight for Vermonters. We may not have seen the outcome that we wanted to see, but, this campaign was in no way a loss. We accomplished so much together. | If we were not there beating the drum when VERAP and ERAP was cut off without notice, if I had feared at all speaking truth to power when this administration was ready to cause harm, we would not “found” $20 million. We would not have a new commissioner of DCF. And we would not see a scramble to do “something.” And we are not done yet. We broadcast that childcare money wasn’t getting out the door and now it is. And we are not done yet. We used a megaphone about the needs of our downtowns. And I am not done yet. We corrected the message on the clean heat standard and pushed for in state renewable energy. And I am not done yet. We shared bravely and explicitly about the overdose crisis and the need to move forward. We will get overdose prevention sites this year, because we were not afraid and because I am not done yet. I will need all of you by my side. We have to do this work together, alongside one another. This is the work that we have to do. To every person who told me that I was there only hope. Thank you, but that simply is not true. We are each others only hope and together we will move mountains. This is a tough moment for me and my team, but I am still standing and I know that together we will keep marching forward. This work is not done and neither am I. I am only just getting started. Thank you to all in Vermont and across the country who supported this campaign. From my whole heart, thank you, Brenda Siegel If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Onward! Brenda | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

| Today, I am thrilled to share with you that I will be your next Congresswoman!

Thank you so much for your support. Whether you helped knock on doors and make calls, chipped in, or mobilized your friends and family to get out the vote, your work has made a significant impact.

I am so proud of our grassroots movement to deliver for North Carolina, and I am deeply appreciative of your support.

I am looking forward to sharing more with you about my important work and priorities in Congress in the coming weeks.

Thank you,

Valerie Foushee

clean_body: I am so proud of our grassroots movement to deliver for North Carolina, and I am deeply appreciative of your support. | # | Today, I am thrilled to share with you that I will be your next Congresswoman! Thank you so much for your support. Whether you helped knock on doors and make calls, chipped in, or mobilized your friends and family to get out the vote, your work has made a significant impact. I am so proud of our grassroots movement to deliver for North Carolina, and I am deeply appreciative of your support. I am looking forward to sharing more with you about my important work and priorities in Congress in the coming weeks. | | Peter, We worked hard to get our message out to Wisconsinites. Unfortunately, our efforts came up short at the ballot box. To everyone that knocked on doors, phone banked, waved signs, showed up at our rallies, donated, and voted for me: **thank you!** Meeting each and every one of you has shown me how much our vision and our movement means for Wisconsin’s future. Even though this race is over, I’m not done fighting for a safer, more prosperous Wisconsin. Thanks again for all you have done, Peter. We couldn’t have done it without you by our side. Sincerely,

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebd0f86daa954402add9cdcd029102dc&_e=y2B7OTi5imPajzZkELDt6JibT7VWyoATeCEuo53yzn7OgbQgsr9lMffTB27jp8kYD4YXpTWuS8qQMPSqgePobRs_vkLuTFLle-JQof8qp0Zl9MpQPyqN94RwovIjipWMtHs75_3NwST-C2gk45A8bGpVe1ZI_NLv5xxX9X-zIrjAMfK1LPnMPkspTUBaCWFC47HEts6Qg4JDurpJyDnKZhy8zO1-HE7GQe7p-4CcUVNia1vU37P0oowBinKISm7F2bG9G5jRuk3FxazoHAMzUM2QysAQpiY-w0EPoXqjzFI-UEavkQb8fOKdbgRzeJYPp8oUqs5rC6icIe_S9rWlRxg1eAPADSaSzSkg0H5KRsxK6AA59-QUEZV51O368f8FptIh7v6Sq-4r5lROhMU6GZSuaEKpP7T7FLhhZQ1-z3XfL9jAb2lK0PInTnRFfusVNGR8yYejVG2RBcbrMaGrnaWJd3Nv8pG_adc4afmsykk%3D) **

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebd0f86daa954402add9cdcd029102dc&_e=y2B7OTi5imPajzZkELDt6JibT7VWyoATeCEuo53yzn7OgbQgsr9lMffTB27jp8kYD4YXpTWuS8qQMPSqgePobRs_vkLuTFLle-JQof8qp0Zl9MpQPyqN94RwovIjipWMtHs75_3NwST-C2gk45A8bGpVe1ZI_NLv5xxX9X-zIrjAMfK1LPnMPkspTUBaCWFC47HEts6Qg4JDurpJyDnKZhy8zO1-HE7GQe7p-4CcUVNia1vU37P0oowBinKISm7F2bG9G5jRuk3FxazoHAMzUM2QysAQpiY-w0EPoXqjzFI-UEavkQb8fOKdbgRzeJYP1JxeRvh8SK8JLvTpc7zWVnXT3Mr-mJxTFU3wp-F89jMSBzdpoWuJo-1t-qHUIcQUTspXceCdKadubXv2HlySSHxswWgQeuoaWepfvRKg5PZEZqgq1W5JAtz7BLIOfn9tZdk1zI5Hqinhs2su5iBB4lkcEDQIds7ch4Tv1CYioq0%3D)**

name: Patty, Loel, Taylor, Graham, and Avary
subject: One more thank you 💜
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
We hope you feel the same optimism for our future that you’ve given our family.

|
---
| | Dear friends, Before we log off and spend some _much-needed_ time together as a family, we just wanted to say one last thank you to everyone who voted, volunteered, donated, or simply cheered Patty on in the NE-01 Election. When Patty launched her campaign almost one year ago to the day, we were unsure of what to expect. We often see the nasty side of politics in the headlines and on the news, but wow — we should all be so proud of the strong, clean, and _**kind**_ campaign we’ve run over the last year. Your support allowed us to turnout the largest showing for a Democratic candidate since _**1964**_. We hope you feel the same optimism for our future that you’ve given our family. Though these aren’t the results we were hoping for, seeing countless Nebraskans of all ages rally to protect our fundamental freedoms and champion a better, brighter future for our state has been and will continue to be _such_ an inspiration. **We know that our state is in incredible hands with a community as committed to progress as NE-01.** Friend, from our family to yours, thank you for all you have done to support Patty. We’re so proud of all the work we’ve accomplished together. With love and hope, Patty, Loel, Taylor, Graham, and Avary
---

clean_body: We hope you feel the same optimism for our future that you’ve given our family. | | | Dear friends, Before we log off and spend some much-needed time together as a family, we just wanted to say one last thank you to everyone who voted, volunteered, donated, or simply cheered Patty on in the NE-01 Election. When Patty launched her campaign almost one year ago to the day, we were unsure of what to expect. We often see the nasty side of politics in the headlines and on the news, but wow — we should all be so proud of the strong, clean, and kind campaign we’ve run over the last year. Your support allowed us to turnout the largest showing for a Democratic candidate since 1964. We hope you feel the same optimism for our future that you’ve given our family. Though these aren’t the results we were hoping for, seeing countless Nebraskans of all ages rally to protect our fundamental freedoms and champion a better, brighter future for our state has been and will continue to be such an inspiration. We know that our state is in incredible hands with a community as committed to progress as NE-01. Friend, from our family to yours, thank you for all you have done to support Patty. We’re so proud of all the work we’ve accomplished together. With love and hope, Patty, Loel, Taylor, Graham, and Avary | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. If you would prefer to receive fewer emails from us, click here to . We’d hate to see you go, but if you would like to stop receiving our emails, you may . body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837502:Jj_Ig6GNJ:m:1:3374627611:3CE4C0AE7CDEBF2FAE87D881B2DF7FD7:r)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: The Red Wave that wasn't...
body:
and what comes next. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7c59079f68)
---
|
---
|
---
## The red wave that wasn’t...
Polling had the GOP winning big in the 2022 midterms, but now 48 hours after Election Day we know there were some bright spots like Florida and Texas, but obviously some disappoints in the House and Senate, like Pennsylvania in particular. There are a lot of reasons why we saw races we thought would be pickups go the other way, so I will be back Monday on the podcast to break it all down along with all the updates from over the weekend, subscribe now so you don’t miss it.
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=984ddcc831&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
## Black Rifle Coffee’s founder and veteran Evan Hafer ...
Just in time for Veteran’s Day tomorrow, I have a great conversation with the founder of the iconic brand Black Rifle Coffee, Evan Hafer. Evan is also a proud veteran and includes giving back to the veteran community in the core principles of his now hugely successful company. We talk about that, what motivated him to serve, his upbringing, the culture at Black Rifle, the headlines they’ve made and more. Don’t miss this one:
| [Download it here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=53338a2b63&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=49aba89c8d&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
## Tonight on Spicer & Co, Secretary of the Navy:
Tune in tonight to hear what he has to say on the Marine Corps birthday and the day before Veterans Day:
|
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Beto O’Rourke has burned nearly $200 million running three different failed campaigns in just four years ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ab56644753&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Fox News [Maricopa County, Arizona officials apologize for vote tabulator problems, say 7% of ballots affected](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=22b695d097&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News[Los Angeles mayor’s race: Caruso holds slim lead over Bass](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=dd2fe76c4d&e=f6564bbe3b) — via KTLA [Senator Ron Johnson of Wisconsin wins reelection over Barnes in Wisconsin](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5eea811a28&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Politico
|
---
## ICYMI: President Trump called into Spicer & Co on election night, don’t miss this one...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=94446c0e91&e=f6564bbe3b)
and two of the winners of GOP flipped seats joined us last night to talk about whats next:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=00aaa9bbfe&e=f6564bbe3b)
|

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This can't wait, Derek
#
This can't wait, Derek: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
**[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and John Fetterman so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221110-1?refcode=em20221110-8126&refcode2=8126_434096_XaWWud&akid=8126%2E434096%2EXaWWud)**
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.
**We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, Derek:
**[Will you split a donation of $5 between me and John Fetterman right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221110-1?refcode=em20221110-8126&refcode2=8126_434096_XaWWud&akid=8126%2E434096%2EXaWWud)**
**[Contribute Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221110-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221110-8126&refcode2=8126_434096_XaWWud&akid=8126%2E434096%2EXaWWud)**
Thank you for coming through when it matters most.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221110-8126-footer&t=1&refcode2=8126_434096_XaWWud&akid=8126%2E434096%2EXaWWud)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8126%2E434096%2EXaWWud)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8126%2E434096%2EXaWWud)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Friend,

**We 've worked hard over the past two years, and today, we can finally celebrate our efforts. **

_I am so pleased to wake up today and share this with you -- we did it. _

****We protected our commonsense, conservative values in NY-11 and WON -- thanks to each and every one of you. ****

[](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=b6bb413d8c544ba0870307d8e8caf8da&_e=9Sp23hH8hTppnDVWVxVIsvzBxSHz9ytXIa8pZsXf6Ql7Jc9yv2e7NaI4yVVb_1_LvVTHEk3E8Tlqa5zM7SAov_dArSe7rH1i7SWtvmhkkMMGoKlxHWupNxEauFPS6ftVW00XEZcygtIL_uesDDpMCWgF6JtDNTGVrwYumRZTFmOPsZ4fb8T0MgmJrw0lVsXppi10nKJ1Sy8l6xXiboqTGts7IkLqcNAvctPu2jqWRWwnMBE2SwX9Q4PTY6-V384NTX35pc8PDLVd6MxL6mxfFjYL4fpqX0QjqxwUKrYLxeLVJ0DbS7qC4BYvzXgQ3nfaXh_0z2Up20o1GhlPQ0yitbOfhc3BAbNdw0buZxrb3QeLI3LrAcwOMREpUnCRlPS8hF4NmSftR6wQIc8JlMA5msN4D8RvpstP5CydScRf-IukYZB3yeIlfBPuZ9a1pVYE)

**So, where do we go from here? We keep pushing forward.**

It's time to get to work.

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Thank You - From Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Unfortunately, things did not turn out the way we hoped on Tuesday night. After
a long year on the campaign trail, the voters of New Mexico chose a different
path than the vision our campaign laid out.

Peter,

Unfortunately, things did not turn out the way we hoped on Tuesday night.
After a long year on the campaign trail, the voters of New Mexico chose a
different path than the vision our campaign laid out.

I got into this race last year for the same reason I ran for US Senate two
years ago - I love this state & would do anything to try to make this a better
place to live for New Mexican families. Safe streets, better schools, and more
support for working families to make it to the end of the month should be the
expectation, and for far too long our leaders have failed to set us on the path
to attain that.

I truly hope that Governor Lujan Grisham finds success on those fronts,
because that means the people of this beautiful state will be better off.

I also hope the Governor takes note of the results & prioritizes listening to
those in our rural communities, and realizes that for far too long rural New
Mexico has felt forgotten.

Most importantly, my family and I want to thank the thousands of you who
supported my campaign with your time, resources and prayers. This campaign was
a grassroots movement of people desperate for change, and it was an honor to
represent you on the campaign trail and on the ballot.

I could never have made it to Election Day without the support from all of
you. Every last one of you who I came into contact with shaped my perspective
and vision.

This state has given so much to my family and I, and for that I will always be
grateful.

God Bless,

Mark Ronchetti

Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer.

Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste
- M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
It is a tremendous honor to be your Governor-elect.| | | [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=457d80eef5eb4618a87142e6da7d9fb9&_e=hOsilxkSZikkGJ5bDJCXfm-FEHjXuE41gaKvZgbXyvcgnxBGmu_IgqR-ATMtIdIusLn1McD7cuwmCtwP7yoFAf75vX1pFY7Ys0pwQKCXuQ7tC37RegkvzIz4DL8U_i83cvlK5THqVZCMA8DegFPsOLAB4yhLn-Y0bRFIoqnFbTqjL_qnl5JB-j_NATo4Fz0thEiuig4Y4Pbw4kumvh6V8w%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, It is a tremendous honor to be your Governor-elect. We celebrated an amazing victory on Tuesday night thanks to your hard work and support. The reason I'm doing this is simple: I love Arkansas. And the last two years on the campaign trail has made me fall in love with Arkansas all over again. What I love most about our state is our people. This campaign was never about me. It’s about you. No candidate for office ever wins by herself. And if she tells you she did, throw her out, because that means she’s forgotten who carried her across the finish line and who she’s fighting for. I will never forget who I’m fighting for, and I will never apologize for it, either. I’m fighting for you. Thank you for your support. Together, we are going to make Arkansas the best place to live, work and raise a family and take our state to the top! - Sarah
---
| | |
---

body:

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839055:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839056:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839057:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839058:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839055:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839055:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61839055:J41-jpGNn:m:1:3374012347:F39854DE5F6A3831AF5503542ADDE76C:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're officially going to a runoff.
body:
| | |
---
| | This can't wait, friend: We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election. We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on Day One. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend: [Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the DLCC so we can close our gap, start this runoff election strong, keep Georgia blue, and continue building Democratic power in state legislatures across the nation? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJ5IkCFzHdXQ9TnuD658DMDUOVd83Siaf6cQHkK6OSTQYEvjA42eE76ucc46V5bknYJe7fpyit8BwpW4D5x6rMQ-dt_JUPWIjw9a4RL8TNdZlUy8ojCqBEXu_GBz5VaNSaZqpxlUcha2DlkxUSHv3ZZgHmkJAQJrR1HyCf3ftmys1PjrDNMAuBn1qRZ1iWaXVkF4Kz6F0k7DaCldO-l-_3N5_z2uDnlRkcbThe6r3sqK3czmFxxAXDdLSZneaynqB9eE7v2ZyOrzzxTEHQ5ktDxUtBy1tSxn0rM5UmsmTL3FOFLBBZ8RpcOcPM4OFCEQjTY9YtZGNi_GcT_UmKorkdZ8HayGCctxeGESeeF9-LvFagtZvU48C02Kx9V9Hk3Uol/3r1/Pps_yiXbRIWBfkXmAK5kGg/h0/fEc2kQvsFU0JDr0CDyH-bLwCbCjDYVxMMRg1M4dmxDM) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and the DLCC.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election. We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on Day One. name: Schiff HQ
subject: Fwd: Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek — did you see Adam’s message? Democrats beat expectations
and are still fighting for every seat of our House majority.

The Senate majority could once again come down to Georgia. And Rev.
Warnock needs our help.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1028&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]Please, if you can spare it, chip in $10 to Rev. Warnock’s campaign and
ours today so Rev. Warnock can rebuild the resources to defeat Trump’s
candidate Herschel Walker in the Georgia Senate runoff election on
December 6th.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1029&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]DONATE $10

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1030&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]Adam Schiff U.S. Representative header with photo

Derek,

Tuesday night Democrats proved the pundits and pollsters wrong. Our ground
game really paid off. There was no red wave. And with more than a dozen
House races still undecided, I’m not ready to make any pronouncements
about the majority. If we hold on, it wouldn’t be the first time Kevin
McCarthy crowned himself Speaker only to see it slip away. I’ll have more
to say on that in the coming days.

But here’s what we do know — the control of the Senate could once again be
decided in Georgia. And we have to do everything we can to ensure that the
GOP doesn’t take the Senate.

Rev. Warnock just exhausted his campaign fundraising account fighting to
the finish line against more than $30 million in Republican spending for
Herschel Walker, and now he has to start from scratch in order to win this
just-announced runoff election.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1031&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]Rev. Warnock needs us with him today — will you split $10 or any amount
to his campaign and ours right now to ensure the Rev. has the resources to
reach every voter in Georgia and win this runoff election?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.xHzBB4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1032&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.Pekub1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1033&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.yqvkFX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1034&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.lSmETc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1035&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.kanJGq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1036&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.KIdsjB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1037&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Georgia voters are split right down the middle, and this runoff election
will again be determined by which campaign has the strongest voter
turnout.

We need to get everyone off the sidelines to defend Rev. Warnock’s seat
for this 4-week sprint until December 6th. While Republican donors can cut
million-dollar checks to Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC to support Walker’s
campaign, Rev. Warnock is relying on grassroots support from folks like
you.

That’s how he managed to flip Georgia blue last year, and that’s what it
will take for Democrats to protect his seat.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20221110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1038&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]Derek, can you split $10 or whatever you can spare today to
help Rev. Warnock’s campaign rebuild the resources to win this runoff
election against Trump’s handpicked Republican candidate Herschel Walker?

Thanks for adding your support,

Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1332%2E5257348%2EYX7nqY ]Privacy Policy

body:
but we don’t have much time!

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54434531/378511991/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTRlZmRmYi00YTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGTRXof8ED9Db28RutS4Jhtik9uuKE6A71F0fk_M-cc=&emci=6a25b5bb-7560-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=fe4efdfb-4a61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

We were able to turn out just under two MILLION Democrats across Georgia, and with your help we’ll do it again.

Rev. Warnock has officially advanced to a runoff, but unlike the 2020 runoffs, we have less than ONE MONTH to do everything we can to keep this seat blue.

If we’re going to win, we need to maintain our momentum and continue fueling our grassroots voter outreach program.

**_[Your support will be the key to our success. Can we count on you to rush a donation so we can ensure we have the critical resources we need to start things off on the right track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54434532/378511992/710125701?refcode=20221110.4_PSD_11BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTRlZmRmYi00YTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGTRXof8ED9Db28RutS4Jhtik9uuKE6A71F0fk_M-cc=)_**

Republicans have already started working to mobilize their voters, and with the margins so close, we can’t afford to fall behind.

– Georgia Democrats

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: Can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Peter, thanks to conservatives like you who showed up to vote, we took back Congress and...| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=57c96d3b39544e7faacaece5737590e3&_e=2PvbA0A1ZIehemiCa87Ktn246o3CfYqaBNjml1SwoZNzFndMkw8lGUGRUqD8pbnADNIPDdSEpLFTw-uPMJHbRnfkkQ1RdfMT1fdVwIOy9eahLXy3lTF59jeaSUrUDDY0D8u3e86Xp9iBc_z3fRYUvUL2EXPgAeduCyyvdHzWpIziDqZ-pwEbBdxECJOzAmnTqMzUxFW0NCi1S5X3bC-89Q%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Republicans have the majority in the House and Ron Johnson was re-elected to the Senate on Tuesday. These are two big wins for Conservatives across the state of Wisconsin, and America. _But before I get back to work in the new Republican-led Congress, I need to say thank you._ **I couldn’t have won this election without the support of strong conservatives like you.** Peter, it’s an incredible honor to continue representing Northeast Wisconsin in Congress. I’ve always said I will treat each term as a deployment. Over the next two years, I promise to fight for freedom, seek principled solutions to the problems we face, and ensure that our district remains the best place in the country to live and raise a family. But the road ahead won’t be easy... Faced with rising inflation, skyrocketing crime, and plummeting education scores, America needs a massive dose of Wisconsin common sense to cure the nonsense coming out of Washington. **I look forward to continuing to fight for you, your family, our community, and our country in Congress.** Thank you, Mike Gallagher
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nick=20Coffman?=
subject: They aren’t able to celebrate Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
You can help our nation’s defenders who won’t get to celebrate this year... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7e78a01f96&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, Every single one of our nation’s defenders deserves to be celebrated today. **Unfortunately, too many of our veterans will not be able to celebrate. Like the 3 of our own Warriors who are rotting in prison.** Sergeant Calvin Gibbs, Staff Sergeant Robert Bales, and Specialist Neftaly Platero are all currently serving out **LIFE SENTENCES** for crimes they didn't commit. And in honor of Veterans Day, we are asking for your help in getting these heroes the justice they deserve. [**Will you make a contribution to our WARRIOR FUND today?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7bc2cb6294&e=fdefed58de)
---

---

[**VETERAN’S DAY DONATION: $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ed5fbf3573&e=fdefed58de)

---
Friend, we cannot forget our the atrocities committed by our own government, against the men and women who serve! In an effort to wrongly convict these Heroes, the government has...
* Thrown out evidence,
* Disregarded witness testimony,
* Flown in enemy combatants to testify,
* Threatened them with the death sentence,
* And so much more!

**This Veterans Day weekend, we're reminded of the respect that these men are owed for their service.****Yet still, they are treated like second-class criminals.** _United American Patriots is working to change that._ Our team at UAP works day and night to get these Warriors free and back into the arms of their loved ones, but we need your help. We step in whenever our Nation’s Warriors are wrongfully accused and convicted of “War Crimes,” and U.S. military prosecutors have failed them. United American Patriots works with families to alleviate the financial burden and to “Defend our Defenders” through our WARRIOR FUND. We pay for fees and associated expenses to ensure our Nation’s Warriors have the best attorneys, investigators, and experts on their side to preserve their rights and defend against wrongful accusations and convictions. **_The reason why is simple: because our Defenders deserve nothing less._** [**Could you chip in $35 this Veteran's Day to help our country's Heroes get the respect they deserve?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=71a296c3af&e=fdefed58de)

Thank you in advance for your support this Veterans Day weekend. Nick Coffman United American Patriots

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Friend,

I'm deeply honored to have the trust and support again of the great people who make up Virginia's 10th District — and I'll continue to be a voice for them on economic opportunity, healthcare, reproductive justice, LGBTQ equality, education, the environment, and access to the ballot box.

This victory wouldn't have been possible without you. Whether you made phone calls, gave a few dollars, or shared our messages on social media, you helped ensure that we reached voters where we needed to.

This was my toughest race yet, and you all fought harder than ever before. While we still await the returns from key races around the country where Democrats over-performed, we should take a moment to reflect on what we accomplished here in VA-10. **On Tuesday, we showed that Northern Virginians are determined to secure hard-won progress and that they have faith in the work we've done to lower the cost of living for families and secure our democracy.**

When I first made the decision to run for public office – an unsuccessful Commonwealth’s Attorney campaign run out of my own kitchen – I never imagined it would lead me all the way to the halls of Congress.

But with each new step along the journey – the more people whose stories I’ve gotten to know, the communities that have welcomed me and invited me to celebrate with them, and the remarkable ways I’ve seen Virginia's 10th District grow and thrive – my love of public service has only grown. **Now, I’m more excited than ever to get back to work fighting for Virginia families.**

I'm so incredibly grateful to all of you, and whatever path lies ahead for our country after tonight, I will make sure your voices remain heard.

Sincerely,

Jennifer
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to a runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837190:6O8PjpGNX:m:1:3368395361:C6ED1D10AC40217F7BFB71CC15768C14:r)**

Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61837190:6O8PjpGNX:m:1:3368395361:C6ED1D10AC40217F7BFB71CC15768C14:r)**

Herschel Walker

body:
We have less than ONE MONTH to do everything we can to turn out every Democrat in Georgia for Rev. Warnock and push him over the finish line.

| Peter,

Our work’s not done yet in Georgia.

Rev. Warnock is advancing to a runoff, and we can’t afford to lose our momentum.

We’re tired, and we know you are too — but we have another opportunity to hold on to our Democratic Senate majority!

We have less than _**ONE MONTH**_ to do everything we can to turn out every Democrat in Georgia for Rev. Warnock and push him over the finish line.

clean_body: We have less than ONE MONTH to do everything we can to turn out every Democrat in Georgia for Rev. Warnock and push him over the finish line. | Peter, Our work’s not done yet in Georgia. Rev. Warnock is advancing to a runoff, and we can’t afford to lose our momentum. We’re tired, and we know you are too — but we have another opportunity to hold on to our Democratic Senate majority! We have less than ONE MONTH to do everything we can to turn out every Democrat in Georgia for Rev. Warnock and push him over the finish line. We have the votes, but with the margins so close, everything's going to come down to how many Democrats we can reach in the next couple of weeks.= | | | = | = | = | = | = We’re so close to winning, but we need help from grassroots supporters like YOU to finish the job once and for all. – Georgia Democrats * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: Cultivating Houston’s small businesses community
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
| | | Amanda is dedicated to empowering our diverse small business owners to create a Houston where everyone can thrive. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yAYKskkclNdf6cPfUz18RRFglpi16cLOqp2suqI40VzdBhDP76ryLQQe6vqxr2OrqztcEKY9nBT8oW0iR06l4AKyYIn9GUSAOaTVJRrD8jNw7bpPRDL7razu5fhOzsmNwZIK4aGdjrBqLVdrcoO8guqBCZ8AhPZ4ew5fCmer9mb1q5VdKNGEt9oIZLxqjys0QNrjQzbMYq16oQZCE_by-4P4DqBcVIiJQvZc5sRskHR5-c1FRkfU61uIZenVrJRLRiFQS2zOdNNapevocoPws_beffa9r8Tn21BURzA7ivUbL__hL79GNnejuRmrYZZtVmxvujVjO_O7xvTSc8siOnBl9mNDhgyvy9PJylvgCjU_G3XmoNbAtiQFSwW_u4nZO67M_g5mrYf_Zt7tyBq-CKAkilbNEyB9U5ITanTNDEw8akldFq6BzsWXMrGNwMxnY/3r1/FOYuXODmSlukLiwCjNzEAg/h0/1iPbVfD4bNbZ3EW6LmNP4hUutcydhIduHfQoknHpc8g) | | Team,

Addressing the disparities that our minority and women entrepreneurs face is a deep passion of Amanda’s. As an At-Large Houston Council Member, Amanda pushed for more equitable outcomes for women and minority-owned businesses. After forming The City of Houston Women & Minority Small Business Owner Task Force, the gaps in Houston’s ecosystem were revealed, and the group came up with solutions.

One of the solutions led to the formation of Houston’s own Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to support women and minority-owned businesses seeking to navigate the small business community opportunities. Amanda was honored to discuss the work she is leading in Houston for Main Street businesses to be successful and to discuss small business opportunities during the Small Business Capital Forum. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yAYKskkclNdf6cPfUz18RRFglpi16cLOqp2suqI40VzdBhDP76ryLQQe6vqxr2OrqztcEKY9nBT8oW0iR06l4AgOGZtAF8dM0SUuwByhY9-RTArnH-a3zJCT2Mqbqq7DV9G-rfEREIdvsW1NSEdrCWwUN3jyAkLfocux-2T9MXvtl5IHhaj6oJ7Z0y2pkQaAJURjJvOo529rVLQV6VUyWnphlKAw5WJzu_xp1ewvMFmuCkjY1TtK2xGYNqBsgt9Pn4GAnFG-CkDT6JDHKKydiMJZTjts70SFKdeS13bdWmknJy-rOkR_vGStUdLPNSDQyBBVGN2JYs8X9TWW6CyiHAHlua6QYu9krfkkxja01qIxbepz8tlf5p5EvmoLsUCrKUexRkydrQj0YFCJLeQd9xpWaPm5jBVsouRYAoaTdFg5OCpZ0S5IL65jaUkOopVNI/3r1/FOYuXODmSlukLiwCjNzEAg/h1/OAk5rmX9Snl7Qzug28b8gOI9mY0hLqdA738StG0bc0o)
Houston is the most diverse metropolitan area in Texas and one of the country’s most diverse cities. **_But too often, we fail to break down the barriers that our diverse communities face._**

Through her work as a former At-Large Houston City Council Member and through efforts with community partners, Amanda is dedicated to empowering our diverse small business owners to create a Houston for us all. As Houston’s next mayor, Amanda will continue working to ensure our diverse small business owners have the tools and opportunities they need to succeed.

**_[But, team, to create a Houston that fosters the wealth and economic mobility of minorities, women, and every Houstonian alike, Amanda needs your help. The race for Houston’s Mayor’s office is rapidly underway. clean_body: | | | Amanda is dedicated to empowering our diverse small business owners to create a Houston where everyone can thrive. | | Team, Addressing the disparities that our minority and women entrepreneurs face is a deep passion of Amanda’s. As an At-Large Houston Council Member, Amanda pushed for more equitable outcomes for women and minority-owned businesses. After forming The City of Houston Women & Minority Small Business Owner Task Force, the gaps in Houston’s ecosystem were revealed, and the group came up with solutions. One of the solutions led to the formation of Houston’s own Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to support women and minority-owned businesses seeking to navigate the small business community opportunities. Amanda was honored to discuss the work she is leading in Houston for Main Street businesses to be successful and to discuss small business opportunities during the Small Business Capital Forum. Houston is the most diverse metropolitan area in Texas and one of the country’s most diverse cities. But too often, we fail to break down the barriers that our diverse communities face. Through her work as a former At-Large Houston City Council Member and through efforts with community partners, Amanda is dedicated to empowering our diverse small business owners to create a Houston for us all. As Houston’s next mayor, Amanda will continue working to ensure our diverse small business owners have the tools and opportunities they need to succeed. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Together, we can create a Houston where everyone has the opportunity to thrive! Onward, Team Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, Political Advertising paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer Amanda Edwards Campaign PO Box 88228 Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent via . name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
I am so, so grateful.

**** Team, it’s official. I will be the next representative for Colorado’s 7th District. Before anything else Team, I needed to reach out again just to say thank you. This was a difficult, hard-fought race, and we wouldn’t have gotten to this outcome without a dedicated, tireless, and truly incredible team. You all came through for me every time I needed you, and words can’t express how grateful I am. When I was a teenager, if you had told me that I would one day have the opportunity to serve Colorado in the United States Congress, I wouldn’t ever have believed you. When I was just six years old, my mom hurt her back and was overprescribed opioids, leading to a decades long battle with addiction. I started working when I was twelve cleaning houses and I’ve never known what it’s like not to work multiple jobs just to make ends meet. This campaign has always been about fighting for the regular people whose needs so often go overlooked in the halls of Congress, and I promise you that I will work night and day as your Congresswoman to do exactly that. Together, we will work to build an economy where working families can get ahead. We will work to support public schools — because I know I wouldn’t be here today without the incredible teachers I had here in Colorado. We will work to keep our communities safe from gun violence so kids like my son Davis don’t have to grow up with active shooter drills. We will work to protect our democracy. We will work to defend our personal freedoms — from the freedom to vote, to the freedom to have an abortion, to the freedom to be with and marry the person you love. Team, I promise that when I get to Washington, I will fight as hard as I possibly can for you and your family. Once again, thank you so much for everything you have done to make this victory possible. I won’t ever forget it. With gratitude, Brittany

---

clean_body: We can’t let Herschel lose. | It all comes down to the Georgia run-off. The fate of our nation rests in Herschel Walker’s hands. Peter, right now, a battle for FREEDOM vs SOCIALISM is taking place in the Georgia run-off, and I’m asking you to join me in doing whatever you can to ensure Herschel Walker defeats his radical opponent to protect Georgia and America from the Socialist Agenda that’s threatening to cripple our nation. | If every single person who receives this email would just take 15 seconds to donate whatever they can, it means that Herschel Walker will have all of the crucial resources he needs to DEFEND GEORGIA and DEFEND AMERICA. Thank you so much for stepping up when America needs you most. Herschel is desperately counting on our support. JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. name: Jena Griswold
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter,
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
Thank you for electing me to a second term as Secretary of State! This is a historic win. As Colorado’s first democratic woman Secretary of State, the youngest elected Secretary of State in the nation, and just the first democrat to win this seat since Dwight D. Eisenhower was President, I thank you!
With Tuesday's victories, Colorado chooses the path of democracy – of free, fair, and accessible elections.
Coloradans from every county, from the front range to the eastern plains, from the western slope to the San Luis Valley, came together to vote for democracy.
We must stand together, not as Republicans versus Democrats, but as Coloradans and Americans, to reject extremism and ensure our government works for every person. I could never have won this race without your unwavering support. I look forward to continuing the march toward a stronger Colorado with all of you.
With gratitude,
Jena Griswold
Colorado Secretary of State
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

Our race in Georgia is headed to a runoff election __ – so with the stakes higher than ever in this race, I've got a simple question for you:

**What would you do if I told you how your donation of $5 today would help keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**

Would you give $5, knowing it would keep our offices open and our incredible staff on the ground, speaking heart-to-heart with Georgia voters?

name: Kristina Karamo
subject: The Fight Continues
body:
Thank you to every person who supported us, from sharing a social media post, to hosting events and beyond.

I ran for Secretary of State so our children would live free, not political ambition.

I've met patriots from all different walks of life, and political affiliations, rightfully in fear of the level of corruption infecting our government and threatening the survival of state and nation. A common threat every person in America experiences whether they know it or not.

In the beginning years of our nation's history, the majority of Congress was opposed to the emancipation of slaves. Despite this fact, one man fought tirelessly for the freedom of America's slaves. This man was John Quincy Adams. For 28 consecutive years, he fought for this cause- even when it seemed that he was making no progress at all. One day, while he was leaving the Capitol building, a reporter stopped him and asked why he kept pushing for the emancipation of slaves though hopeless? Adams responded, "Duty is ours; results are God's." This response must be our response NOW!

Now we see the State and Nation Threatening corrupted results of the election.Evidence of systemic election corruption will undoubtedly be suppressed by those managing and preserving it - which will include demonizing messengers of truth.

As our team monitored election activities, we received multiple reports of election law violations and other irregularities throughout multiple counties. Here are a few:

* REFUSING to post and declare the number of absentee ballots received as required per the law.
* Citizens arriving at the polls only to be told they ALREADY voted absentee.
* The Ann Arbor clerk flagrantly, and arrogantly committing election crimes by accepting absentee ballots past 8 pm, registering people to vote past 11 pm, and registering non-Michigan residents to vote. The Ann Arbor clerk told a witness that the current SoS approved it.

Every citizen has a constitutional right to lawfully operated elections. Whether you're a Democrat, Republican, Libertarian, Independent, etc., our elections are the ONLY mechanism we the people have to maintain control over our government and preserve our God-given unalienable rights.

As we continue to speak the truth about the injustices at the hands of corruption in our society, never forget, that God told us to walk in love. Be peaceful and lawful yet always ensure your level of activism is commensurate with that which threatens the future of your state, nation, children, and grandchildren.

Our team has created stored-energy and momentum that must not be allowed to dissipate. And please never forget that, God is obeyed and glorified by the effort alone irrespective of earthly outcomes.

And so, now we will regroup, pray for wisdom, refresh our situational awareness, then proceed as required to evidence we love, and fear God more than we fear those managing networked corruption.

"Be anxious for nothing," rest yourself as to rejuvenate such that you can reengage as God requires.

Standby, there's much more to come....

In Liberty,
Kristina Karamo

* * *

_Paid for with regulated funds_
_Kristina Karamo for SOS_
_PO Box 1047_
_Novi, MI 48376_
